translations.ARTIGOS CRÍTICOS e SEMICRÍTICOS ESSENCIA: ESSENTIAL CRITICAL AND SEMI-CRITICAL ITEMS DURING SURGERY
translations.Pode ser usado durante a intubação pelo: May be used during intubation by the anesthesiologist and during surgeries for fluid drainage.
translations.Usado para coletar fluidos, resíduos cor: Used to collect fluids, body waste (such as urine), medications, saline, or alcohol during pre- and intraoperative procedures.
translations.Usado em cirurgias de grande porte para: Used in major surgeries to place organs, tissues, foreign bodies, or large anatomical specimens.
translations.Usado para colocar líquidos assépticos c: Used to hold aseptic liquids such as chlorhexidine, iodine, or saline solutions.
translations.O anestesista utilizará do tamanho certo: The anesthesiologist will use the correct size to visualize the patient's tracheal opening and perform orotracheal intubation before surgery.
translations.Usada para liberar vias aéreas e melhora: Used to open the airway and improve oxygen flow to the upper airway.
translations.Ele é introduzido dentro do tubo orotraq: It is inserted inside the endotracheal tube to assist the anesthesiologist during intubation.
translations.Introduzido antes do tubo orotraqueal na: Inserted before the endotracheal tube upon visualization of the trachea during intubation; after its placement, the endotracheal tube is introduced over the tip of the Bougie and guided into proper position. After tube placement, the Bougie is removed. Being extremely flexible, it is a very important tool among intubation materials.
translations.Em formato retangular, serve de auxilio: Rectangular in shape, it assists the surgeon in keeping instruments that have been used and will still be used in a sterile and easily accessible container.
translations.Drenagem de secreções, usadas no pré, tr: Drainage of secretions, used in the pre-, intra-, and postoperative periods for drainage of airway secretions.
translations.Instrumental estéril de longa permanenci: Long-term sterile instrument inserted by the surgeon via tracheostomy.
translations.Tubos semiflexíveis com uma ponta conten: Semiflexible tubes with a camera tip for visualization of regions such as the stomach, intestine, and bronchi; they have an outlet for liquid aspiration, air insufflation, and an inlet for probes to perform invasive procedures.
translations.Exploração de cavidades e identificação: Exploration of cavities and anatomical identification.
translations.Guiar sondas e bisturis e proteger os te: To guide probes and scalpels and protect adjacent tissues.
Removal of blood and fluids from the field.
translations.Drenagem de secreções no pós-operatório,: Postoperative drainage of secretions, flexible and easy to remove.
Postoperative drainage of secretions, rigid and tubular.
Postoperative drainage of secretions; connected to the main drain and must be kept compressed to avoid air entry, maintaining vacuum.
translations.Drenagem de Urina proveniente das sondas: Drainage of urine from catheters or even secretions from postoperative drains.
translations.Visualiza os orgãos internos da cavidade: Visualizes the internal organs of the abdominal cavity, attached to a computer and television system where surgeons monitor in real time.
translations.Preensão laparoscópica de órgãos e tecid: Laparoscopic grasping of organs and tissues.
translations.Na imagem além da tesoura, observa-se ou: In the image, besides the scissors, other laparoscopic forceps used in videolaparotomy are observed. Cutting with scissors is performed under video monitor view.
translations.Grampeamento mecânico para hemostasia e: Mechanical stapling for hemostasis and synthesis of tissue manipulated during surgery.
translations.• SISTEMA DE PROCESSAMENTO E VISUALIZAÇÃ: • VIDEO SURGERY PROCESSING AND VISUALIZATION SYSTEM
translations.Através deste computador é gerenciado to: Through this computer, all instruments, gases, video system, and recording are managed for the VIDEO SURGERY to occur.
translations.É uma sonda rígida manipulada pelo ortop: A rigid probe manipulated by the orthopedist and visualized by video for joint visualization.
translations.É um instrumento cirúrgico de alta preci: A high-precision surgical instrument, also known as a microdebrider, for removing soft tissue, cartilage, or bone during medical procedures, especially in minimally invasive surgeries such as arthroscopy.
translations.Utiliza energia térmica para destruir (c: Uses thermal energy to destroy (coagulate) unwanted tissues, such as tumors or nodules, without the need for traditional surgery.
translations.• MICROSCÓPIO DE NEUROCIRURGIA E CIRURGI: • MICROSCOPE FOR NEUROSURGERY AND OPHTHALMIC SURGERIES
translations.Usado em Neurocirurgias e cirurgias oftá: Used in neurosurgeries and ophthalmic corneal surgeries.
translations.• PINÇAS MICRO PARA MANIPULAÇÃO EM CIRUR: • MICRO FORCEPS FOR MANIPULATION IN MICROSCOPIC SURGERIES
translations.Utilizada em cirurgias microscópicas com: Used in microscopic surgeries such as neurosurgeries requiring the use of a microscope.
translations.Utilizado para pinçar temporariamente mi: Used to temporarily clamp microvessels (very small blood vessels, such as arteries and veins) during microsurgery procedures, with the aim of interrupting local blood flow.

translations.Nariz: Espéculo nasal, Killian, Cottle,: Nose: Nasal speculum, Killian, Cottle, Hammer/Gouge, Takahashi forceps
translations.Garganta: Abre-boca McIvor, Pinça Allis,: Throat: McIvor mouth gag, Allis forceps, Tonsillotome, Adenotome
translations.Ouvido: Espéculos, Microcuretas, Pinça J: Ear: Specula, Microcurettes, Alligator forceps, Microscope
translations.Vascular: Pinças DeBakey, Satinsky, Pott: Vascular: DeBakey forceps, Satinsky, Potts, Bulldog

translations.Relação completa de instrumentais cirúrg: Complete list of surgical instruments separated by phases (Dieresis, Hemostasis, Exeresis, Synthesis) and specialties. Complete guide with functions and images.

Complete guide to surgical instruments for all specialties.
translations.Calcule o volume (mL) de insulina a aspi: Calculate the volume (mL) of insulin to draw into the syringe from the prescribed dose in units and the vial concentration. Free nursing tool.
translations.Calcule com precisão o volume (mL) de in: Accurately calculate the volume (mL) of insulin to draw into the syringe from the prescribed dose in units and the vial concentration.
translations.Indicada sempre que houver prescrição de: Indicated whenever there is a prescription of insulin in units and the need to convert to volume in mL for correct aspiration.
translations.Pacientes diabéticos de qualquer faixa e: Diabetic patients of any age group who require subcutaneous, intramuscular, or intravenous insulin administration.
translations.Dose de insulina prescrita pelo médico,: Insulin dose prescribed by the physician, in units (IU).
translations.Tipo de seringa disponível para administ: Type of syringe available for administration.
translations.Volume muito pequeno para aspiração prec: Volume too small for accurate aspiration. Check if the dose is correct and if the insulin syringe (1 mL) is the most appropriate.
translations.Volume compatível com seringa de insulin: Volume compatible with standard insulin syringe (1 mL). Verify correct reading of the syringe scale.
translations.Volume acima de 1 mL. Utilize seringa de: Volume above 1 mL. Use a 3 mL or larger syringe. Confirm the prescribed dose and vial concentration.
translations.Volume muito alto. Revise a dose prescri: Volume too high. Review the prescribed dose, vial concentration, and route of administration. Consider if the prescription is correct.
translations.O cálculo de aspiração de insulina funda: The insulin aspiration calculation is based on the relationship between the prescribed dose in international units (IU) and the concentration of the insulin solution (IU/mL). The standard formula — Volume (mL) = Dose (IU) ÷ Concentration (IU/mL) — derives from the pharmaceutical definition of concentration: each mL of solution contains a fixed number of insulin units, defined by the manufacturer (U-100 = 100 IU/mL, U-40 = 40 IU/mL, U-500 = 500 IU/mL).
translations.A insulina U-100 é a concentração padrão: U-100 insulin has been the worldwide standard concentration since the 1990s, replacing U-40. U-500 insulin is used in cases of severe insulin resistance. 1 mL insulin syringes are graduated in units to facilitate direct reading in U-100.
translations.Protocolos institucionais e diretrizes d: Institutional protocols and patient safety guidelines recommend double-checking medication calculations before administration, especially for insulin, given the high risk of hypoglycemia or hyperglycemia associated with dosing errors. The World Health Organization classifies insulin as a high-alert medication.
translations.Esta calculadora realiza apenas a conver: This calculator only performs the conversion from units to mL. It does not replace clinical assessment of insulin indication, verification of administration route, timing of application, or glycemic monitoring. Always check the medical prescription and institutional protocols.
translations.Sempre confira a concentração da ampola: Always check the insulin vial concentration before calculation.
translations.Utilize seringa de insulina (1 mL) para: Use an insulin syringe (1 mL) for doses up to 100 units in U-100.
translations.Nunca misture insulinas sem verificar a: Never mix insulins without verifying compatibility.
translations.Registre a hora, a dose e a via de admin: Record the time, dose, and route of administration.
translations.Quantas unidades de insulina há em 1 mL: How many units of insulin are in 1 mL of a U-100 vial?
translations.U-100 significa 100 unidades internacion: U-100 means 100 international units (IU) of insulin per mL of solution.
translations.Qual é a fórmula para calcular o volume: What is the formula to calculate the volume of insulin to aspirate?
translations.Volume (mL) = Dose (UI) ÷ Concentração (: Volume (mL) = Dose (IU) ÷ Concentration (IU/mL). For example: 20 IU ÷ 100 IU/mL = 0.2 mL.
translations.Uma seringa de insulina padrão (1 mL) é: A standard insulin syringe (1 mL) is graduated in how many units for U-100?
translations.A seringa de insulina de 1 mL é graduada: The 1 mL insulin syringe is graduated from 0 to 100 units when used with U-100 insulin.
translations.Qual a diferença entre insulina U-100 e: What is the difference between U-100 and U-40 insulin?
translations.U-100 contém 100 unidades de insulina po: U-100 contains 100 units of insulin per mL, while U-40 contains 40 units per mL. U-100 is the current worldwide standard. Always use the syringe corresponding to the insulin concentration to avoid dosing errors.
translations.Posso usar seringa comum (3 mL) para ins: Can I use a regular syringe (3 mL) for insulin?
translations.Sim, desde que o cálculo de conversão pa: Yes, as long as the conversion calculation to mL is done correctly. However, the insulin syringe (1 mL) offers greater precision for small doses, as it is graduated in units for U-100.
translations.Não. A ferramenta é um apoio ao cálculo: No. The tool is a calculation aid and does not replace clinical assessment, medical prescription, or institutional protocols. Always verify data before administering any medication.
translations.O que fazer se o volume calculado for ma: What to do if the calculated volume is greater than 1 mL?
translations.Utilize uma seringa de 3 mL ou maior. Ve: Use a 3 mL or larger syringe. Check if the prescribed dose is correct and if the vial concentration was reported correctly. For very high doses, confirm with the prescriber.
translations.Como funciona o cálculo de aspiração de: How does the insulin aspiration calculation work?
translations.<p>A aspiração de insulina é calculada d:
Insulin aspiration is calculated by dividing the prescribed dose (in international units, IU) by the concentration of the insulin solution (in IU/mL). The result indicates the volume in mL to be drawn into the syringe for correct dose administration.

Formula: Volume (mL) = Dose (IU) ÷ Concentration (IU/mL).

For example, for a dose of 20 IU of U-100 insulin: 20 ÷ 100 = 0.2 mL.
translations.Calculadora de Aspiração de Insulina: cá: Insulin Aspiration Calculator: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Esta ferramenta é um apoio ao cálculo cl: This tool is a clinical calculation aid and does not replace the assessment and judgment of the nursing professional. Insulin is a high-alert medication.
translations.Calcule com precisão o volume (mL) de in: Accurately calculate the volume (mL) of insulin to draw into the syringe from the prescribed dose in units and the vial concentration. Indicated whenever there is a prescription of insulin in units and the need to convert to volume in mL for correct aspiration.
translations.Seringa de insulina (1 mL) é graduada em: Insulin syringe (1 mL) is graduated in units for U-100.
translations.AMERICAN DIABETES ASSOCIATION. Standards: AMERICAN DIABETES ASSOCIATION. Standards of Medical Care in Diabetes—2024. Diabetes Care, v. 47, Suppl. 1, 2024.
translations.INSTITUTE FOR SAFE MEDICATION PRACTICES: INSTITUTE FOR SAFE MEDICATION PRACTICES (ISMP). High-Alert Medications: Insulin. 2023.
translations.A aspiração de insulina é calculada divi: Insulin aspiration is calculated by dividing the prescribed dose (in international units, IU) by the concentration of the insulin solution (in IU/mL). The result indicates the volume in mL to be drawn into the syringe for correct dose administration.
translations.Por exemplo, para uma dose de 20 UI de i: For example, for a dose of 20 IU of U-100 insulin: 20 ÷ 100 = 0.2 mL.
translations.Esta ferramenta tem finalidade educacion: This tool is for educational and clinical decision support purposes. Results should always be verified and validated by a qualified nursing professional, according to patient assessment and institutional protocols. Insulin is classified as a high-alert medication.
translations.Escala de Johns Hopkins - Avaliação de R: Johns Hopkins Fall Risk Assessment Tool (JHFRAT)
translations.Calcule a Johns Hopkins Fall Risk Assess: Calculate the Johns Hopkins Fall Risk Assessment Tool (JHFRAT) to assess fall risk in hospitalized patients. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar objetivamente o risco de queda e: Objectively assess fall risk in hospitalized patients based on 7 categories: age, fall history, elimination, medications, care equipment, mobility, and cognition.
translations.Indicada para avaliação de risco de qued: Indicated for fall risk assessment in adult hospitalized patients at admission and periodic reassessment per institutional protocol.
translations.Pacientes adultos internados em unidades: Adult patients admitted to acute care hospital units.
translations.Ocorrência de queda nos últimos 6 meses: Occurrence of a fall in the 6 months prior to admission.
translations.Sem queda nos últimos 6 meses: No fall in the last 6 months
translations.Uma queda nos últimos 6 meses antes da a: One fall in the 6 months prior to admission
translations.Alterações no padrão de eliminação intes: Alterations in bowel or bladder elimination pattern.
translations.Uso de opioides/PCA, anticonvulsivantes,: Use of opioids/PCA, anticonvulsants, antihypertensives, diuretics, hypnotics, laxatives, sedatives, and psychotropics.
translations.Uso de 2 ou mais medicamentos de alto ri: Use of 2 or more high-risk fall medications
translations.Procedimento com sedação nas últimas 24: Procedure with sedation in the last 24 hours
translations.Ex: infusão IV, dreno torácico, cateter: E.g., IV infusion, chest tube, indwelling urinary catheter, sequential compression device (SCD), among others.
translations.Necessita de assistência ou supervisão p: Requires assistance or supervision for mobility, transfer, or ambulation.
Presence of unsteady or unsafe gait.
translations.Comprometimento visual ou auditivo que a: Visual or auditory impairment affecting mobility.
translations.Consciência alterada do ambiente físico: Altered awareness of the immediate physical environment.
translations.Cognição - Falta de Compreensão das Limi: Cognition - Lack of Understanding of Limitations
translations.Falta de compreensão das próprias limita: Lack of understanding of one's own physical and cognitive limitations.
translations.Pontuação de 0 a 5 pontos, compatível co: Score 0-5 points, consistent with low fall risk.
translations.• Implementar medidas padrão de seguranç:
• Implement standard safety and fall prevention measures
• Reassess per institutional protocol and after changes in clinical status
translations.Pontuação de 6 a 13 pontos, compatível c: Score 6-13 points, consistent with moderate fall risk.
translations.• Implementar protocolo de prevenção de:
• Implement moderate-risk fall prevention protocol
• Indicate fall risk at bedside and in medical record
• Reassess periodically
translations.Pontuação maior que 13 pontos, compatíve: Score greater than 13 points, consistent with high fall risk.
translations.• Implementar protocolo intensivo de pre:
• Implement intensive fall prevention protocol (frequent supervision, alarm devices, bed in low position)
• Involve multidisciplinary team in care plan
• Educate patient and family on prevention measures
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas, que: Increased susceptibility to falls, which may cause physical harm and compromise health, identified by risk factors assessed in JHFRAT.
translations.Limitação no movimento físico independen: Limitation in independent physical movement, related to mobility deficits identified on the scale.
translations.Início súbito ou deterioração progressiv: Sudden onset or progressive deterioration of reversible disturbances in consciousness, attention, cognition, and perception, related to cognition items on the scale.
translations.Escore JHFRAT avaliado na admissão e rea: JHFRAT score assessed at admission and reassessed periodically
translations.Medidas de prevenção implementadas confo: Prevention measures implemented according to identified risk category
translations.Aplicar a JHFRAT na admissão e reavaliar: Apply JHFRAT on admission and reassess per institutional protocol and changes in clinical status
translations.Verificar condições de alto risco automá: Check for automatic high-risk conditions (more than one fall in 6 months, fall during hospitalization, special precautions) before applying the numeric score
translations.Implementar medidas de prevenção proporc: Implement prevention measures proportional to risk category (low, moderate, high)
translations.Revisar medicamentos de alto risco de qu: Review high-risk fall medications with medical team/pharmacy
translations.Orientar paciente e família sobre uso de: Educate patient and family on use of appropriate footwear, call bell, and requesting assistance to ambulate
translations.A JHFRAT soma pontos de 7 categorias — i: JHFRAT sums points from 7 categories — age, fall history, elimination, medications, care equipment, mobility (3 items), and cognition (3 items) — totaling a score that can range from 0 to 35 points in this calculator (excluding automatic high/low-risk classification criteria).
translations.Desenvolvida pelo Johns Hopkins Health S: Developed by the Johns Hopkins Health System Corporation in 2007, it is widely used in hospitals in the United States and other countries as a standardized fall risk assessment tool for hospitalized patients.
translations.Validada em estudos comparativos com out: Validated in comparative studies with other fall risk scales (such as the Morse Scale), with adequate sensitivity and specificity for risk screening in the hospital setting.
translations.Antes de calcular o escore numérico, dev: Before calculating the numeric score, check automatic classification criteria: history of more than one fall in 6 months, fall during current hospitalization, or patient considered high risk per protocol (e.g., seizure precautions) automatically classify the patient as high risk, regardless of score. Complete paralysis or total immobilization classify as low risk. This numeric calculator does not replace that initial screening.
translations.Antes de calcular o escore numérico, ver: Before calculating the numeric score, check automatic classification criteria: more than one fall in 6 months, fall during current hospitalization, or special precautions (e.g., seizure) automatically classify the patient as High Risk.
translations.Paralisia completa ou imobilização total: Complete paralysis or total immobilization automatically classify the patient as Low Risk, without needing to calculate the numeric score.
translations.Os itens de mobilidade e cognição são de: Mobility and cognition items are multiple selection — all present factors should be summed, not just the highest scoring one.
translations.O item 'sedação nas últimas 24 horas' na: The item 'sedation in the last 24 hours' in the medications category is worth 7 points, the highest individual weight among all scale items.
translations.Quantas categorias compõem a JHFRAT?: How many categories make up the JHFRAT?
translations.A JHFRAT avalia 7 categorias: idade, his: JHFRAT assesses 7 categories: age, fall history, elimination, medications, care equipment, mobility, and cognition.
translations.O que acontece se o paciente tiver histó: What happens if the patient has a history of more than one fall in the last 6 months before admission?
translations.É automaticamente classificado como Alto: Automatically classified as High Risk, without needing to calculate the score
translations.Ganha apenas 5 pontos na categoria histó: Gains only 5 points in the fall history category
translations.Segundo a JHFRAT, histórico de mais de u: According to JHFRAT, history of more than one fall in 6 months automatically classifies the patient as High Risk, regardless of the numeric score.
translations.Os itens de mobilidade e cognição da JHF: Are the mobility and cognition items of JHFRAT single or multiple selection?
translations.Seleção única (apenas 1 item pode ser ma: Single selection (only 1 item can be marked)
translations.Seleção múltipla (todos os fatores prese: Multiple selection (all present factors are summed)
translations.Não se aplicam pontos a esses itens: No points apply to these items
translations.Os itens de mobilidade (3 fatores) e cog: The mobility items (3 factors) and cognition items (3 factors) are multiple selection — all factors present in the patient must be summed.
translations.A JHFRAT numérica substitui a triagem in: Does the numeric JHFRAT replace the automatic high/low risk initial screening?
translations.Não. Antes de calcular o escore numérico: No. Before calculating the numeric score, always check the automatic classification criteria (history of more than one fall in 6 months, fall during current hospitalization, special precautions, or complete paralysis/immobilization). These criteria take precedence over the numeric calculation presented in this calculator.
translations.Qual a diferença entre a JHFRAT e a Esca: What is the difference between JHFRAT and the Morse Scale?
translations.Ambas avaliam risco de queda em paciente: Both assess fall risk in hospitalized patients, but use different categories and weights. Comparative studies show similar psychometric performance between the two scales, and the choice usually depends on the adopted institutional protocol.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Johns Hopkins: How the Johns Hopkins Scale (JHFRAT) works
translations.<p>A JHFRAT soma pontos de 7 categorias:
JHFRAT sums points from 7 categories — age, fall history, elimination, medications, care equipment, mobility, and cognition — totaling up to 35 points in this calculator.

Quick guide: 0-5 = Low risk | 6-13 = Moderate risk | >13 = High risk. Automatic classification criteria (history of multiple falls, fall during hospitalization, complete immobilization) take precedence over the numeric score.

translations.5 — Uso de 2 ou mais medicamentos de alt: 5 — Use of 2 or more high-risk fall medications
translations.7 — Procedimento com sedação nas últimas: 7 — Procedure with sedation in the last 24 hours
translations.Avaliar objetivamente o risco de queda e: Objectively assess fall risk in hospitalized patients, based on 7 categories: age, fall history, elimination, medications, care equipment, mobility, and cognition. Indicated for fall risk assessment in adult hospitalized patients, at admission and periodic reassessment per institutional protocol.

translations.A Escala de Coma de Jouvet é um instrume: The Jouvet Coma Scale is an instrument used to assess a patient's level of consciousness, especially in cases of coma induced by neurological diseases or persistent vegetative states. It focuses on evaluating the patient's perceptiveness and reactivity, both to cortical and brainstem stimuli. Unlike the Glasgow Coma Scale, the Jouvet scale is more commonly used to assess patients in deeper states of altered consciousness, such as coma.
translations.Perceptividade, Reatividade\nInespecífic: Perceptiveness, Nonspecific Reactivity, Specific Reactivity to Pain, and Autonomic Reactivity.
translations.Médicos intensivistas, neurologistas e\n: Intensivists, neurologists, and intensive care nurses.

translations.Classifique a capacidade funcional do pa: Classify the patient's functional capacity using the Karnofsky Performance Status (KPS), from 0 to 100. Includes interpretation, nursing care, and evidence for oncology and palliative care.
translations.Classificar de forma detalhada a capacid: To classify in detail the patient's functional capacity on a scale from 0 to 100, guiding therapeutic and prognostic decisions, especially in oncology and palliative care.
translations.Indicada para pacientes oncológicos e em: Indicated for oncology and palliative care patients, as a parameter for therapeutic decision-making, clinical trial eligibility, and follow-up assessment.
translations.Normal, sem queixas, sem evidência de do: Normal, no complaints, no evidence of disease.
translations.Capaz de realizar atividades normais, co: Able to perform normal activities, with minimal signs/symptoms of disease.
translations.Atividade normal com esforço; alguns sin: Normal activity with effort; some signs/symptoms of disease.
translations.70 — Cuida de Si, Incapaz de Trabalho At: 70 — Cares for Self, Unable to Work Actively
translations.Cuida de si mesmo, mas incapaz de realiz: Cares for self, but unable to perform normal activity or active work.
translations.Requer assistência ocasional, mas é capa: Requires occasional assistance but is able to care for most personal needs.
translations.Requer assistência considerável e cuidad: Requires considerable assistance and frequent medical care.
translations.Incapacitado, requer cuidado e assistênc: Disabled, requires special care and assistance.
translations.Totalmente incapacitado, hospitalização: Severely disabled, hospitalization indicated although death not imminent.
translations.Muito doente, hospitalização necessária,: Very ill, hospitalization necessary, active supportive treatment needed.
translations.Paciente capaz de realizar atividades no: Patient able to perform normal activities, no special care needed. Generally a candidate for active oncology treatment at full dose.
translations.Incapaz de Trabalhar, Cuida da Maioria d: Unable to Work, Cares for Most Needs
translations.Paciente incapaz de trabalhar, vive em c: Patient unable to work, lives at home and cares for most personal needs, but requires varying degrees of assistance.
translations.• Avaliação multiprofissional para defin:
• Multidisciplinary assessment for therapeutic definition
• Consider home/social support as needed
• Individualized risk-benefit assessment of active treatments
translations.Paciente incapaz de cuidar de si mesmo,: Patient unable to care for self, requiring institutional or hospital equivalent care. Disease may be progressing rapidly.
translations.• Priorizar discussão sobre objetivos de:
• Prioritize discussion of care goals
• Consider associated palliative approach
• Intensive multidisciplinary support
translations.Avaliar a capacidade funcional com escal: Assess functional capacity with validated scale (Karnofsky)
translations.A Escala de Karnofsky foi desenvolvida p: The Karnofsky Performance Status was developed by David Karnofsky in 1949, classifying the patient's functional capacity on a scale from 0 (death) to 100 (normal, no complaints), in increments of 10 points, being one of the oldest and most widely used instruments in oncology.
translations.Amplamente adotada em oncologia e cuidad: Widely adopted in oncology and palliative care for therapeutic decisions, prognosis, and clinical trial eligibility, serving as a historical reference that predates simpler scales such as ECOG.
translations.Apresenta boa correlação com prognóstico: Shows good correlation with prognosis and survival in various oncologic conditions, being extensively validated and used in international literature for decades.
translations.Por ser mais granular (11 categorias) qu: Because it is more granular (11 categories) than the ECOG (6 categories), it may present greater interobserver variability in the exact choice of category. The choice between Karnofsky and ECOG often depends on the institutional protocol or the clinical trial in question.
translations.Avalie a capacidade funcional real obser: Assess the actual observed functional capacity, not the patient's perceived or desired capacity.
translations.Reavalie o KPS a cada consulta ou ciclo: Reassess the KPS at each visit or cycle of oncologic treatment to monitor progression.
translations.Use em conjunto com o ECOG quando o prot: Use in conjunction with ECOG when the institutional protocol requires both scales.
translations.O KPS é frequentemente utilizado como cr: KPS is often used as a prognostic criterion in palliative care.
translations.Qual a faixa de valores da Escala de Kar: What is the range of values for the Karnofsky Scale?
translations.A Escala de Karnofsky varia de 0 (óbito): The Karnofsky Scale ranges from 0 (death) to 100 (normal, no complaints), in increments of 10 points.
translations.Um KPS de 30 a 10 indica qual categoria: A KPS of 30 to 10 indicates which general category?
translations.Capaz de atividade normal: Able to carry on normal activity
translations.Incapaz de trabalhar, mas cuida de si: Unable to work, but cares for self
translations.Incapaz de cuidar de si mesmo, requer cu: Unable to care for self, requires institutional/hospital care
translations.A faixa de 10 a 40 pontos indica que o p: The range of 10 to 40 points indicates that the patient is unable to care for themselves, requiring institutional or equivalent hospital care.
translations.Qual a principal diferença entre a Escal: What is the main difference between the Karnofsky Scale and ECOG?
translations.Karnofsky tem mais categorias (11, incre: Karnofsky has more categories (11, increments of 10) than ECOG (6, from 0 to 5)
translations.Karnofsky não é usado em oncologia: Karnofsky is not used in oncology
translations.A Karnofsky oferece maior granularidade: Karnofsky offers greater granularity (11 categories, from 0 to 100 in increments of 10) compared to ECOG (6 categories, from 0 to 5).
translations.Qual escala é mais utilizada, Karnofsky: Which scale is more commonly used, Karnofsky or ECOG?
translations.Ambas são amplamente utilizadas; a escol: Both are widely used; the choice often depends on the institutional protocol or the clinical trial in question. ECOG is simpler to apply, while Karnofsky offers greater granularity.
translations.A Escala de Karnofsky substitui a avalia: Does the Karnofsky Scale replace a complete clinical assessment?
translations.<p>A Escala de Karnofsky classifica a ca:
The Karnofsky Scale classifies the patient's functional capacity into 11 categories, from 0 (death) to 100 (normal, no complaints), in increments of 10 points, guiding decisions on eligibility and intensity of oncologic treatment and palliative care.

Quick guide: 80-100 = Able to carry on normal activity | 50-70 = Unable to work, cares for self | 10-40 = Unable to care for self | 0 = Death.

translations.Classificar de forma detalhada a capacid: To classify in detail the patient's functional capacity, on a scale from 0 to 100, guiding therapeutic and prognostic decisions, especially in oncology and palliative care. Indicated for oncologic and palliative care patients, as a parameter for therapeutic decision-making, eligibility for clinical trials, and follow-up.
translations.80–100: Capaz de Atividade Normal: 80–100: Able to Carry on Normal Activity
translations.50–70: Incapaz de Trabalhar, Cuida da Ma: 50–70: Unable to Work, Cares for Most Needs

translations.A Escala de Karnofsky classifica a capac: The Karnofsky Performance Status Scale classifies the patient's functional ability into 11 categories, from 0 (death) to 100 (normal, no complaints), in 10-point increments, guiding decisions on eligibility and intensity of oncologic treatment and palliative care.
translations.80-100 = Capaz de atividade normal | 50-: 80-100 = Able to carry on normal activity | 50-70 = Unable to work, cares for self | 10-40 = Unable to care for self | 0 = Death.
translations.Índice de Katz - Atividades de Vida Diár: Katz Index of Independence in Activities of Daily Living (ADLs)
translations.Calcule o Índice de Katz para avaliação: Calculate the Katz Index to assess functional independence in basic activities of daily living. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o grau de independência funciona: Assess the patient's degree of functional independence in 6 basic activities of daily living (ADLs).
translations.Indicada para pacientes idosos, em reabi: Indicated for elderly patients, those in rehabilitation, or any context requiring assessment of functional capacity for basic self-care activities.
translations.Pacientes idosos ou com limitações funci: Elderly patients or those with functional limitations in hospital, outpatient, or home settings.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para tomar banho em m: Needs help bathing more than one body part.
translations.Toma banho sozinho, podendo necessitar d: Bathes self independently, may need help with only one body part.
translations.Capacidade de escolher roupas e vestir-s: Ability to choose clothes and dress without assistance.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para se vestir ou per: Needs help dressing or remains partially/totally undressed.
translations.Pega as roupas e veste-se completamente: Gets clothes and dresses completely without help (except tying shoes).
translations.Capacidade de ir ao banheiro, higienizar: Ability to go to the toilet, clean oneself, and adjust clothing without assistance.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para ir ao banheiro,: Needs help going to the toilet, cleaning oneself, or uses bedpan/urinal.
translations.Vai ao banheiro, higieniza-se e ajeita a: Goes to toilet, cleans self, and adjusts clothes without help.
translations.Capacidade de se movimentar da cama para: Ability to move from bed to chair and back.
translations.Necessita de ajuda para se mover da cama: Needs help moving from bed to chair, or is bedridden.
translations.Move-se da cama para a cadeira e vice-ve: Moves from bed to chair and back without help.
translations.Incontinência parcial ou total, ou neces: Partial or total incontinence, or needs enemas/catheters/diapers.
Complete control over urine and feces.
translations.Necessita de ajuda parcial/total para se: Needs partial/total help with feeding, or uses tube/parenteral nutrition.
translations.Alimenta-se sem ajuda (exceto cortar car: Feeds self without help (except cutting meat or buttering bread).
translations.Grande dependência funcional. Paciente n: Severe functional dependence. Patient requires substantial or total assistance with most basic activities of daily living.
translations.• Plano de cuidados individualizado\n• A:
• Individualized care plan
• Multidisciplinary assessment
• Caregiver support
• Prevention of complications from immobility
translations.Dependência parcial. Paciente necessita: Partial dependence. Patient needs help with some activities but maintains independence in others.
translations.• Estímulo à independência residual\n• F:
• Encourage residual independence
• Physical/occupational therapy
• Periodic reassessment
translations.Paciente independente ou com dependência: Patient is independent or minimally dependent in basic activities of daily living.
translations.• Manter estímulo à autonomia\n• Reavali:
• Maintain encouragement of autonomy
• Periodic reassessment per protocol
translations.O Índice de Katz foi desenvolvido por Si: The Katz Index was developed by Sidney Katz and colleagues in 1963 to assess functional independence of elderly individuals in 6 basic activities of daily living: bathing, dressing, toileting, transfer, continence, and feeding.
translations.Um dos instrumentos mais utilizados mund: One of the most widely used instruments in geriatrics and gerontology for functional assessment, serving as a basis for many subsequent functional capacity scales.
translations.Amplamente validado em populações idosas: Extensively validated in hospitalized, institutionalized, and community-dwelling elderly populations, with good interobserver reliability.
translations.Avalia apenas atividades básicas de vida: Assesses only basic activities of daily living (ADLs), not instrumental activities (IADLs) such as telephone use, financial management, or meal preparation—for these, the Lawton Scale is recommended.
translations.Avalie o desempenho real do paciente, nã: Assess the patient's actual performance, not their theoretical ability.
translations.Combine com a Escala de Lawton para aval: Combine with the Lawton Scale to assess instrumental activities (IADLs).
translations.Reavalie após intercorrências clínicas o: Reassess after clinical events or changes in functional status.
translations.Considere sempre o contexto domiciliar/s: Always consider the patient's home/social context in the interpretation.
translations.Quantas atividades de vida diária o Índi: How many activities of daily living does the Katz Index assess?
translations.O Índice de Katz avalia 6 AVDs: banho, v: The Katz Index assesses 6 ADLs: bathing, dressing, toileting, transferring, continence, and feeding.
translations.Um escore de 5-6 pontos no Índice de Kat: A score of 5-6 on the Katz Index indicates what level of functionality?
translations.Escores de 5-6 pontos indicam independên: Scores of 5-6 indicate independence or minimal dependence in basic ADLs.
translations.O Índice de Katz avalia atividades instr: Does the Katz Index assess instrumental activities such as managing finances?
translations.Sim, é o foco principal: Yes, it is the main focus
translations.Não, avalia apenas AVDs básicas: No, it only assesses basic ADLs
translations.O Katz avalia apenas atividades básicas: The Katz assesses only basic activities of daily living. For instrumental activities, use the Lawton Scale.
translations.Qual a diferença entre o Índice de Katz: What is the difference between the Katz Index and the Lawton Scale?
translations.O Katz avalia atividades básicas de vida: The Katz assesses basic activities of daily living (bathing, dressing, hygiene, transferring, continence, feeding), while the Lawton Scale assesses more complex instrumental activities (telephone, shopping, finances, transportation, medication).
translations.O Índice de Katz pode ser usado em qualq: Can the Katz Index be used at any age?
translations.Foi desenvolvido e validado principalmen: It was developed and validated mainly for the elderly population, but can be applied to any adult with suspected functional impairment.
translations.<p>O Índice de Katz avalia 6 atividades:
The Katz Index assesses 6 basic activities of daily living — bathing, dressing, toileting, transferring, continence, and feeding — classifying each as independent (1 point) or dependent (0 points). The sum ranges from 0 to 6 points.

Quick guide: 5-6 = Independence | 3-4 = Moderate dependence | 0-2 = Severe dependence.

translations.O Índice de Katz avalia 6 atividades bás: The Katz Index assesses 6 basic activities of daily living — bathing, dressing, toileting, transferring, continence, and feeding — classifying each as independent (1 point) or dependent (0 points). The sum ranges from 0 to 6 points.

translations.Calcule a Escala LANSS (Leeds Assessment: Calculate the LANSS (Leeds Assessment of Neuropathic Symptoms and Signs) scale to identify predominantly neuropathic pain. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Identificar se um quadro de dor crônica: To identify whether a chronic pain condition has a predominantly neuropathic mechanism, combining 5 questionnaire items on symptoms and 2 clinical sensory examination items (allodynia and altered pinprick threshold).
translations.Indicada para pacientes com dor crônica: Indicated for patients with chronic pain of any origin, to differentiate predominantly neuropathic pain from nociceptive pain, aiding therapeutic choice.
translations.Adultos com dor crônica (ex: neuropatia: Adults with chronic pain (e.g., diabetic neuropathy, post-stroke pain, cancer pain, chronic low back pain, complex regional pain syndrome).
translations.A dor causa sensações estranhas e desagr: Does the pain cause strange, unpleasant sensations in the skin, such as tingling, pricking, or pins and needles?
translations.A dor faz a pele da área afetada parecer: Does the pain make the skin in the affected area look different from normal (mottled, redder, or pinker)?
translations.A pele afetada fica anormalmente sensíve: Is the affected skin abnormally sensitive to touch (discomfort from light brushing or wearing tight clothes)?
translations.A dor surge de forma súbita e em crises,: Does the pain come on suddenly and in attacks for no apparent reason, even at rest (like electric shocks, stabbing)?
translations.A dor parece vir acompanhada de alteraçã: Does the pain seem to be accompanied by an abnormal change in skin temperature in the affected area (hot, burning)?
translations.Comparar a resposta ao roçar levemente u: Compare the response to lightly brushing a cotton swab on the non-painful area and then on the painful area.
translations.Ausente - sensação normal em ambas as ár: Absent - normal sensation in both areas
translations.Presente - dor/desconforto apenas na áre: Present - pain/discomfort only in the painful area (5 points)
translations.Comparar a resposta a uma picada de agul: Compare the response to a pinprick (23G needle) on the non-painful area and then on the painful area.
translations.Ausente - sensação igual em ambas as áre: Absent - equal sensation in both areas
translations.Presente - limiar alterado na área dolor: Present - altered threshold in the painful area (3 points)
translations.Pontuação abaixo de 12 pontos, sugerindo: Score below 12 points, suggesting that neuropathic mechanisms probably do not contribute predominantly to the pain.
translations.• Investigar outras causas de dor nocice:
• Investigate other causes of nociceptive pain
• Consider therapeutic approach directed at the identified cause
• Reassess if pain characteristics change
translations.Pontuação de 12 pontos ou mais, sugerind: Score of 12 points or more, suggesting that neuropathic mechanisms probably contribute predominantly to the pain.
translations.• Considerar abordagem terapêutica espec:
• Consider specific therapeutic approach for neuropathic pain (e.g., anticonvulsants, tricyclic antidepressants, as prescribed)
• Refer for specialized pain/neurology evaluation
• Reassess treatment response periodically
translations.Experiência sensorial e emocional desagr: Unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential tissue damage, or described in such terms, with gradual or sudden onset, mild to intense intensity, constant or recurrent, without anticipated or predictable end.
translations.Mudança na quantidade ou no padrão de es: Change in the amount or pattern of stimuli received, accompanied by a diminished, exaggerated, distorted, or impaired response to such stimuli, related to sensory changes identified on examination.
translations.Escore LANSS avaliado para caracterizar: LANSS score assessed to characterize the predominant pain mechanism
translations.Terapêutica ajustada conforme o mecanism: Therapy adjusted according to identified pain mechanism (neuropathic vs. nociceptive)
translations.Redução da intensidade da dor relatada a: Reduction in reported pain intensity after targeted intervention
translations.Aplicar a LANSS combinando questionário: Apply the LANSS by combining the symptom questionnaire and sensory examination (allodynia and needle-prick threshold)
translations.Comunicar à equipe médica a suspeita de: Communicate to the medical team the suspicion of neuropathic mechanism when the score is ≥12
translations.Colaborar na introdução de terapêutica e: Collaborate in the introduction of specific therapy for neuropathic pain as prescribed
translations.Orientar o paciente sobre a natureza da: Educate the patient about the nature of neuropathic pain and treatment expectations
translations.Reavaliar periodicamente a resposta ao t: Periodically reassess the response to the instituted treatment
translations.A LANSS combina 5 itens de questionário: The LANSS combines 5 questionnaire items on sensory symptoms (weighted 1 to 5 points) and 2 clinical sensory examination items — allodynia (5 points) and altered needle-prick threshold (3 points) — totaling a maximum score of 24 points.
translations.Desenvolvida por Michael Bennett em 2001: Developed by Michael Bennett in 2001 in Leeds (United Kingdom), it was one of the first validated instruments to clinically differentiate neuropathic pain from nociceptive pain at the bedside, without the need for additional tests.
translations.Validada em diversas condições de dor cr: Validated in various chronic pain conditions, including cancer pain and chronic low back pain, with sensitivity between 82-91% and specificity between 80-94% for identifying predominantly neuropathic pain.
translations.Ferramentas de rastreio como a LANSS pod: Screening tools like the LANSS may fail to identify 10-20% of patients with neuropathic pain, making it essential to combine clinical judgment and complete physical examination findings with the scale score.
translations.Diferente de muitas escalas, os itens da: Unlike many scales, LANSS items have different weights (1, 2, 3, or 5 points), not a uniform score — pay attention to the weight of each positive item.
translations.Os 2 itens de exame físico (alodinia e l: The 2 physical examination items (allodynia and needle-prick threshold) require comparison between the painful area and a non-painful/contralateral area of the patient.
translations.Um escore igual ou maior que 12 sugere m: A score equal to or greater than 12 suggests a predominant neuropathic mechanism, guiding the choice of specific therapy (e.g., anticonvulsants, antidepressants).
translations.A LANSS não substitui o julgamento clíni: The LANSS does not replace clinical judgment — about 10-20% of patients with neuropathic pain may not be identified by the screening tool alone.
translations.Qual a pontuação de corte da LANSS para: What is the LANSS cutoff score to suggest a predominant neuropathic mechanism?
translations.Uma pontuação igual ou superior a 12 pon: A score equal to or greater than 12 points suggests that neuropathic mechanisms probably contribute predominantly to the pain.
translations.Os itens da LANSS têm todos o mesmo peso: Do all LANSS items have the same score weight?
translations.Não, os pesos variam de 1 a 5 pontos con: No, weights vary from 1 to 5 points per item
translations.Não, apenas os itens de exame físico têm: No, only the physical examination items have weight
translations.Diferentemente de escalas com pontuação: Unlike scales with uniform scoring, LANSS items have different weights (1, 2, 3, or 5 points), reflecting the strength of association of each symptom/sign with neuropathic pain.
translations.Quais são os 2 itens de exame clínico (e: What are the 2 clinical examination items (not just questionnaire) of the LANSS?
translations.A LANSS inclui 2 itens de exame físico s: The LANSS includes 2 sensory physical examination items: presence of allodynia (pain to light touch) and altered needle-prick threshold, comparing the painful area with a non-painful area.
translations.A LANSS pode ser aplicada sem o exame fí: Can the LANSS be applied without the physical examination (only the questionnaire)?
translations.A versão original da LANSS inclui obriga: The original LANSS version mandatorily includes the 2 physical examination items (allodynia and needle-prick threshold). There is a self-report version without physical examination, called S-LANSS, but with slightly lower sensitivity than the original version.
translations.Um escore baixo na LANSS exclui completa: Does a low LANSS score completely exclude the presence of neuropathic pain?
translations.Não totalmente. Ferramentas de rastreio: Not entirely. Screening tools like LANSS may fail to identify 10-20% of patients with neuropathic pain, making it essential to combine the scale result with clinical judgment and a detailed patient history.
translations.<p>A LANSS soma pesos variáveis (1 a 5 p:
The LANSS sums variable weights (1 to 5 points) from 5 symptom items and 2 physical examination items (allodynia and altered pinprick threshold), totaling up to 24 points.

Quick guide: <12 = Neuropathic mechanism unlikely | ≥12 = Neuropathic mechanism likely.
translations.Escala LANSS - Avaliação de Dor Neuropát: LANSS Scale - Neuropathic Pain Assessment | Nursing Calculators
translations.Escala LANSS: cálculo, fundamentação e e: LANSS Scale: Calculation, Rationale, and Evidence
translations.0 — Ausente - sensação normal em ambas a: 0 — Absent - normal sensation in both areas
translations.5 — Presente - dor/desconforto apenas na: 5 — Present - pain/discomfort only in the painful area (5 points)
translations.0 — Ausente - sensação igual em ambas as: 0 — Absent - equal sensation in both areas
translations.3 — Presente - limiar alterado na área d: 3 — Present - altered threshold in the painful area (3 points)
translations.Identificar se um quadro de dor crônica: To identify whether a chronic pain condition has a predominant neuropathic mechanism, combining 5 questionnaire items on symptoms and 2 clinical sensory examination items (allodynia and altered pinprick threshold). Indicated for patients with chronic pain of any origin to differentiate predominantly neuropathic pain from nociceptive pain, aiding in therapeutic choice.
translations.BENNETT, M. The LANSS Pain Scale: the Le: BENNETT, M. The LANSS Pain Scale: the Leeds Assessment of Neuropathic Symptoms and Signs. Pain, v. 92, n. 1-2, p. 147-157, 2001.
translations.BENNETT, M. I. et al. Using screening to: BENNETT, M. I. et al. Using screening tools to identify neuropathic pain. Pain, v. 127, n. 3, p. 199-203, 2007.
translations.SOCIEDADE BRASILEIRA PARA O ESTUDO DA DO: SOCIEDADE BRASILEIRA PARA O ESTUDO DA DOR. Diretrizes para o diagnóstico e tratamento da dor neuropática. São Paulo: SBED, 2021.
translations.A LANSS soma pesos variáveis (1 a 5 pont: The LANSS sums variable weights (1 to 5 points) from 5 symptom items and 2 physical examination items (allodynia and altered pinprick threshold), totaling up to 24 points.
translations.12 = Mecanismo neuropático improvável |: <12 = Neuropathic mechanism unlikely | ≥12 = Neuropathic mechanism likely.
translations.Escala de Lawton - Atividades Instrument: Lawton Scale - Instrumental Activities of Daily Living (IADLs)
translations.Calcule a Escala de Lawton para avaliaçã: Calculate the Lawton Scale for assessing independence in instrumental activities of daily living (IADLs). Includes interpretation, nursing diagnosis, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o grau de independência do pacie: Assess the patient's degree of independence in 8 instrumental activities of daily living (IADLs), which are more complex than basic activities assessed by the Katz Index.
translations.Indicada para pacientes idosos ou com su: Indicated for elderly patients or those with suspected functional impairment, as a complement to the assessment of basic activities of daily living (Katz/Barthel).
translations.Pacientes idosos ou adultos com suspeita: Elderly patients or adults with suspected functional impairment, seen in outpatient, home, or hospital settings.
translations.Capacidade de usar o telefone de forma i: Ability to use the telephone independently.
translations.Não usa o telefone ou necessita de ajuda: Does not use the telephone or requires total assistance.
translations.Usa o telefone por iniciativa própria, p: Uses the telephone on own initiative, looks up and dials numbers.
translations.Incapaz de fazer compras, ou necessita d: Unable to shop, or requires accompaniment on any shopping trip.
translations.Faz compras pequenas ou todas as compras: Does small shopping or all necessary shopping independently.
translations.Capacidade de planejar e preparar refeiç: Ability to plan and prepare adequate meals independently.
translations.Necessita que as refeições sejam prepara: Needs meals prepared and served by another person.
translations.Planeja, prepara e serve refeições adequ: Plans, prepares, and serves adequate meals independently.
translations.Capacidade de realizar tarefas doméstica: Ability to perform housekeeping tasks independently.
translations.Não participa de nenhuma tarefa doméstic: Does not participate in any housekeeping tasks.
translations.Mantém a casa sozinho ou com ajuda ocasi: Maintains the house alone or with occasional help for heavy tasks.
translations.Toda a roupa deve ser lavada por outra p: All laundry must be done by another person.
translations.Lava roupas pequenas ou toda a roupa pes: Washes small items or all personal laundry independently.
translations.Capacidade de se deslocar de forma indep: Ability to travel independently using some mode of transportation.
translations.Não viaja, ou necessita de acompanhante: Does not travel, or requires accompaniment on any trip.
translations.Viaja de forma independente em transport: Travels independently on public transportation or drives own car.
translations.Capacidade de tomar seus medicamentos co: Ability to take medications correctly, in the right doses and at the right times.
translations.Não é capaz de tomar seus medicamentos s: Is not able to take medications without supervision.
translations.É responsável pelo uso correto dos medic: Is responsible for correct medication use, in the right doses and at the right times.
translations.Capacidade de gerenciar suas próprias fi: Ability to manage own finances independently.
translations.Incapaz de lidar com dinheiro ou necessi: Unable to handle money or requires total help with finances.
translations.Grande dependência para atividades instr: High dependence for instrumental activities of daily living. Requires substantial support in the home environment.
translations.• Avaliação multiprofissional\n• Plano d:
• Multidisciplinary assessment
• Individualized care plan with caregiver support
• Assess home environment safety
translations.Dependência parcial em atividades instru: Partial dependence in instrumental activities, requiring assistance with some complex tasks.
translations.• Estímulo à independência residual\n• S:
• Encourage residual independence
• Family/social support for compromised activities
• Periodic reassessment
translations.Independência ou dependência mínima nas: Independence or minimal dependence in the assessed instrumental activities of daily living.
translations.Incapacidade de manter de forma independ: Inability to independently maintain a safe and growth-promoting immediate domestic environment.
translations.Padrão de regulação e integração à vida: A pattern of regulating and integrating into daily living a therapeutic regimen for treatment of illness that can be strengthened.
translations.Autocuidado: atividades instrumentais de: Self-care: instrumental activities of daily living
translations.Avaliar capacidade funcional para ativid: Assess functional capacity for instrumental activities
translations.Orientar sobre uso correto e seguro de m: Educate on correct and safe medication use
translations.Envolver família/cuidador no planejament: Involve family/caregiver in planning necessary support
translations.A Escala de Lawton foi desenvolvida por: The Lawton Scale was developed by M. Powell Lawton and Elaine Brody in 1969, assessing an individual's ability to perform instrumental activities of daily living (IADLs), which are more complex than basic self-care activities evaluated by the Katz Index.
translations.Amplamente utilizada em geriatria e gero: Widely used in geriatrics and gerontology as a complement to Katz, providing a more complete assessment of the elderly's functionality, especially relevant for decisions about need for home support or institutionalization.
translations.Validada em diversas populações, com boa: Validated in various populations, with good interobserver reliability, widely used in comprehensive geriatric assessments.
translations.Pode ser influenciada por fatores cultur: May be influenced by cultural and gender factors in the original version (some tasks historically assigned differently between men and women); the simplified and dichotomized version used in this calculator is the most commonly adopted in current clinical practice, applied equally to both sexes.
translations.Combine sempre com o Índice de Katz para: Always combine with the Katz Index for a complete functional assessment (basic ADLs + IADLs).
translations.Avalie o desempenho real observado ou re: Assess actual observed or reported performance, not the patient's theoretical ability.
translations.A dependência em AIVDs geralmente preced: Dependence in IADLs usually precedes dependence in basic ADLs in the functional decline process.
translations.Reavalie periodicamente, especialmente a: Reassess periodically, especially after clinical events.
translations.Quantas atividades instrumentais de vida: How many instrumental activities of daily living does the Lawton Scale assess?
translations.A Escala de Lawton avalia 8 AIVDs: telef: The Lawton Scale assesses 8 IADLs: telephone, shopping, meal preparation, housekeeping, laundry, transportation, medications, and finances.
translations.Qual a diferença entre AVDs e AIVDs?: What is the difference between ADLs and IADLs?
translations.AVDs são atividades básicas de autocuida: ADLs are basic self-care activities; IADLs are more complex independent living activities
translations.AVDs (avaliadas pelo Katz/Barthel) são a: ADLs (assessed by Katz/Barthel) are basic self-care activities; IADLs (assessed by Lawton) are more complex activities necessary to live independently in the community.
translations.Qual escala geralmente é combinada com o: Which scale is usually combined with Lawton for a complete functional assessment?
translations.O Lawton avalia AIVDs, enquanto o Katz e: Lawton assesses IADLs, while Katz and Barthel assess basic ADLs — together, they provide a complete view of the patient's functionality.
translations.A dependência em AIVDs é mais grave que: Is dependence in IADLs more severe than in ADLs?
translations.Não necessariamente mais grave, mas gera: Not necessarily more severe, but it usually appears earlier in the functional decline process. Loss of independence in IADLs (complex activities) often precedes loss of independence in basic ADLs (self-care).
translations.A Escala de Lawton pode ser aplicada por: Can the Lawton Scale be administered by family members?
translations.Sim, especialmente em pacientes com défi: Yes, especially in patients with cognitive impairment, information can be obtained from a caregiver or family member who knows the patient's routine well, complementing self-assessment when possible.
translations.<p>A Escala de Lawton avalia 8 atividade:
The Lawton Scale assesses 8 instrumental activities of daily living — telephone use, shopping, meal preparation, housekeeping, laundry, transportation, responsibility for medications, and handling finances — classifying each as independent (1 point) or dependent (0 points). The sum ranges from 0 to 8 points.

Quick guide: 6-8 = Independence | 3-5 = Moderate dependence | 0-2 = Severe dependence.
translations.Escala de Lawton - Atividades Instrument: Lawton Scale - Instrumental Activities of Daily Living (IADLs) | Nursing Calculators
translations.Escala de Lawton: cálculo, fundamentação: Lawton Scale: Calculation, Rationale, and Evidence
translations.Avaliar o grau de independência do pacie: Assess the patient's degree of independence in 8 instrumental activities of daily living (IADLs), which are more complex than the basic activities assessed by the Katz Index. Indicated for elderly patients or those with suspected functional impairment, as a complement to the assessment of basic activities of daily living (Katz/Barthel).
translations.NANDA — Disposição para autocontrole da: NANDA — Readiness for Enhanced Self-Health Management
translations.NOC — Autocuidado: atividades instrument: NOC — Self-Care: Instrumental Activities of Daily Living
translations.LAWTON, M. P.; BRODY, E. M. Assessment o: LAWTON, M. P.; BRODY, E. M. Assessment of older people: self-maintaining and instrumental activities of daily living. The Gerontologist, v. 9, n. 3, p. 179-186, 1969.
translations.SANTOS, R. L.; VIRTUOSO JÚNIOR, J. S. Co: SANTOS, R. L.; VIRTUOSO JÚNIOR, J. S. Confiabilidade da versão brasileira da Escala de Atividades Instrumentais da Vida Diária. RBPS, v. 21, n. 4, 2008.
translations.A Escala de Lawton avalia 8 atividades i: The Lawton Scale assesses 8 instrumental activities of daily living — telephone use, shopping, food preparation, housekeeping, laundry, transportation, responsibility for own medications, and ability to handle finances — classifying each as independent (1 point) or dependent (0 points). The sum ranges from 0 to 8 points.
translations.Legislação de Enfermagem: Leis, Resoluçõ: Nursing Legislation: Laws, Resolutions, and Technical Opinions | Complete Guide

Nursing Legislation: Laws, Resolutions, and Technical Opinions | Complete Guide
 - Nursing Calculators
translations.IBSP - Instituto Brasileiro para a Segur: IBSP - Brazilian Institute for Patient Safety
translations.O que são Legislações e Pareceres Técnic: What are Legislation and Technical Opinions?
translations.Legislações de enfermagem são o conjunto: Nursing legislation is the set of laws, decrees, resolutions, and norms that regulate the nursing profession. Technical opinions are official documents prepared by competent entities that guide the professional practice of nurses. They clarify doubts about procedures, competencies, ethics, and legislation applicable to nursing. They are essential to ensure patient safety and the legality of acts performed by nursing professionals.
translations.Órgão regulador responsável pela vigilân: Regulatory body responsible for health surveillance in Brazil
translations.Este parecer técnico estabelece as diret: This technical opinion establishes guidelines and orientations for the proper functioning of the cold chain, responsible for the storage and conservation of immunobiologicals throughout the supply chain. The cold chain is essential to ensure the efficacy and safety of vaccines, maintaining controlled temperature from manufacturing to patient administration.
translations.Este documento apresenta as recomendaçõe: This document presents updated recommendations for the childhood vaccination schedule, including new vaccine additions to the National Immunization Program (PNI). The opinion guides health professionals on vaccination schedules, intervals between doses, contraindications, and special situations in the pediatric population.
translations.Orientações específicas para o calendári: Specific guidelines for the adolescent vaccination schedule, including immunizations such as HPV, meningococcal, hepatitis B, and necessary boosters. The document also addresses the importance of vaccination adherence in this age group and strategies to overcome access barriers.
translations.Este parecer técnico orienta sobre o cal: This technical opinion guides the recommended vaccination schedule for adults, including booster doses and vaccines specific to this age group. It addresses the importance of vaccination against influenza, pneumococcal, hepatitis B, and other vaccine-preventable diseases that predominantly affect adults and the elderly.
translations.Documento que estabelece as recomendaçõe: Document establishing specific vaccination recommendations for the elderly, a population more vulnerable to complications from infectious diseases. Includes guidance on vaccines such as influenza, pneumococcal, herpes zoster, and booster of other immunizations, considering immunosenescence and prevalent comorbidities in this age group.
translations.Parecer sobre Calendário Vacinal da Gest: Opinion on Pregnant Women Vaccination Schedule
translations.Este parecer técnico apresenta as diretr: This technical opinion presents guidelines for vaccination during pregnancy, protecting both mother and baby. Includes recommendations on vaccines such as influenza, hepatitis B, diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis (dTpa), in addition to guidance on contraindicated vaccines during this period.
translations.Órgão de fiscalização e regulamentação d: Body for inspection and regulation of the profession in the states
translations.Parecer COREN sobre Uso de Luvas na Apli: COREN Opinion on Use of Gloves for Injection Administration
translations.Este parecer técnico esclarece quando é: This technical opinion clarifies when glove use is mandatory during injectable medication administration. The document provides guidance on situations involving risk of exposure to body fluids, protection of the professional and patient, and correct hand hygiene practices when glove use is not indicated.
translations.Parecer COREN sobre Conferência do Carri: COREN Opinion on Emergency Cart Check
translations.Este documento estabelece os parâmetros: This document establishes parameters for systematic emergency cart checking, including frequency, nurse responsibilities, checklist of mandatory items, medications, and equipment. Proper checking is essential to ensure readiness for care in cardiopulmonary arrest situations.
translations.Este parecer técnico orienta sobre a com: This technical opinion provides guidance on the nurse's competence in performing endotracheal suctioning, including techniques, frequency, indications, contraindications, and complications. The document also addresses nursing prescription for this procedure and team training.
translations.Este documento esclarece as competências: This document clarifies the nurse's competencies in caring for patients on parenteral nutrition, including central venous access management, solution preparation and administration, complication monitoring, and role in the multidisciplinary nutritional therapy team.
translations.Parecer COREN sobre Passagem de Sonda Na: COREN Opinion on Nasoenteral Tube Insertion
translations.Este parecer técnico orienta sobre a pas: This technical opinion provides guidance on insertion, fixation, and position verification of nasoenteral tubes. It includes indications, insertion technique, position confirmation by clinical and complementary methods, and guidance on enteral diet administration.
translations.Parecer COREN sobre Passagem de Sonda Ve: COREN Opinion on Indwelling Urinary Catheter Insertion
translations.Este documento estabelece as diretrizes: This document establishes guidelines for indwelling urinary catheterization, including indications and contraindications, male and female insertion technique, catheter size and type selection, proper fixation, and prevention of catheter-associated urinary tract infections.
translations.Órgão máximo de regulamentação da profis: Highest regulatory body of the profession in Brazil
translations.Esta lei regulamenta o exercício da prof: This law regulates the practice of nursing professionals, including nurses, nursing technicians, nursing assistants, and midwives, establishing the competencies, duties, and responsibilities of each professional category. It is the fundamental legal framework defining the scope of nursing practice in Brazil.
translations.Resolução COFEN nº 564/2017 - Código de: COFEN Resolution No. 564/2017 - Code of Ethics for Nursing Professionals
translations.O Código de Ética dos Profissionais de E: The Code of Ethics for Nursing Professionals establishes ethical duties and prohibitions that regulate professional conduct. This document is essential to ensure responsibility, dignity, and excellence in nursing care delivery, protecting both the professional and the patient.
translations.Resolução COFEN nº 543/2017 - Parâmetros: COFEN Resolution No. 543/2017 - Parameters for Nursing Staff Sizing
translations.Esta resolução estabelece os parâmetros: This resolution establishes parameters for nursing staff sizing in health services, defining productivity indices, proportion between professional categories, and calculation methodology. Adequate sizing is essential to ensure patient safety and quality of care.
translations.Resolução COFEN - Competências de Cada P: COFEN Resolution - Competencies of Each Nursing Professional
translations.Este documento define claramente as comp: This document clearly defines the specific competencies of each professional nursing category (nurse, technician, and assistant), establishing exclusive and shared activities. The definition of competencies is fundamental for organizing teamwork and ensuring quality of care.
translations.Guia COFEN de Preparo, Administração e M: COFEN Guide for Medication Preparation, Administration, and Monitoring
translations.Este guia estabelece as diretrizes para: This guide establishes guidelines for the safe preparation and administration of medications by the nursing team, including the nine rights, dose calculation, dilution, routes of administration, incompatibilities, and monitoring of adverse reactions. It is essential for preventing medication errors.
translations.COFEN: Práticas Seguras para Administraç: COFEN: Safe Practices for Medication Administration (2018)
translations.Este documento aprofunda as práticas seg: This document deepens safe practices for medication administration, addressing patient identification technologies, barcode medication administration, medication reconciliation, and strategies for error reduction. The focus is on implementing safety barriers in the medication chain.
translations.COFEN: Administração de Medicamentos no: COFEN: Medication Administration at the Appropriate Time (2017)
translations.Este documento aborda a importância da a: This document addresses the importance of administering medications at the correct prescribed time and the therapeutic implications of delays or early administration. It includes guidance on prioritizing critical medications and strategies to ensure timeliness in administration.
translations.Uso Seguro de Medicamentos - Guia de Pre: Safe Use of Medications - Guide for Preparation, Administration, and Monitoring (Fiocruz)
translations.Este guia desenvolvido em parceria entre: This guide, developed in partnership between Fiocruz and COFEN, presents evidence-based practices for the safe use of medications, covering from preparation to therapeutic monitoring. It includes care flowcharts, checklists, and guidance for special situations.
translations.Órgão federal responsável pela política: Federal agency responsible for national health policy
translations.Lei nº 8.080/1990 - Lei Orgânica do SUS: Law No. 8,080/1990 - Organic Law of the Unified Health System (SUS)
translations.Esta lei, conhecida como Lei Orgânica do: This law, known as the Organic Law of SUS, provides for the conditions for the promotion, protection, and recovery of health, and the organization and functioning of corresponding services. It is the fundamental legal framework of the Unified Health System, establishing its principles, guidelines, and competencies.
translations.Lei que Cria a Unidade de Saúde da Famíl: Law Creating the Family Health Unit (ESF)
translations.Esta legislação institui a Estratégia Sa: This legislation establishes the Family Health Strategy as a primary care model in Brazil, setting the minimum team composed of a physician, nurse, nursing assistant, and community health agents. The ESF is the main device for reorganizing primary care and proximity to the population.
translations.Esta lei regulamenta a profissão de Agen: This law regulates the profession of Community Health Agent, establishing their duties, requirements for exercising the function, and labor rights. The CHA is fundamental for the link between the community and health services, conducting home visits and health promotion actions.
translations.Lei de Criação do SINAN e das Notificaçõ: Law Creating SINAN and Compulsory Notifications
translations.O Sistema Nacional de Agravos de Notific: The National System of Notifiable Diseases (SINAN) is the instrument for collecting and processing data on compulsorily notifiable conditions. This document establishes which diseases and events must be mandatorily reported by health services, essential for monitoring and controlling epidemics.
translations.Sociedade científica especializada em im: Scientific society specialized in immunizations and vaccines
translations.Calendários Vacinais da SBIM - Sociedade: SBIM Vaccination Schedules - Brazilian Society of Immunizations
translations.Os calendários vaccinais da SBIM são ref: The SBIM vaccination calendars are scientific references that guide vaccination for all age groups, from birth to old age. They are prepared by immunization specialists and updated according to new scientific evidence and the incorporation of new vaccines into the Brazilian market.
translations.A SBIM publica periodicamente posicionam: SBIM periodically publishes official positions on controversial or emerging vaccination topics, such as recommendations for risk groups, new vaccination schedules, and guidance for special situations. These documents are references for healthcare professionals throughout Brazil.
translations.O IBSP desenvolve e dissemina protocolos: IBSP develops and disseminates patient safety protocols based on international evidence and adapted to the Brazilian reality. These protocols cover areas such as patient identification, hand hygiene, safe surgery, fall prevention, pressure ulcers, and other adverse events.
translations.Este protocolo estabelece as indicações: This protocol establishes the indications and techniques for hand hygiene for healthcare professionals, including the alcohol-based hand rub technique and handwashing with soap and water. Proper hand hygiene is the most effective measure for preventing healthcare-associated infections.
translations.Instituição científica referência em saú: Scientific institution reference in public health and research
translations.Portal de Boas Práticas em Saúde da Mulh: Portal of Good Practices in Women's, Children's, and Adolescent Health (IFF/Fiocruz)
translations.O Portal de Boas Práticas do Instituto N: The Portal of Good Practices of the National Institute of Women's, Children's, and Adolescent Health (IFF/Fiocruz) gathers evidence-based guides, protocols, and educational materials for nursing assistants, nurses, and obstetricians. It covers from prenatal care to newborn care.
translations.A Fiocruz disponibiliza diversos guias t: Fiocruz provides several technical nursing guides developed to standardize procedures and ensure care quality. These materials are important references for continuing education and professional updating of Brazilian nurses.
translations.Acesse as principais legislações, leis e: Access the main legislation, laws, and technical opinions on nursing. Find resolutions from COREN, COFEN, ANVISA, Ministry of Health, and other institutions. Updated complete guide for nursing professionals.

translations.Acesse as principais legislações, leis e: Access the main legislation, laws, and technical opinions on nursing. Find resolutions from COREN, COFEN, ANVISA, Ministry of Health, and other institutions.
