Law No. 8,080/1990 and the Organization of SUS
translations.Lei nº 8.080/1990 e a Organização do Sis: Law No. 8,080/1990 and the Organization of the Unified Health System (SUS)
translations.A criação do Artigo 196 da Constituição: Creation of Article 196 of the Federal Constitution
translations.O Artigo 196 da Constituição Federal de: Article 196 of the Federal Constitution of 1988 established the right to health as a fundamental social right and a duty of the State, paving the way for the establishment of a universal health system in Brazil. This article guided the creation of SUS, determining that economic and social policies should reduce disease risks and guarantee universal and equal access to health services.
translations.A criação da Lei Orgânica do SUS — Lei 8: Creation of the Organic Law of SUS — Law 8,080/90
translations.A Lei nº 8.080, de 19 de setembro de 199: Law No. 8,080, of September 19, 1990, was created to regulate the right to health established in the Federal Constitution, defining the structure, principles, guidelines, areas of activity, and organization of the Unified Health System (SUS) throughout the national territory.
translations.A Lei 8.080/90 amplia o conceito de saúd: Law 8,080/90 broadens the concept of health by recognizing that it is influenced by social, economic, and environmental factors. Called determinants and conditionants, they include aspects such as:
translations.Esse entendimento reforça a necessidade: This understanding reinforces the need for intersectoral actions for health promotion.
translations.A base legal do SUS está nos seus princí: The legal basis of SUS lies in its fundamental principles, which guide all health actions and services:
translations.Garante o acesso de todas as pessoas às: Guarantees access for all people to health actions and services, without discrimination.
translations.A atenção à saúde deve considerar todos: Health care must consider all aspects: from promotion to rehabilitation.
translations.Busca reduzir desigualdades, destinando: Aims to reduce inequalities, allocating more resources to those with greater need.
translations.Estabelece que a gestão do SUS seja comp: Establishes that SUS management is shared among the Union, States, Federal District, and Municipalities, with single direction in each sphere.
translations.Organiza os serviços por regiões de saúd: Organizes services by health regions, promoting integrated planning.
translations.Estrutura a rede de serviços por níveis: Structures the service network by levels of complexity.
translations.Assegura a atuação social por meio de co: Ensures social action through health councils and conferences.
translations.A governança do SUS é baseada na gestão: SUS governance is based on shared management, with mechanisms of agreement, planning, financing, and social control. Cooperation among the three government spheres is essential to align health policies and improve services provided to the population.
translations.Atribuições Comuns e Específicas no SUS: Common and Specific Responsibilities in SUS
translations.Coordenar as ações em âmbito nacional: Coordinate actions at the national level
translations.Prestar cooperação técnica e financeira: Provide technical and financial cooperation to other spheres
translations.Executar diretamente ações e serviços lo: Directly execute local actions and services
translations.Planejar e gerir unidades e equipes de s: Plan and manage health units and teams
translations.. Regula as ações e serviços de saúde no: . Regulates health actions and services within the Unified Health System (SUS). Available at:
translations.Entenda a Lei nº 8.080/1990 e a organiza: Understand Law No. 8.080/1990 and the organization of the SUS. Details on Article 196, health determinants, principles, and system governance.
translations.Lei 8080, SUS, Saúde Pública, Lei Orgâni: Law 8080, SUS, Public Health, Organic Health Law, Article 196, SUS Principles
translations.Tudo sobre a Lei 8.080/90, o marco legal: Everything about Law 8.080/90, the legal framework that defines the functioning of the Unified Health System in Brazil.
translations.Lista de Doenças de Notificação Compulsó: List of Compulsory Notification Diseases - GM/MS Ordinance No. 6.734/2025
List of Compulsory Notification Diseases - GM/MS Ordinance No. 6.734/2025 - Nursing Calculators
translations.Portaria GM/MS Nº 6.734/2025 - Esta port: GM/MS Ordinance No. 6.734/2025 - This 2025 ordinance lists 65 Compulsory Notification Diseases, Events, and Conditions, with 31 requiring immediate reporting (within 24 hours) and 41 requiring mediate reporting (up to 1 week). All 65 notifications have an individualized and characteristic SINAN form.
translations.Notificação Imediata (até 24 horas) São: Immediate Notification (within 24 hours) There are 31 immediate notifications. Below are the 31 Diseases, Conditions, and Events requiring immediate compulsory notification, for which SINAN forms must be completed and sent via e-SUS within 24 hours.
translations.Abaixo as 41 Notificações de Doenças, Ag: Below are the 41 Mediate Notifications of Diseases, Conditions, and Events (up to 1 week) for SINAN completion and submission via e-SUS.

translations.Note, que as contas nao batem31+41 dão m: Note that the numbers do not add up; 31+41 gives more than 65, however it is important to analyze that some diseases (which are the same) have 3 types of notification, for example, HIV, where we have HIV new cases, HIV in pregnant women, and HIV/AIDS. All are about HIV but with different forms of presentation, hence the discrepancy in numbers.

translations.Consulte o Sistema de Triagem de Manches: Refer to the Manchester Triage System to classify care priority in emergency and urgent care units. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Classificar a prioridade clínica de aten: To classify clinical care priority in emergency and urgent care services using 5 color-coded risk categories based on clinical discriminator flowcharts.
translations.Indicado para triagem de pacientes em pr: Indicated for triage of patients in emergency departments and urgent care units, determining the maximum target time until first medical assessment.
translations.Pacientes de qualquer idade que buscam a: Patients of any age seeking care in emergency and urgent care services.
translations.Selecione a categoria de prioridade iden: Select the identified priority category based on clinical discriminators from the flowchart corresponding to the patient's main complaint.
translations.Ausência de discriminadores de risco. At: Absence of risk discriminators. Care within 240 minutes (4 hours).
translations.Discriminadores de baixo risco. Atendime: Low-risk discriminators. Care within 120 minutes (2 hours).
translations.Discriminadores de alto risco (ex: dor i: High-risk discriminators (e.g., severe pain, major hemorrhage, acute change in consciousness). Care within 10 minutes.
translations.Discriminadores de risco iminente de mor: Imminent life-threatening discriminators (e.g., compromised airway, cardiac arrest). Immediate care.
translations.Categoria azul, sem discriminadores de r: Blue category, no risk discriminators identified.
translations.• Atendimento em até 240 minutos (4 hora:
• Care within 240 minutes (4 hours)
• Reassess if new symptoms or clinical worsening occur during wait
translations.• Atendimento em até 120 minutos (2 hora:
• Care within 120 minutes (2 hours)
• Reassess if new symptoms or clinical worsening occur during wait
translations.• Atendimento em até 60 minutos\n• Monit:
• Care within 60 minutes
• Monitor vital signs during wait
• Reassess if clinical worsening occurs
translations.• Atendimento em até 10 minutos\n• Monit:
• Care within 10 minutes
• Continuous monitoring during wait
• Immediately report any worsening to medical team
translations.Categoria vermelha, com risco iminente d: Red category, with imminent life-threatening risk.
translations.• Atendimento médico imediato\n• Acionar:
• Immediate medical care
• Activate emergency room/rapid response team
• Initiate life support per institutional protocol
translations.Risco de que a criança ou adulto morra i: Risk that the child or adult may die unexpectedly, applicable to patients classified in the red triage category.
translations.Sensação vaga e incômoda de desconforto: Vague and uncomfortable feeling of discomfort or fear, common in patients and families during the triage process and wait for care.
translations.Categoria de prioridade atribuída corret: Priority category correctly assigned according to clinical discriminators
translations.Tempo-alvo de atendimento respeitado con: Target care time respected according to category
translations.Reavaliação realizada em caso de mudança: Reassessment performed in case of clinical change during wait
translations.Identificar a queixa principal do pacien: Identify the patient's main complaint and select the corresponding flowchart
translations.Avaliar sistematicamente os discriminado: Systematically assess risk discriminators (general and flowchart-specific)
translations.Atribuir a categoria de prioridade com o: Assign the priority category with the corresponding target care time
translations.Comunicar à equipe qualquer discriminado: Immediately communicate any imminent life-threatening discriminator to the team
translations.Reavaliar pacientes em espera prolongada: Reassess patients with prolonged wait, especially if clinical change occurs
translations.O Sistema de Triagem de Manchester class: The Manchester Triage System classifies patients into 5 color-coded priority categories — red (emergency, immediate care), orange (very urgent, 10 minutes), yellow (urgent, 60 minutes), green (less urgent, 120 minutes), and blue (non-urgent, 240 minutes) — based on 54 clinical presentation flowcharts and their respective discriminators.
translations.Desenvolvido entre 1994 e 1996 por enfer: Developed between 1994 and 1996 by emergency nurses and physicians from 9 hospitals in Manchester (UK), it has become one of the most widely used triage systems in the world, including extensively in Brazil.
translations.Amplamente validado e adotado internacio: Widely validated and internationally adopted as a triage system in emergency services, with good ability to identify patients requiring priority care.
translations.A aplicação correta exige treinamento es: Correct application requires specific training in the use of the 54 flowcharts and their discriminators. This calculator presents an educational simplification of the 5 categories and does not replace the full protocol application with the specific flowcharts for each clinical complaint.
translations.O Sistema de Manchester usa 54 fluxogram: The Manchester System uses 54 different clinical presentation flowcharts, each with specific discriminators, in addition to general discriminators (risk of death, pain, hemorrhage, temperature, level of consciousness, acuity).
translations.A cor vermelha indica atendimento imedia: Red indicates immediate care (imminent risk of death); blue indicates the lowest urgency level (up to 240 minutes).
translations.A classificação deve ser reavaliada se o: Classification should be reassessed if the patient shows clinical deterioration during the waiting time.
translations.Esta calculadora apresenta uma simplific: This calculator presents an educational simplification of the 5 categories — full protocol application requires specific training in the Manchester Group flowcharts.
translations.Quantas categorias de prioridade compõem: How many priority categories make up the Manchester System?
translations.O Sistema de Manchester classifica os pa: The Manchester System classifies patients into 5 color-coded categories: red, orange, yellow, green, and blue.
translations.Qual o tempo-alvo de atendimento para a: What is the target care time for the orange (very urgent) category?
translations.A categoria laranja (muito urgente) tem: The orange (very urgent) category has a target care time of up to 10 minutes.
translations.O que determina a categoria de prioridad: What determines the priority category in the Manchester System?
translations.Discriminadores clínicos de fluxogramas: Clinical discriminators from specific flowcharts for each complaint
translations.A categoria de prioridade é determinada: The priority category is determined by the clinical discriminators (general and specific) of the flowchart corresponding to the patient's main complaint.
translations.O Sistema de Manchester determina o diag: Does the Manchester System determine the patient's diagnosis?
translations.Não. O sistema determina apenas a priori: No. The system only determines the priority and target care time, based on risk discriminators, and does not establish a clinical diagnosis.
translations.Um paciente pode mudar de categoria dura: Can a patient change category while waiting?
translations.Sim. Pacientes devem ser reavaliados per: Yes. Patients should be reassessed periodically, especially in case of clinical deterioration or prolonged waiting time, and may be reclassified to a higher priority category.
translations.Como funciona o Sistema de Triagem de Ma: How the Manchester Triage System Works
translations.<p>O Sistema de Manchester classifica os:
The Manchester System classifies patients into 5 color-coded priority categories, based on clinical discriminators from 54 presentation flowcharts.

Quick guide: Red = Immediate | Orange = 10 min | Yellow = 60 min | Green = 120 min | Blue = 240 min.

translations.Vulnerabilidade à variação glicêmica. Co: Vulnerability to glycemic variation. Common in preterm/LBW newborns.
translations.Secar, aquecer, avaliar Apgar, aspirar,: Dry, warm, assess Apgar, suction, skin-to-skin contact.
translations.VPP, compressões, adrenalina. Indicada q: PPV, chest compressions, epinephrine. Indicated when Apgar 0-3.
translations.FC, FR, SpO₂, temperatura. Reavaliar Apg: HR, RR, SpO₂, temperature. Reassess Apgar every 5 min.
translations.FR adequada, sem cianose, choro vigoroso: Adequate RR, no cyanosis, vigorous cry.
translations.MASCC Score - Risco de Complicações em N: MASCC Score - Risk of Complications in Febrile Neutropenia
translations.Calcule o MASCC Score para estimar o ris: Calculate the MASCC Score to estimate the risk of complications in oncology patients with febrile neutropenia. Includes interpretation, adverse events, and evidence.
translations.Estimar o risco de complicações graves e: To estimate the risk of serious complications in oncology patients with febrile neutropenia, guiding the decision between outpatient oral antibiotic therapy or inpatient intravenous antibiotic therapy.
translations.Indicada para pacientes oncológicos com: Indicated for oncology patients with fever and neutropenia (neutrophil count below 500-1000/mm³) at the time of diagnosis of the febrile episode.
translations.Pacientes adultos em tratamento oncológi: Adult patients undergoing cancer treatment who develop febrile neutropenia.
translations.Intensidade geral dos sintomas relaciona: Overall intensity of symptoms related to febrile neutropenia, excluding moribund patients.
translations.Pressão arterial sistólica maior que 90: Systolic blood pressure greater than 90 mmHg, without need for vasopressors.
translations.Ausência de Doença Pulmonar Obstrutiva C: Absence of active Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease.
translations.Tipo de Tumor / Infecção Fúngica Prévia: Type of Tumor / Prior Fungal Infection
translations.Tumor sólido, ou neoplasia hematológica: Solid tumor, or hematologic malignancy without prior invasive fungal infection.
translations.Sim (Tumor Sólido ou sem Infecção Fúngic: Yes (Solid Tumor or No Prior Fungal Infection)
translations.Ausência de desidratação que necessite d: Absence of dehydration requiring parenteral fluid replacement.
translations.Condição do paciente no momento em que a: Patient's condition at the time fever started.
translations.Idade do paciente inferior a 60 anos (nã: Patient's age less than 60 years (not applicable to pediatric patients).
translations.Baixo risco de complicações graves. Paci: Low risk of serious complications. Patients with a score of 21 or higher may be candidates for outpatient oral antibiotic therapy, according to individualized medical evaluation.
translations.• Considerar tratamento ambulatorial com:
• Consider outpatient oral antibiotic therapy per institutional protocol and medical evaluation
• Ensure rapid access to reassessment in case of worsening
• Educate on warning signs for immediate return
translations.Alto risco de complicações graves em neu: High risk of serious complications in febrile neutropenia. A score below 21 generally indicates need for hospital admission and intravenous antibiotic therapy.
translations.• Internação hospitalar\n• Iniciar antib:
• Hospital admission
• Initiate broad-spectrum intravenous antibiotic therapy urgently per institutional protocol
• Rigorous monitoring of vital signs and for sepsis
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a ser invadido: Increased susceptibility to invasion by pathogenic organisms, significantly elevated by neutropenia.
translations.Risco de fluxo sanguíneo inadequado aos: Risk of inadequate blood flow to body tissues, which may lead to potentially fatal cellular dysfunction (neutropenic sepsis).
translations.Temperatura corporal central acima da fa: Core body temperature above the normal diurnal range due to failure of thermoregulation.
translations.Ausência de sinais de sepse/choque sépti: Absence of signs of sepsis/septic shock
translations.Calcular o MASCC Score imediatamente na: Calculate the MASCC Score immediately upon evaluation of the febrile episode
translations.Coletar hemoculturas antes do início da: Collect blood cultures before starting antibiotic therapy
translations.Administrar antibiótico de amplo espectr: Administer broad-spectrum antibiotic within 1 hour per institutional protocol (door-to-antibiotic time)
translations.Orientar medidas de proteção contra infe: Educate on infection prevention measures (hand hygiene, restriction of visits with infectious symptoms)
translations.O MASCC Score foi desenvolvido pela Mult: The MASCC Score was developed by the Multinational Association for Supportive Care in Cancer, combining 7 clinical factors to estimate the risk of serious complications in patients with febrile neutropenia, allowing identification of low-risk patients potentially eligible for outpatient treatment.
translations.Amplamente incorporado em diretrizes int: Widely incorporated into international guidelines for the management of febrile neutropenia, contributing to reduce unnecessary hospitalizations in low-risk patients while maintaining treatment safety.
translations.Validado extensivamente na literatura on: Extensively validated in the oncology literature, with good predictive ability for serious complications, being a reference in major guidelines from oncology and infectious disease societies.
translations.A decisão final sobre tratamento ambulat: The final decision on outpatient treatment should always also consider logistical and social factors (access to rapid reassessment, family support, distance from healthcare facility), in addition to the numerical score.
translations.A antibioticoterapia deve ser iniciada r: Antibiotic therapy should be initiated promptly (ideally within 1 hour) in all patients with febrile neutropenia, regardless of the score, while awaiting the decision on treatment location.
translations.O MASCC Score usa lógica inversa: quanto: The MASCC Score uses inverse logic: the higher the score, the lower the risk (unlike most other clinical scores).
translations.A decisão por tratamento ambulatorial de: The decision for outpatient treatment should also consider logistical and social criteria, not just the numerical score.
translations.Reavalie o paciente clinicamente de form: Reassess the patient clinically frequently, even if initially classified as low risk.
translations.No MASCC Score, uma pontuação mais alta: In the MASCC Score, a higher score indicates what?
translations.Diferente da maioria dos escores clínico: Unlike most clinical scores, in MASCC a higher score indicates LOWER risk of serious complications.
translations.A partir de qual pontuação o MASCC Score: From what score does the MASCC Score indicate low risk?
translations.Escores de 21 pontos ou mais (de um máxi: Scores of 21 points or more (out of a maximum of 26) indicate low risk, and the patient may be considered for outpatient treatment according to medical evaluation.
translations.O MASCC Score substitui o início rápido: Does the MASCC Score replace the rapid initiation of antibiotic therapy?
translations.Sim, deve-se aguardar o cálculo antes de: Yes, one should wait for the calculation before treating
translations.Não, a antibioticoterapia deve ser inici: No, antibiotic therapy should be initiated promptly regardless of the score
translations.O MASCC Score não tem relação com antibi: The MASCC Score has no relation to antibiotics
translations.A antibioticoterapia de amplo espectro d: Broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy should be initiated promptly in all patients with febrile neutropenia, and the MASCC Score guides the decision on route of administration and treatment location, not the initiation of treatment itself.
translations.Todo paciente de baixo risco pelo MASCC: Can every low-risk patient by MASCC be treated at home?
Not necessarily automatically. The decision should also consider logistical and social criteria, such as access to rapid reassessment, family support, and distance from the healthcare facility, in addition to the numerical score.
translations.O MASCC Score é usado antes ou depois do: Is the MASCC Score used before or after starting antibiotics?
translations.O MASCC Score é calculado no momento do: The MASCC Score is calculated at the time of diagnosis of febrile neutropenia, but this should not delay the initiation of broad-spectrum antibiotic therapy, which should be started as soon as possible.
translations.Como funciona o MASCC Score: How does the MASCC Score work?
translations.<p>O MASCC Score soma pontos ponderados:
The MASCC Score sums weighted points from 7 clinical factors — burden of illness, absence of hypotension, absence of COPD, type of tumor, absence of dehydration, status at fever onset, and age — totaling 0 to 26 points. Unlike most scores, a higher score indicates LOWER risk.

Quick guide: ≥21 = Low risk (consider outpatient management) | less than 21 = High risk (inpatient IV antibiotic therapy).

Indicated for cancer patients with fever and neutropenia (neutrophil count below 500-1000/mm³) at the time of diagnosis of the febrile episode.

translations.O MASCC Score soma pontos ponderados de: The MASCC Score sums weighted points from 7 clinical factors — burden of illness, absence of hypotension, absence of COPD, type of tumor, absence of dehydration, status at fever onset, and age — totaling 0 to 26 points. Unlike most scores, a higher score indicates LOWER risk.
translations.≥21 = Baixo risco (considerar tratamento: ≥21 = Low risk (consider outpatient management) | less than 21 = High risk (inpatient IV antibiotic therapy).

translations.Calculadora de Medicamentos - Regra de T: Medication Calculator - Rule of Three (Dose and Volume)
translations.Calcule o volume a administrar de um med: Calculate the volume to administer of a medication from the prescribed dose and available concentration (rule of three), with step-by-step for verification.
translations.Calcular o volume a ser administrado de: Calculate the volume to be administered of a medication, from the prescribed dose and available concentration (dose per volume), using the simple rule of three.
translations.Indicado para conferência do volume de m: Indicated for verification of the volume of injectable or liquid medications to be administered, whenever the prescribed dose differs from the concentration available in the packaging/ampoule/vial.
translations.Pacientes em uso de medicamentos injetáv: Patients using injectable, oral liquid or diluted medications, in any age group.
translations.Dose do medicamento prescrita para o pac: Dose of the medication prescribed for the patient (in the same unit of measurement as the available dose: mg, mcg, g or IU).
translations.Quantidade do fármaco presente na ampola: Amount of drug present in the ampoule/vial/tablet, in the same unit of measurement as the prescribed dose.
translations.Volume (ou número de comprimidos) que co: Volume (or number of tablets) that contains the available dose informed above.
translations.Volumes muito pequenos têm maior margem: Very small volumes have a greater measurement error margin and may require dilution or a more precise syringe.
translations.• Considerar o uso de seringa de precisã:
• Consider using a precision syringe (1 mL/insulin) or additional dilution as per pharmaceutical guidance
• Verify the dose with another professional before administration
• Check if the administration route is compatible with the calculated volume
translations.Volume Dentro da Faixa Usual (0,5 a 20 m: Volume Within Usual Range (0.5 to 20 mL)
translations.Volume calculado dentro da faixa habitua: Calculated volume within the range habitually administered for most routes and formulations.
translations.• Conferir sempre os 9 certos da adminis:
• Always verify the 9 rights of medication administration before administering
• Record the administration according to institutional protocol
translations.Volumes grandes podem exigir fracionamen: Large volumes may require fractionation into more than one syringe/access, or reassessment of the administration route and prescription.
translations.• Confirmar a prescrição e a concentraçã:
• Confirm the prescription and available concentration before administering
• Consider fractionation into multiple syringes or routes, as per guidance
• Communicate with the medical team/pharmacy if in doubt about the calculated volume
translations.Risco de nível glicêmico instável (ou ou: Risk of unstable glycemic level (or other according to drug)
translations.Exemplo de risco associado a erro de dos: Example of risk associated with dose error in medications with narrow therapeutic margin; adapt the diagnosis to the specific drug administered.
translations.Risco relacionado a erros de administraç: Risk related to medication administration errors due to incorrect dose/volume calculation.
translations.Dose administrada corresponde exatamente: Administered dose exactly corresponds to prescribed dose
translations.Ausência de eventos adversos relacionado: Absence of adverse events related to dose error
translations.Registro correto da administração no pro: Correct recording of administration in the medical record
translations.Conferir a prescrição médica (dose, via,: Verify the medical prescription (dose, route, time, drug, patient)
translations.Calcular o volume a administrar usando a: Calculate the volume to administer using the rule of three (prescribed dose ÷ available dose × available volume)
translations.Conferir o cálculo com outro profissiona: Verify the calculation with another professional for high-risk medications
translations.Registrar a administração e monitorar re: Record the administration and monitor response/adverse events
translations.O volume a administrar é calculado pela: The volume to administer is calculated by the simple rule of three: Volume (mL) = (Prescribed Dose ÷ Available Dose) × Available Volume, with the prescribed dose and available dose expressed in the same unit of measurement.
translations.A regra de três é um método matemático c: The rule of three is a classic mathematical method of proportionality, widely taught and applied in technical and higher nursing education for safe calculation of medication doses and volumes.
translations.Método matemático de proporcionalidade d: Mathematical method of direct proportionality, consolidated in the clinical pharmacology and nursing calculations literature, with no controversy regarding its validity when measurement units are correctly matched.
translations.O cálculo pressupõe que a dose prescrita: The calculation assumes that the prescribed dose and the available dose are in the same unit of measurement (prior conversion is necessary, e.g., grams to milligrams). It does not replace checking the nine rights of medication administration nor clinical judgment.
translations.A fórmula é: Volume a administrar (mL) =: The formula is: Volume to administer (mL) = (Prescribed Dose ÷ Available Dose) × Available Volume.
translations.Sempre confira se a dose prescrita e a d: Always check that the prescribed dose and available dose are in the SAME unit of measurement before calculating (e.g., convert grams to milligrams if necessary).
translations.Após calcular, sempre confira os 9 certo: After calculating, always check the nine rights of medication administration: right patient, right medication, right dose, right route, right time, right documentation, right indication, right form, and right response.
translations.Em medicamentos de alta vigilância (insu: For high-alert medications (insulin, anticoagulants, opioids, concentrated electrolytes), the calculation should always be double-checked by a second professional.
translations.Ceftriaxona 500 mg prescritos (frasco re: Ceftriaxone 500 mg prescribed (reconstituted vial 1 g/10 mL)
translations.Qual a fórmula para calcular o volume a: What is the formula to calculate the volume to administer of a medication?
translations.O volume a administrar é calculado por (: The volume to administer is calculated by (Prescribed Dose ÷ Available Dose) × Available Volume, applying the rule of three.
translations.O que deve ser verificado antes de aplic: What should be verified before applying the rule of three in medication calculation?
translations.Se a dose prescrita e a dose disponível: Whether the prescribed dose and available dose are in the same unit of measurement
translations.Se o medicamento é genérico ou de marca: Whether the medication is generic or brand-name
translations.É essencial que a dose prescrita e a dos: It is essential that the prescribed dose and available dose are in the same unit of measurement (e.g., both in mg) before applying the formula, to avoid serious dose errors.
translations.O cálculo do volume substitui a checagem: Does the volume calculation replace checking the nine rights of medication administration?
translations.Não, o cálculo é apenas uma etapa da che: No, the calculation is only one step of the complete check
translations.O cálculo do volume é apenas uma das eta: The volume calculation is only one step of safe administration; the nine rights (patient, medication, dose, route, time, documentation, indication, form, response) must always be checked.
translations.E se a dose prescrita estiver em uma uni: What if the prescribed dose is in a different unit than the available dose (e.g., g vs mg)?
translations.É necessário converter as unidades para: It is necessary to convert the units so they are the same before applying the formula. For example, convert grams to milligrams (1 g = 1000 mg) before entering the values into the calculator.
translations.Essa calculadora serve para cálculo de g: Does this calculator work for IV drip rate calculation?
translations.Não. Para cálculo de velocidade de infus: No. For infusion rate/drip rate calculation, use the specific IV Drip Rate Calculator, which considers total volume, infusion time, and drop factor.
translations.Como funciona a Calculadora de Medicamen: How the Medication Calculator (Rule of Three) Works
translations.<p>Informe a dose prescrita, a dose disp:
Enter the prescribed dose, available dose (concentration), and the volume containing that concentration. The calculator applies the rule of three: Volume = (Prescribed Dose ÷ Available Dose) × Available Volume.

Important: the units of the prescribed dose and available dose must be the same (convert beforehand if necessary).
translations.Calculadora de Medicamentos - Regra de T: Medication Calculator - Rule of Three (Dose and Volume) | Nursing Calculators
translations.Cálculo rápido — Calculadora de Medicame: Quick Calculation — Medication Calculator (Rule of Three)
translations.Calculadora de Medicamentos (Regra de Tr: Drug Calculation (Rule of Three): calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Calcular o volume a ser administrado de: Calculate the volume to be administered of a medication, based on the prescribed dose and the available concentration (dose per volume), using the simple rule of three. Indicated for checking the volume of injectable or liquid medications to be administered, whenever the prescribed dose differs from the available concentration in the packaging/ampoule/vial.
translations.0.51–20: Volume Dentro da Faixa Usual (0: 0.51–20: Volume Within Usual Range (0.5 to 20 mL)
translations.NANDA — Risco de nível glicêmico instáve: NANDA — Risk for unstable blood glucose level (or other according to drug)
translations.GRAY, L. Cálculo de Medicamentos e Terap: GRAY, L. Drug Calculations and Intravenous Therapy for Nursing. Porto Alegre: Artmed, 2015.
translations.ENFERMAGEM ILUSTRADA. A Regra de Três na: ENFERMAGEM ILUSTRADA. The Rule of Three in Nursing. Available at: enfermagemilustrada.com.
translations.Informe a dose prescrita, a dose disponí: Enter the prescribed dose, the available dose (concentration), and the volume containing that concentration. The calculator applies the rule of three: Volume = (Prescribed Dose ÷ Available Dose) × Available Volume.
translations.as unidades da dose prescrita e da dose: the units of the prescribed dose and the available dose must be the same (convert beforehand if necessary).
translations.Calcule o Mini Exame do Estado Mental (M: Calculate the Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) for cognitive impairment screening. Includes interpretation, nursing process (SAE), and evidence.
translations.Rastrear o comprometimento cognitivo glo: Screen for global cognitive impairment by assessing orientation, registration, attention/calculation, recall, and language.
translations.Indicado no rastreio de comprometimento: Indicated for screening cognitive impairment in older adults, patients with suspected dementia, or as part of a comprehensive neurological/geriatric assessment.
translations.Pacientes adultos e idosos com suspeita: Adult and elderly patients with suspected cognitive impairment.
translations.Ano, estação, mês, dia do mês e dia da s: Year, season, month, day of month, and day of week (1 point each, maximum 5).
translations.Estado, cidade, bairro, local e andar/se: State, city, neighborhood, place, and floor/sector (1 point each, maximum 5).
translations.Repetir imediatamente 3 palavras não rel: Repeat immediately 3 unrelated words (1 point each, maximum 3).
translations.Atenção e Cálculo (Série de 7 ou soletra: Attention and Calculation (Serial 7s or spell 'WORLD' backwards)
translations.5 subtrações consecutivas de 7 a partir: 5 consecutive subtractions of 7 from 100, or spell the word 'WORLD' backwards (maximum 5).
translations.Recordar as 3 palavras registradas anter: Recall the 3 previously registered words (1 point each, maximum 3).
translations.Nomear corretamente 2 objetos mostrados: Correctly name 2 shown objects (e.g., pen, watch).
translations.Repetir corretamente a frase 'Nem aqui,: Correctly repeat the phrase 'No ifs, ands, or buts'.
translations.Executar corretamente as 3 etapas do com: Correctly execute the 3 steps of the command (e.g., 'take the paper in your right hand, fold it in half, and put it on the floor').
translations.Ler e executar corretamente o comando es: Read and correctly execute the written command 'Close your eyes'.
translations.Escrever espontaneamente uma frase com s: Spontaneously write a meaningful sentence with a subject and verb.
translations.Copiar corretamente o desenho de dois pe: Correctly copy the drawing of two overlapping pentagons.
translations.Pontuação abaixo de 18 pontos sugere com: Score below 18 points suggests major cognitive impairment, often associated with dementia.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação neurológica/:
• Refer for specialized neurological/geriatric evaluation
• Investigate causes of cognitive impairment (dementia, delirium, reversible causes)
• Assess patient safety and functional capacity
• Involve family in care plan
translations.Pontuação entre 18 e 23 pontos sugere co: Score between 18 and 23 points suggests mild to moderate cognitive impairment.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação neuropsicoló:
• Refer for complementary neuropsychological evaluation
• Periodically reassess cognitive progression
• Investigate potentially reversible causes
translations.Pontuação de 24 pontos ou mais é geralme: Score of 24 points or more is generally considered within normal cognitive range (without adjustment for education).
translations.• Manter acompanhamento de rotina\n• Rea:
• Maintain routine follow-up
• Periodically reassess, especially if subjective cognitive complaints
translations.Incapacidade de lembrar ou recuperar ped: Inability to remember or retrieve pieces of information or previously learned behavioral skills.
translations.Deterioração irreversível, de longa dura: Irreversible, long-standing, and/or progressive deterioration of intellect and personality, characterized by decreased ability to interpret environmental stimuli and thought processes.
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas, rela: Increased susceptibility to falls related to identified cognitive impairment that may affect judgment and safety.
translations.Escore do MEEM avaliado e monitorado ao: MMSE score assessed and monitored over time
translations.Ambiente adaptado para segurança do paci: Environment adapted for patient safety according to degree of impairment
translations.Aplicar o MEEM no rastreio de comprometi: Apply the MMSE for cognitive impairment screening
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação neuropsicológi: Refer for specialized neuropsychological evaluation based on results
translations.Orientar a família sobre estratégias de: Educate family about communication and safety strategies
translations.Investigar causas potencialmente reversí: Investigate potentially reversible causes of cognitive impairment (medications, metabolic disorders, depression)
translations.Reavaliar periodicamente a evolução cogn: Periodically reassess the patient's cognitive progression
translations.O MEEM avalia 7 domínios cognitivos — or: The MMSE assesses 7 cognitive domains — temporal orientation (5 points), spatial orientation (5 points), registration (3 points), attention and calculation (5 points), recall (3 points), and language (9 points, distributed across naming, repetition, command, reading, writing, and copying) — totaling 30 points.
translations.Desenvolvido por Marshal e Susan Folstei: Developed by Marshal and Susan Folstein in 1975, it is one of the most widely used cognitive screening instruments worldwide, due to its quick application and extensive validation across different populations and languages.
translations.Extensivamente validado e traduzido para: Extensively validated and translated into several languages, including Brazilian Portuguese, with education-adjusted cutoff points widely studied in the Brazilian population (Bertolucci et al., 1994; Brucki et al., 2003).
translations.O desempenho no MEEM é fortemente influe: MMSE performance is strongly influenced by education — the cutoff points presented here do not consider this adjustment. It is recommended, whenever possible, to use education-adjusted cutoff points according to Brazilian validation. It does not assess executive functions in depth.
MMSE performance is strongly influenced by education — use, whenever possible, education-adjusted cutoff points according to Brazilian validation (Bertolucci et al., 1994).
translations.Os pontos de corte gerais (≥24 normal, 1: General cutoff points (≥24 normal, 18-23 mild to moderate, <18 severe) do not consider education and should be interpreted with caution.
translations.O MEEM é uma ferramenta de rastreio, não: The MMSE is a screening tool, not a definitive diagnosis of dementia.
translations.Considere fatores como déficit sensorial: Consider factors such as sensory deficits (visual/auditory), fatigue, and anxiety, which may influence test performance.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima do MEEM?: What is the maximum score of the MMSE?
translations.O MEEM tem pontuação máxima de 30 pontos: The MMSE has a maximum score of 30 points, distributed across orientation, registration, attention/calculation, recall, and language.
translations.O que influencia fortemente o desempenho: What strongly influences MMSE performance, requiring adjustment of cutoff points?
translations.A escolaridade influencia fortemente o d: Education strongly influences MMSE performance, and it is recommended to use education-adjusted cutoff points.
translations.O MEEM substitui a avaliação diagnóstica: Does the MMSE replace diagnostic evaluation for dementia?
translations.Não, é uma ferramenta de rastreio: No, it is a screening tool
translations.Não tem relação com demência: It has no relation to dementia
translations.O MEEM é uma ferramenta de rastreio cogn: The MMSE is a cognitive screening tool; the diagnosis of dementia requires more in-depth clinical and neuropsychological evaluation.
translations.Os pontos de corte do MEEM são os mesmos: Are the MMSE cutoff points the same for all education levels?
translations.Não deveriam ser. A escolaridade influen: They should not be. Education strongly influences test performance. Brazilian studies (Bertolucci et al., 1994; Brucki et al., 2003) propose education-adjusted cutoff points, which should be prioritized whenever available.
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de rastreio cognit: No. It is a cognitive screening tool that identifies patients requiring further evaluation. Dementia diagnosis requires a complete clinical assessment, complementary tests, and often specialized neuropsychological evaluation.
translations.Como funciona o Mini Exame do Estado Men: How the Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) Works
translations.<p>O MEEM soma pontos de 7 domínios cogn:
The MMSE scores points from 7 cognitive domains — temporal orientation (5), spatial orientation (5), registration (3), attention/calculation (5), recall (3), and language (9) — totaling 30 points.

Quick guide (without education adjustment): ≥24 = Normal | 18-23 = Mild to moderate | <18 = Severe.
translations.Mini Exame do Estado Mental (MEEM) - Ras: Mini-Mental State Examination (MMSE) - Cognitive Screening | Nursing Calculators
translations.Atenção e Cálculo (Série de 7 ou soletra: Attention and Calculation (Serial 7s or spell 'WORLD' backwards)
translations.5 subtrações consecutivas de 7 a partir: 5 consecutive subtractions of 7 from 100, or spell the word 'WORLD' backwards (maximum 5).
translations.Repetir corretamente a frase &#x27;Nem a: Repeat the sentence 'No ifs, ands, or buts' correctly.
translations.Executar corretamente as 3 etapas do com: Correctly execute the 3-step command (e.g., 'Take the paper in your right hand, fold it in half, and place it on the floor').
translations.Ler e executar corretamente o comando es: Read and correctly execute the written command 'Close your eyes'.
translations.Mini Exame do Estado Mental: cálculo, fu: Mini-Mental State Examination: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Os pontos de corte gerais (≥24 normal, 1: The general cutoffs (≥24 normal, 18-23 mild to moderate, <18 severe) do not consider education and should be interpreted with caution.
translations.Rastrear o comprometimento cognitivo glo: Screen for global cognitive impairment by assessing orientation, registration, attention/calculation, recall, and language. Indicated for screening cognitive impairment in older adults, patients with suspected dementia, or as part of a broad neurological/geriatric assessment.

translations.O MEEM soma pontos de 7 domínios cogniti: The MMSE scores points from 7 cognitive domains — temporal orientation (5), spatial orientation (5), registration (3), attention/calculation (5), recall (3), and language (9) — totaling 30 points.
translations.MEOWS - Escore de Alerta Obstétrico Prec: MEOWS - Modified Early Obstetric Warning Score
translations.Calcule o MEOWS (Modified Early Obstetri: Calculate the MEOWS (Modified Early Obstetric Warning Score) to detect early clinical deterioration in pregnant and postpartum women. Includes interpretation, nursing diagnosis, and evidence.
translations.Detectar precocemente sinais de deterior: Early detection of signs of clinical deterioration in pregnant and postpartum women by scoring 9 physiological parameters: temperature, systolic and diastolic blood pressure, heart rate, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, supplemental oxygen use, level of consciousness, and urine output.
translations.Indicado para gestantes com 20 semanas o: Indicated for pregnant women at 20 weeks or more and postpartum women up to 6 weeks after delivery, for monitoring and early detection of clinical deterioration (e.g., severe preeclampsia, sepsis, hemorrhage).
translations.Gestantes com idade gestacional ≥20 sema: Pregnant women with gestational age ≥20 weeks and postpartum women up to 6 weeks postpartum.
translations.A paciente está recebendo oxigênio suple: Is the patient receiving supplemental oxygen?
translations.Nível de consciência segundo a escala AV: Level of consciousness according to the AVPU scale.
Urine output in the last hours.
translations.Pontuação 0, compatível com parâmetros v: Score 0, compatible with vital signs within normal limits.
translations.• Manter monitorização padrão de sinais:
• Maintain standard vital sign monitoring
• Response based on unit routine
translations.Pontuação de 1 a 4 pontos, sugerindo nec: Score of 1 to 4 points, suggesting need for more frequent monitoring.
translations.• Reavaliar sinais vitais a cada 4-6 hor:
• Reassess vital signs every 4-6 hours
• Nursing team should assess need to increase monitoring frequency and/or escalate to medical team
• Special attention if any single parameter scores 3
translations.Pontuação total de 5 a 6 pontos (ou 3 po: Total score of 5 to 6 points (or 3 points in any single parameter), indicating need for urgent response.
translations.• Monitorização de sinais vitais a cada:
• Vital sign monitoring every hour
• Urgent unit response; activate electronic fetal monitoring if applicable
• Notify attending physician and anesthesia
translations.Pontuação total igual ou superior a 7 po: Total score equal to or greater than 7 points, indicating critical risk of clinical deterioration.
translations.• Monitorização contínua\n• Chamada imed:
• Continuous monitoring
• Immediate call for rapid response (institutional emergency code)
• Immediate call to attending physician and consider ICU consultation
translations.Quantidade de sangue bombeada pelo coraç: Inadequate amount of blood pumped by the heart to meet the body's metabolic demands, identified by changes in heart rate and blood pressure on MEOWS.
translations.Inspiração e/ou expiração que não propor: Inspiration and/or expiration that does not provide adequate ventilation, identified by changes in respiratory rate and oxygen saturation.
translations.Risco de fluxo sanguíneo inadequado aos: Risk of inadequate blood flow to body tissues, which may lead to cellular dysfunction with risk of death, related to hemodynamic deterioration identified by the score.
translations.MEOWS avaliado sistematicamente conforme: MEOWS systematically assessed per institutional protocol
translations.Deterioração clínica identificada e comu: Clinical deterioration identified and reported early
translations.Resposta clínica escalonada proporcional: Clinical response escalated proportionally to the obtained score
translations.Aplicar o MEOWS em gestantes com 20 sema: Apply MEOWS in pregnant women at 20 weeks or more and postpartum women up to 6 weeks after delivery
translations.Somar a pontuação de todos os parâmetros: Sum the scores of all parameters to obtain the total score
translations.Escalonar a frequência de monitorização: Escalate monitoring frequency and clinical response according to the obtained score
translations.Comunicar imediatamente a equipe médica: Immediately notify the medical team if any single parameter scores 3 or the total score is ≥5
translations.Acionar resposta rápida institucional (c: Activate institutional rapid response (obstetric emergency code) for scores ≥7
translations.O MEOWS soma a pontuação de 9 parâmetros: MEOWS sums the scores of 9 physiological parameters — temperature, systolic and diastolic blood pressure, heart rate, respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, supplemental oxygen use, level of consciousness (AVPU), and urine output — each scored according to the degree of deviation from normal, for early detection of clinical deterioration in pregnant and postpartum women.
translations.Desenvolvido a partir de escores de aler: Developed from Early Warning Scores used in general care, MEOWS was specifically adapted for the obstetric population, considering normal physiological changes of pregnancy, and has been adopted by various maternal health services worldwide.
translations.Amplamente utilizado em maternidades e s: Widely used in maternity units and obstetric services as a screening tool for early detection of clinical deterioration, although evidence on the exact standardization of thresholds is still debated, with variations among different institutional versions.
translations.Os limiares de trigger do MEOWS variam e: MEOWS trigger thresholds vary among institutions and are mostly based on clinical consensus, with limited evidence on its ability to improve outcomes in the general obstetric population. It should be used as a complementary tool to clinical judgment, not in isolation.
translations.O MEOWS é aplicado em gestantes com 20 s: MEOWS is applied to pregnant women at 20 weeks or more and postpartum women up to 6 weeks after delivery.
translations.Um único parâmetro pontuando 3 já é sufi: A single parameter scoring 3 is sufficient to trigger an urgent response, regardless of the total score.
translations.As alterações fisiológicas normais da ge: Normal physiological changes of pregnancy (e.g., slight increase in heart and respiratory rates) were considered when defining scoring thresholds.
translations.Escores totais iguais ou superiores a 7: Total scores equal to or greater than 7 require immediate activation of institutional rapid response and consideration of ICU support.
translations.Para qual população o MEOWS é indicado?: For which population is MEOWS indicated?
translations.Gestantes com 20 semanas ou mais e puérp: Pregnant women at 20 weeks or more and postpartum women up to 6 weeks after delivery
translations.Apenas puérperas no primeiro mês: Only postpartum women in the first month
translations.O MEOWS é indicado para gestantes com id: MEOWS is indicated for pregnant women with gestational age equal to or greater than 20 weeks and postpartum women up to 6 weeks after delivery.
translations.O que acontece se um único parâmetro do: What happens if a single MEOWS parameter scores 3, even with a low total score?
translations.É ignorado se o total for baixo: It is ignored if the total is low
translations.Já é suficiente para acionar resposta ur: It is sufficient to trigger an urgent response, regardless of the total
translations.Só importa se acontecer em 2 parâmetros: It only matters if it occurs in 2 parameters
translations.Reduz a pontuação total automaticamente: It automatically reduces the total score
translations.Segundo o protocolo do MEOWS, a pontuaçã: According to the MEOWS protocol, a score of 3 in any single parameter is sufficient to trigger an urgent response, even if the total score does not reach the general threshold.
translations.Quantos parâmetros fisiológicos compõem: How many physiological parameters compose the MEOWS in this calculator?
translations.O MEOWS avalia 9 parâmetros: temperatura: MEOWS assesses 9 parameters: temperature, SBP, DBP, heart rate, respiratory rate, SpO2, supplemental oxygen use, level of consciousness, and urine output.
translations.O MEOWS tem limiares padronizados intern: Does MEOWS have internationally standardized thresholds?
translations.Não completamente. Os limiares de trigge: Not completely. MEOWS trigger thresholds vary across institutions and countries, being mostly based on clinical consensus. Therefore, it is important to follow the specific protocol adopted by the healthcare institution.
translations.O MEOWS substitui o julgamento clínico d: Does MEOWS replace the clinical judgment of the team?
translations.Não. O MEOWS é uma ferramenta complement: No. MEOWS is a complementary screening and monitoring tool. If a patient or family member expresses concern about the clinical condition, the team should escalate care regardless of the numerical score obtained.
translations.<p>O MEOWS soma a pontuação de 9 parâmet:
MEOWS sums the scores of 9 physiological parameters (temperature, SBP, DBP, HR, RR, SpO2, O2 use, consciousness, and urine output), with individual scores increasing as deviation from normal increases.

Quick guide: 0 = Normal | 1-4 = Increased monitoring | 5-6 (or 3 in 1 parameter) = Urgent response | ≥7 = Immediate response/emergency code.
