translations.0 = Normal | 1-4 = Monitorização aumenta: 0 = Normal | 1-4 = Increased monitoring | 5-6 (or 3 in 1 parameter) = Urgent response | ≥7 = Immediate response/emergency code.
translations.As 6 Metas Internacionais de Segurança d: The 6 International Patient Safety Goals (WHO/JCI) | Complete Guide

The 6 International Patient Safety Goals (WHO/JCI) | Complete Guide
 - Nursing Calculators
The 6 International Patient Safety Goals are:
translations.As metas internacionais de segurança do: The international patient safety goals are guidelines established to ensure a safe environment and reduce risks in healthcare. They are a joint effort of the World Health Organization (WHO) and the Joint Commission International (JCI).
translations.A implementação dessas metas contribui p: Implementing these goals contributes to a safer care environment, reducing patient harm, promoting quality of care, and optimizing health outcomes. When using our scales and calculators, you will often see a reference to a goal according to the scale or calculator; this aims to reinforce attention to care and work on health education.
translations.Garantir\nque o paciente receba o atendi: Ensure that the patient receives the correct care and procedures, using at least two identifiers (e.g., full name and date of birth).
translations.Pulseira de identificação com nome compl: Identification wristband with full name, date of birth, mother's name, ward and bed, medical record number.
translations.Conferir se os dados completos do pacien: Verify that the patient's complete data are exactly the same in the medical record, medical prescription, and laboratory tests.
translations.Verificar verbalmente junto ao paciente: Verbally verify with the patient and companion the full name, date of birth, mother's name, and presence of allergies.
translations.Verificar no sistema se a FAA do pacient: Check in the system if the patient's FAA is the same as the medical record files.
translations.Não deixar dois pacientes com o mesmo no: Do not leave two patients with the same name in the same room; if this occurs, notify your nurse, the nurse notifies the Internal Bed Regulation Center (NIR), and request the transfer of one of the patients to another room.
translations.Pulseiras de identificação de alergias,: Identification wristbands for allergies, fall risk, and aspiration risk.
translations.Nunca falar o nome completo do paciente: Never say the patient's full name for the patient to confirm; this may lead the patient to error. Ask questions without expecting the correct answer from the patient regarding their data.
translations.Assegurar que\nas informações importante: Ensure that important patient information is communicated clearly, completely, and timely, especially during care transitions.
translations.Na mesma unidade faça passagem de plantã: In the same unit, perform bedside handover during shift change with SBAR and medical prescriptions in hand.
translations.Admissão de pacientes: (Da origem) ao de: Patient admission: (From origin) to destination (Your ward), whether in person or by phone contact, the important thing is that everything is passed on: diagnostic hypothesis, age, brief hospitalization history, established conduct so far, allergies, previous surgeries, medications the patient is using, comorbidities, any type of isolation, presence of lesions, tests, presence or absence of companion, etc.
translations.Admissão e o (NIR): O núcleo interno de: Admission and the (NIR): The internal regulation center should contact you informing about the admission; if you already have data on isolation, blood culture, companion, etc., pass this information to the NIR; often the bed regulated for this patient is not the most appropriate due to these criteria.
translations.Pacientes que irão ao bloco operatório:: Patients going to the operating room: If you are the operating room nurse, perform the preoperative nursing visit. If you are referring a patient to the operating room, the handoff must be reported describing the treatment plan established so far, history, comorbidities, allergies, and all items of the surgical checklist in person or by phone. It is important that all essential information is reported and all forms are checked and stamped. Whoever refers the patient to the operating room performs all steps of the handoff and surgical checklist again.
translations.Comunicação enfermeiro e médico: Se seu: Nurse-physician communication: If your matter is properly about a patient, try to know your patient. There are many patients, sometimes even the physician does not know their patients by full name and bed. Know the patient of the clinical discussion, check recent exams, try to be up to date with the treatment and clinical situation of the patient at the moment you request medical support.
translations.Dupla e tripla checagem de medicamentos: Double and triple checking of prescribed medications: Nursing technician, no matter how busy the nurse is, high-alert medications (HAM) require double checking and the presence of the nurse during drug preparation and joint verification of the HAM prescription. Nurse, request clinical support from the clinical pharmacist or the on-call physician to perform triple checking of HAMs.
translations.Tranferencia de pacientes para outras un: Transfer of patients to other units such as ICU: If the patient has had a clinical deterioration and needs to be transferred to the ICU, nurse, check with the physician about the physician-to-physician contact (ICU). After this contact, perform the handoff to the intensivist nurse: patient identification, age, current respiratory pattern, management established at the time of deterioration, degree of patient complexity at the moment, Glasgow Coma Scale, comorbidities, allergies, isolations, imaging exams and approximate date performed during admission. If the transfer is performed with an advanced airway, the handoff should be done as soon as possible, given that the ICU will need to prepare the ventilator, infusion pumps, etc., to receive the patient.
translations.Mudanças no estado clínico do paciente:: Changes in the patient's clinical status: Nursing technician: report to the nurse changes in vital signs, cognitive behavior, nutritional status, etc. Nurse, in case of (non-severe) changes in the patient's clinical status related to nutrition, mobility, physiological, psychological, and social needs, communicate with the multidisciplinary team.
translations.Melhorar a segurança na prescrição, no u: Improve safety in prescribing, using, and administering medications
translations.Reduzir os riscos relacionados a medicam: Reduce risks related to high-alert medications, prescription errors, storage, and administration of drugs.
translations.Assegurar cirurgia em local, procediment: Ensure correct surgery site, procedure, and patient
translations.Implementar protocolos de verificação pr: Implement preoperative verification protocols, surgical site marking, and "surgical pause" before starting the procedure.
translations.Hienizar as mãos para previnir infecções: Perform hand hygiene to prevent infections
translations.Promover práticas de higiene das mãos, c: Promote hand hygiene practices, antimicrobial stewardship, use of sterile equipment, and environmental control.
translations.Reduzir o risco de danos ao paciente em: Reduce the risk of patient harm from falls and pressure injuries
translations.Avaliar e monitorar pacientes com risco: Assess and monitor patients at risk for falls and pressure injuries and implement preventive measures.
translations.Aplicar escala de Morse e outras escalas: Apply the Morse scale and other fall risk scales
translations.Realizar mudança de decúbito em paciente: Perform repositioning in high-complexity patients every 2 hours
translations.Aplicação da Escala de Braden e outras e: Application of the Braden Scale and other scales to assess risk for pressure injuries
translations.Conheça as 6 Metas Internacionais de Seg: Learn about the 6 International Patient Safety Goals from WHO and JCI. Essential nursing guide on identification, communication, medication, safe surgery, hand hygiene, and falls.
translations.\nAs 6 Metas Internacionais de Segurança:
The 6 International Patient Safety Goals (WHO/JCI) | Complete Guide
 - Nursing Calculators
translations.Fluxo de comunicação entre profissionais: Communication flow between professionals during patient care transitions
translations.Calcule o MEWS (Modified Early Warning S: Calculate the MEWS (Modified Early Warning Score) for early detection of clinical deterioration. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Detectar precocemente sinais de deterior: Early detection of signs of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients, based on scoring simple physiological parameters, guiding the need for intervention and escalation of care.
translations.Indicada para monitorização seriada de p: Indicated for serial monitoring of inpatients in ward settings, allowing early identification of patients at risk of deterioration and prompt activation of the rapid response team.
translations.Pacientes adultos hospitalizados em unid: Adult hospitalized patients in inpatient units (ward).
translations.Número de incursões respiratórias por mi: Number of respiratory incursions per minute.
translations.Frequência cardíaca em batimentos por mi: Heart rate in beats per minute.
translations.Escala AVPU: Alerta, resposta à Voz, res: AVPU scale: Alert, response to Voice, response to Pain, Unresponsive.
translations.Responde apenas à voz, à dor, ou não res: Responds only to voice, to pain, or does not respond.
translations.Baixo risco de deterioração clínica. Par: Low risk of clinical deterioration. Physiological parameters near normal.
translations.• Manter monitorização de rotina conform:
• Maintain routine monitoring per protocol
• Reassess according to unit standard frequency
translations.Risco moderado de deterioração. Recomend: Moderate risk of deterioration. Increased monitoring frequency and communication to the team recommended.
translations.• Aumentar frequência de monitorização d:
• Increase frequency of vital sign monitoring
• Communicate to medical/nurse in charge
• Reassess at short intervals
translations.Alto risco de deterioração clínica aguda: High risk of acute clinical deterioration. Requires urgent medical evaluation and possible need for higher level of care.
translations.• Acionar time de resposta rápida / aval:
• Activate rapid response team / urgent medical evaluation
• Continuous vital sign monitoring
• Consider transfer to higher level of care
• Frequent reassessment until stabilization
translations.Risco de diminuição na circulação sanguí: Risk for decrease in blood circulation to tissue, which may compromise health.
translations.Risco de início abrupto de perturbações: Risk for abrupt onset of reversible disturbances of consciousness, attention, cognition, and perception.
translations.Mensurar e registrar frequência respirat: Measure and record respiratory rate, heart rate, blood pressure, and temperature
translations.Avaliar nível de consciência pela escala: Assess level of consciousness using AVPU scale
translations.Calcular e documentar o escore MEWS a ca: Calculate and document MEWS score at each assessment
translations.Comunicar escores elevados imediatamente: Communicate elevated scores immediately to medical team
translations.Acionar protocolo de resposta rápida qua: Activate rapid response protocol when indicated
translations.O MEWS (Modified Early Warning Score) é: The MEWS (Modified Early Warning Score) is a physiological scoring system developed from the original EWS, used to early identify patients at risk of clinical deterioration in inpatient units, by summing points assigned to 5 parameters: respiratory rate, heart rate, systolic blood pressure, temperature, and level of consciousness.
translations.Amplamente adotado em hospitais do Reino: Widely adopted in UK hospitals and later incorporated into various patient safety protocols and rapid response teams worldwide, being a precursor to the more current NEWS/NEWS2.
translations.Estudos demonstram associação entre esco: Studies demonstrate an association between high MEWS scores and increased risk of ICU admission, cardiorespiratory arrest, and in-hospital mortality, being a useful tool for triage and care prioritization.
translations.Escalas de alerta precoce como o MEWS nã: Early warning scores like MEWS do not replace clinical judgment. They may show variations in sensitivity depending on the studied population; more recent versions like NEWS2 have been preferred in many institutions for greater predictive accuracy.
translations.Registre todos os 5 parâmetros a cada av: Record all 5 parameters at each assessment to avoid underestimating the total score.
translations.Um único parâmetro muito alterado já jus: A single highly altered parameter already justifies communication to the team, even if the total score appears low.
translations.Aumente a frequência de reavaliação prop: Increase the frequency of reassessment proportionally to the obtained score.
translations.Utilize o MEWS como complemento, nunca s: Use MEWS as a complement, never a substitute, for the team's clinical judgment.
translations.Quantos parâmetros fisiológicos compõem: How many physiological parameters make up the MEWS?
translations.O MEWS avalia 5 parâmetros: frequência r: MEWS assesses 5 parameters: respiratory rate, heart rate, systolic blood pressure, temperature, and level of consciousness (AVPU).
translations.Um escore MEWS de 6 pontos indica qual n: A MEWS score of 6 points indicates what level of risk?
translations.Escores de 5 pontos ou mais são classifi: Scores of 5 points or more are classified as high risk, requiring urgent medical evaluation.
translations.O MEWS substitui o julgamento clínico da: Does MEWS replace the team's clinical judgment?
translations.Não, é uma ferramenta complementar: No, it is a complementary tool
translations.O MEWS é uma ferramenta de triagem que c: MEWS is a screening tool that complements, but does not replace, the individualized clinical assessment by the healthcare team.
translations.Com que frequência o MEWS deve ser calcu: How often should MEWS be calculated?
translations.A frequência varia conforme protocolo in: Frequency varies according to institutional protocol and the obtained score: patients with low scores may be reassessed per unit routine, while higher scores require more frequent reassessment, often hourly.
translations.Qual a diferença entre MEWS e NEWS2?: What is the difference between MEWS and NEWS2?
translations.O NEWS2 é uma versão mais recente e refi: NEWS2 is a more recent and refined version of the early warning score, developed by the Royal College of Physicians of the UK, incorporating additional parameters such as oxygen saturation and use of supplemental oxygen therapy, with greater predictive accuracy than the original MEWS.
translations.<p>O MEWS soma pontos de 0 a 3 atribuído:
MEWS sums points from 0 to 3 assigned to 5 physiological parameters — respiratory rate, heart rate, systolic blood pressure, temperature, and level of consciousness (AVPU) — to generate a total score that indicates the risk of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients.

Quick guide: 0-2 = Low risk | 3-4 = Moderate risk | ≥5 = High risk, trigger urgent evaluation.
translations.MEWS - Escore de Alerta Precoce Modifica: MEWS - Modified Early Warning Score | Nursing Calculators
translations.Cálculo rápido — Escore de Alerta Precoc: Quick calculation — Modified Early Warning Score
translations.Escore de Alerta Precoce Modificado: cál: Modified Early Warning Score: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Detectar precocemente sinais de deterior: Early detection of signs of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients, based on simple physiological parameter scoring, guiding the need for intervention and escalation of care. Indicated for serial monitoring of inpatients in wards, allowing early identification of patients at risk of deterioration and expediting activation of the rapid response team.
translations.NANDA — Risco de perfusão tissular inefi: NANDA — Risk for Ineffective Tissue Perfusion
translations.SUBBE, C. P. et al. Validation of a modi: SUBBE, C. P. et al. Validation of a modified Early Warning Score in medical admissions. QJM: An International Journal of Medicine, v. 94, n. 10, p. 521-526, 2001.
translations.ROYAL COLLEGE OF PHYSICIANS. National Ea: ROYAL COLLEGE OF PHYSICIANS. National Early Warning Score (NEWS) 2. London: RCP, 2017.
translations.BRASIL. Ministério da Saúde. Protocolo d: BRASIL. Ministério da Saúde. Protocolo de identificação de risco e resposta rápida ao paciente em deterioração clínica. Brasília: MS, 2018.
translations.O MEWS soma pontos de 0 a 3 atribuídos a: MEWS sums points from 0 to 3 assigned to 5 physiological parameters — respiratory rate, heart rate, systolic blood pressure, temperature, and level of consciousness (AVPU) — to generate a total score indicating the risk of clinical deterioration in the hospitalized patient.
translations.0-2 = Baixo risco | 3-4 = Risco moderado: 0-2 = Low risk | 3-4 = Moderate risk | ≥5 = High risk, activate urgent assessment.
translations.Missão, Visão e Valores | Calculadoras d: Mission, Vision and Values | Nursing Calculators
Mission, Vision and Values | Nursing Calculators - Nursing Calculators
translations.Apoiando a prática, o ensino e a seguran: Supporting practice, teaching, and safety in clinical decision-making with high-precision tools available globally.
translations.Nascemos da necessidade de proporcionar: We were born from the need to provide nursing professionals with a reliable, fast, and easy-to-access technological foundation. Our portal centralizes scales, assessment scores, drip rate and dosage calculations, reducing administrative time and the risk of errors in clinical care.
translations.Hoje, somos uma plataforma em constante: Today, we are a constantly evolving platform, translated into multiple languages and used in emergency units, ICUs, and universities, strengthening evidence-based practice.
translations.Crescimento de acessos e ferramentas val: Growth in accesses and validated tools.
translations.Disponibilizar calculadoras e ferramenta: To provide high-precision calculators and clinical support tools, accessible globally, to optimize time and promote safety in nursing decision-making and interventions.
translations.Ser a plataforma digital de referência n: To be the national and international digital reference platform for evidence-based practice, continuously innovating in the development of educational technologies for healthcare professionals.
translations.Faça parte da nossa comunidade. Acompanh: Join our community. Follow updates, exchange experiences, and discuss clinical cases in our official forum.
translations.Nossa Missão, Visão e Valores como plata: Our Mission, Vision and Values as a platform supporting nursing education and practice. We promote safety, education, responsibility, and ethics.
translations.Calcule o MoCA (Montreal Cognitive Asses: Calculate the MoCA (Montreal Cognitive Assessment) for screening mild cognitive impairment and dementia. Includes interpretation, education adjustment, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Rastrear comprometimento cognitivo leve: Screen for mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and dementia by assessing 7 cognitive domains: visuospatial/executive, naming, attention, language, abstraction, delayed recall, and orientation.
translations.Indicada para triagem de comprometimento: Indicated for screening mild cognitive impairment, early Alzheimer's disease, and other dementias, being more sensitive than the MMSE for mild deficits.
translations.Adultos e idosos com queixas cognitivas: Adults and older adults with cognitive complaints or routine screening, especially in primary care, geriatrics, and neurology.
translations.Teste do trajeto alternante (trail makin: Alternating trail-making test, cube copy, and clock drawing (contour, numbers, and hands).
translations.Nomeação de 3 animais pouco familiares (: Naming 3 unfamiliar animals (e.g., lion, rhinoceros, camel).
translations.Soma de: sequência de dígitos direta e i: Sum of: forward and backward digit span (2 pts), vigilance test with target letter (1 pt), and serial 7 subtraction (3 pts).
translations.Repetição de 2 frases complexas (2 pts): Repetition of 2 complex sentences (2 pts) and verbal fluency — number of words beginning with letter F in 1 minute (1 pt).
translations.Semelhança entre 2 pares de palavras (ex: Similarity between 2 word pairs (e.g., train-bicycle; ruler-watch).
translations.Recordação espontânea, sem pistas, de 5: Spontaneous recall, without cues, of 5 words presented earlier (FACE, VELVET, CHURCH, DAISY, RED).
translations.Orientação temporal (data, mês, ano, dia: Temporal orientation (date, month, year, day of week) and spatial orientation (place, city) — 6 items total.
translations.Adicionar 1 ponto ao escore total se o p: Add 1 point to total score if patient has 12 years or less of formal education (official MoCA adjustment).
translations.Pontuação de 26 pontos ou mais (incluind: Score of 26 points or more (including education adjustment), consistent with normal cognition (note: raw maximum is 30; the +1 education point may raise displayed total above 30, which should be interpreted as 30/30).
translations.• Nenhuma intervenção específica indicad:
• No specific intervention indicated solely by result
• Reassess if persistent cognitive complaint or clinical change
translations.Pontuação entre 18 e 25 pontos sugere co: Score between 18 and 25 points suggests mild cognitive impairment (MCI).
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação neuropsicoló:
• Refer for complementary neuropsychological evaluation
• Investigate reversible causes (depression, medications, metabolic disorders)
• Monitor cognitive progression over time
translations.Pontuação entre 10 e 17 pontos sugere co: Score between 10 and 17 points suggests moderate cognitive impairment.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação neurológica/:
• Refer for specialized neurological/geriatric evaluation
• Investigate causes of dementia and comorbidities
• Assess safety, autonomy, and need for home support
translations.Pontuação abaixo de 10 pontos sugere com: Score below 10 points suggests severe cognitive impairment.
translations.• Encaminhamento especializado prioritár:
• Priority specialized referral
• Assess decision-making capacity and need for support/caregiver
• Investigate and treat reversible causes and associated comorbidities
translations.Incapacidade de lembrar ou recordar frag: Inability to remember or recall fragments of information or behavioral skills, identified by low performance in memory and delayed recall domains of MoCA.
translations.Deterioração irreversível, de longa data: Irreversible, long-standing and/or progressive deterioration of intellect and personality, characterized by decreased ability to interpret environmental stimuli and thought processes.
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas, rela: Increased susceptibility to falls related to cognitive and judgment impairment identified on assessment.
translations.Encaminhamento realizado conforme necess: Referral made according to identified need
translations.Fatores reversíveis investigados e trata: Reversible factors investigated and treated when present
translations.Aplicar o MoCA em ambiente calmo, sem di: Administer MoCA in a calm, distraction-free environment, respecting the patient's time
translations.Considerar o ajuste de escolaridade (+1: Consider education adjustment (+1 point if ≤ 12 years of formal education)
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação neuropsicológi: Refer for neuropsychological or neurological evaluation according to result
translations.Investigar causas reversíveis de declíni: Investigate reversible causes of cognitive decline (delirium, depression, medication use, metabolic abnormalities)
translations.Orientar família/cuidadores sobre estrat: Educate family/caregivers on support strategies and patient safety
translations.O MoCA avalia 7 domínios cognitivos — vi: MoCA assesses 7 cognitive domains — visuospatial/executive (5 pts), naming (3 pts), attention (6 pts), language (3 pts), abstraction (2 pts), delayed recall (5 pts), and orientation (6 pts) — totaling 30 points, with 1 point added for patients with 12 years or less of formal education.
translations.Desenvolvido por Ziad Nasreddine em 1996: Developed by Ziad Nasreddine in 1996 and published in 2005, MoCA was created to address the low sensitivity of the MMSE in detecting mild cognitive impairment, incorporating more challenging executive tasks.
translations.Amplamente validado internacionalmente e: Widely validated internationally and in Brazil, with superior sensitivity to MMSE for detecting MCI. The classic cutoff of 26 has high sensitivity but lower specificity, especially in populations with low education — caution is recommended, and use of Brazilian population-adjusted norms when available.
translations.Escolaridade e nível sociocultural influ: Education and sociocultural level strongly influence performance, even with the +1 point adjustment. It should be interpreted together with a complete clinical assessment, not in isolation for dementia diagnosis.
translations.O MoCA é mais sensível que o MEEM/MMSE p: MoCA is more sensitive than MMSE for detecting mild cognitive impairment (MCI) because it includes more complex executive tasks.
translations.Não esqueça o ajuste de +1 ponto para pa: Do not forget the +1 point adjustment for patients with 12 years or less of formal education — this adjustment is already incorporated as a separate item in this calculator.
translations.O ponto de corte clássico é 26/30: pontu: The classic cutoff is 26/30: scores equal to or above suggest normal cognition.
translations.Aplique em ambiente tranquilo, sem press: Administer in a quiet environment without rushing, and consider factors such as fatigue, anxiety, and sensory deficits that may reduce performance independently of cognition.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima do MoCA (escore: What is the maximum MoCA score (raw score, before education adjustment)?
translations.O MoCA soma 7 domínios cognitivos totali: MoCA sums 7 cognitive domains totaling a maximum raw score of 30 points.
translations.Em que situação deve-se adicionar 1 pont: In which situation should 1 point be added to the total MoCA score?
translations.Paciente com 12 anos ou menos de escolar: Patient with 12 years or less of formal education
translations.O MoCA prevê a adição de 1 ponto ao esco: MoCA provides for adding 1 point to the total score for patients with 12 years or less of formal education, compensating for the effect of education on performance.
translations.Qual a principal vantagem do MoCA em rel: What is the main advantage of MoCA over MMSE?
translations.É mais sensível para detectar comprometi: It is more sensitive for detecting mild cognitive impairment
translations.Não sofre influência da escolaridade: It is not influenced by education
translations.O MoCA foi desenvolvido especificamente: The MoCA was specifically developed to be more sensitive than the MMSE in detecting mild cognitive impairment, as it includes more challenging executive tasks.
translations.Qual a diferença entre o MoCA e o MEEM/M: What is the difference between the MoCA and the MEEM/MMSE?
translations.Ambos são testes de rastreio cognitivo,: Both are cognitive screening tests, but the MoCA includes more complex executive and attention tasks (trail making, verbal fluency, abstraction), making it more sensitive for detecting mild cognitive impairment (MCI), while the MMSE tends to perform better in screening for established dementia.
translations.O MoCA sozinho é suficiente para diagnos: Is the MoCA alone sufficient to diagnose dementia or MCI?
translations.Não. O MoCA é uma ferramenta de rastreio: No. The MoCA is a screening tool and should be interpreted together with clinical history, complete neurological examination, and, when indicated, formal neuropsychological assessment and complementary exams.
translations.Como funciona o MoCA (Montreal Cognitive: How the MoCA (Montreal Cognitive Assessment) works
translations.<p>O MoCA soma a pontuação de 7 domínios:
The MoCA sums the scores of 7 cognitive domains — visuospatial/executive, naming, attention, language, abstraction, delayed recall, and orientation — totaling up to 30 points, with a possible +1 point adjustment for low education.

Quick guide: ≥26 = Normal | 18-25 = Mild MCI | 10-17 = Moderate | <10 = Severe.
translations.MoCA - Montreal Cognitive Assessment (Av: MoCA - Montreal Cognitive Assessment | Nursing Calculators
translations.Avaliação Cognitiva de Montreal: cálculo: Montreal Cognitive Assessment: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Rastrear comprometimento cognitivo leve: Screen for mild cognitive impairment (MCI) and dementia by assessing 7 cognitive domains: visuospatial/executive, naming, attention, language, abstraction, delayed memory, and orientation. Indicated for screening of mild cognitive impairment, early Alzheimer's disease, and other dementias, being more sensitive than the MMSE for mild deficits.
translations.NASREDDINE, Z. S. et al. The Montreal Co: NASREDDINE, Z. S. et al. The Montreal Cognitive Assessment, MoCA: a brief screening tool for mild cognitive impairment. Journal of the American Geriatrics Society, v. 53, n. 4, p. 695-699, 2005.
translations.MEMÓRIA, C. M. et al. Brief screening fo: MEMÓRIA, C. M. et al. Brief screening for mild cognitive impairment: validation of the Brazilian version of the Montreal cognitive assessment. International Journal of Geriatric Psychiatry, v. 28, n. 1, p. 34-40, 2013.
translations.SOCIEDADE BRASILEIRA DE GERIATRIA E GERO: SOCIEDADE BRASILEIRA DE GERIATRIA E GERONTOLOGIA. Diagnosis of mild cognitive impairment and dementia. São Paulo: SBGG, 2021.
translations.O MoCA soma a pontuação de 7 domínios co: The MoCA sums the scores of 7 cognitive domains — visuospatial/executive, naming, attention, language, abstraction, delayed recall, and orientation — totaling up to 30 points, with a possible +1 point adjustment for low education.
translations.Escala de Morse - Risco de Queda: Morse Fall Scale - Risk of Falling
translations.Calcule o risco de queda de pacientes ho: Calculate the risk of falling for hospitalized patients using the Morse Fall Scale. Includes interpretation, SAE, patient safety, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o risco de queda de pacientes ad: Assess the risk of falling for adult hospitalized patients, guiding preventive measures proportional to the risk level.
translations.Indicada na admissão, após qualquer qued: Indicated at admission, after any fall, upon transfer, and periodically per institutional protocol (usually every 24h or every shift in at-risk patients).
Immediate or within the last 3 months.
translations.Presença de mais de um diagnóstico médic: Presence of more than one medical diagnosis recorded in the chart.
translations.Dois ou mais diagnósticos médicos ativos: Two or more active medical diagnoses.
Type of support used for walking.
translations.Caminha sem apoio, está em repouso no le: Walks without support, is on bed rest, or is assisted by staff.
translations.Usa mobiliário do quarto como apoio para: Uses room furniture for support when walking.
translations.Uso de acesso venoso contínuo ou disposi: Use of continuous venous access or saline lock device.
translations.Sem acesso venoso ou dispositivo de infu: No venous access or infusion device.
translations.Em uso de terapia endovenosa contínua ou: On continuous IV therapy or saline lock device.
translations.Marcha normal, com passos firmes; ou pac: Normal gait, steady steps; or patient confined to bed/wheelchair.
translations.Passos curtos, incertos, mas consegue le: Short, uncertain steps, but able to stand up alone.
translations.Dificuldade significativa para levantar-: Significant difficulty rising from chair, shuffling gait, unsteady.
translations.Superestima sua capacidade física ou esq: Overestimates physical ability or forgets restrictions.
translations.Risco baixo de queda. Manter cuidados pa: Low risk of falling. Maintain standard safety care and reassess per protocol.
translations.• Orientação sobre segurança\n• Reavalia:
• Safety orientation
• Periodic reassessment
• Obstacle-free environment
translations.Risco moderado. Implementar precauções p: Moderate risk. Implement standard fall prevention precautions and visual signage.
translations.• Sinalização de risco de queda\n• Grade:
• Fall risk signage
• Raised bed rails
• Call bell within reach
• Assistance with ambulation
translations.Alto risco de queda. Implementar protoco: High risk of falling. Implement intensive prevention protocol with frequent supervision and enhanced environmental measures.
translations.• Protocolo intensivo de prevenção\n• Su:
• Intensive prevention protocol
• Frequent supervision
• Low bed position
• Reassessment every shift
translations.Manter grades elevadas e leito baixo: Keep bed rails up and bed low
translations.A Escala de Morse foi desenvolvida por J: The Morse Fall Scale was developed by Janice Morse in 1989 to predict fall risk in hospitalized patients, assessing 6 factors: history of falls, secondary diagnosis, ambulatory aid, IV therapy, gait, and mental status.
translations.Amplamente adotada em protocolos de segu: Widely adopted in patient safety protocols worldwide, including recommendations from ANVISA and the Brazilian Ministry of Health, being one of the most globally used fall risk scales.
translations.Estudos de validação relatam sensibilida: Validation studies report sensitivity between 78% and 83% and specificity between 40% and 55%, varying by study population.
translations.A especificidade relativamente baixa pod: Relatively low specificity may classify many patients as moderate/high risk, requiring complementary clinical judgment. Does not replace individualized assessment of environment and clinical condition.
translations.Reavalie o escore a cada turno em pacien: Reassess the score every shift in moderate/high-risk patients.
translations.Considere o ambiente físico do quarto, n: Consider the physical environment of the room, not just the numerical score.
translations.Envolva o paciente e a família nas orien: Involve the patient and family in prevention guidance.
translations.Documente as intervenções realizadas, nã: Document the interventions performed, not just the score.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima possível na Esca: What is the maximum possible score on the Morse Scale?
translations.Um escore de 45 pontos corresponde a qua: A score of 45 points corresponds to which risk classification?
translations.Escores entre 25 e 50 são classificados: Scores between 25 and 50 are classified as Moderate Risk.
translations.O item 'Terapia Endovenosa' soma quantos: How many points does the 'Intravenous Therapy' item add when present?
translations.A presença de terapia endovenosa/disposi: The presence of intravenous therapy/saline lock adds 20 points.
translations.Com que frequência devo reavaliar a Esca: How often should I reassess the Morse Scale?
translations.Recomenda-se reavaliação a cada turno pa: Reassessment is recommended every shift for moderate/high-risk patients, on admission, after any fall, and with any significant change in clinical status.
translations.A Escala de Morse substitui a avaliação: Does the Morse Scale replace clinical assessment of the environment?
translations.Não. O escore numérico deve ser combinad: No. The numerical score should be combined with assessment of the physical environment (lighting, floor, furniture) and the clinical judgment of the nursing team.
translations.<p>A Escala de Morse (Morse Fall Scale):
The Morse Fall Scale assesses 6 fall risk factors: history of falling, secondary diagnosis, ambulatory aid, intravenous therapy, gait, and mental status. The sum of points for each item classifies the patient as low, moderate, or high risk for falls.

Quick guide: 0-24 = Low risk | 25-50 = Moderate risk | ≥51 = High risk.
translations.Escala de Morse - Risco de Queda | Calcu: Morse Scale - Fall Risk | Nursing Calculators
translations.Escala de Morse: cálculo, fundamentação: Morse Scale: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Avaliar o risco de queda de pacientes ad: Assess fall risk in hospitalized adult patients, guiding preventive measures proportional to risk level. Indicated on admission, after any fall, on transfer, and periodically per institutional protocol (usually every 24h or every shift in at-risk patients).
MORSE, J. M.; MORSE, R. M.; TYLKO, S. J. Development of a scale to identify the fall-prone patient. Canadian Journal on Aging, v. 8, n. 4, p. 366-377, 1989.
translations.A Escala de Morse (Morse Fall Scale) ava: The Morse Fall Scale assesses 6 fall risk factors: history of falling, secondary diagnosis, ambulatory aid, intravenous therapy, gait, and mental status. The sum of points for each item classifies the patient as low, moderate, or high risk for falls.
translations.0-24 = Baixo risco | 25-50 = Médio risco: 0-24 = Low risk | 25-50 = Moderate risk | ≥51 = High risk.

translations.O que são NANDA, NIC e NOC?: What are NANDA, NIC and NOC?
translations.A Importância da NANDA, NIC e NOC na SAE: The Importance of NANDA, NIC and NOC in SAE
translations.O que é NANDA, NIC e NOC?: What are NANDA, NIC and NOC?
translations.Guia Completo para Enfermeiros na Sistem: Complete Guide for Nurses in the Systematization of Nursing Care
translations.A Sistematização da Assistência de Enfer: The Systematization of Nursing Care (SAE) is the methodological tool that organizes nursing care. NANDA, NIC and NOC are standardized languages essential for applying SAE effectively, ensuring evidence-based care and clear communication among professionals.
translations.Em nossas calculadoras voce verá o botão: In our calculators you will see the NANDA, NIC and NOC button next to the calculate and generate pdf button. This button generates a personalized Google search combining scale score + generate NANDA nursing diagnosis, generate NIC nursing intervention implementation, and generate NOC outcome observation of implementations. It will assist professionals in searching for scientific data to implement SAE. These three classifications are fundamental pillars in the nursing process and in the Systematization of Nursing Care (SAE), allowing nurses to think critically and document their clinical reasoning in a standardized way.
translations.. Um diagnóstico de\nenfermagem é um jul: . A nursing diagnosis is a clinical judgment about an individual's, family's, or community's responses to actual or potential health problems/life processes.
translations.Permite que o enfermeiro identifique\nas: It allows the nurse to identify the patient's specific needs and formulate health problems that the nurse can treat and manage.
translations.Paciente com pneumonia apresenta dificul: A patient with pneumonia has difficulty breathing.
translations.O enfermeiro, ao avaliar, pode diagnosti: The nurse, upon assessment, may diagnose: "Ineffective Breathing Pattern" (NANDA).
translations.Outro exemplo: Paciente acamado com verm: Another example: A bedridden patient with redness in the sacral region: "Risk for Impaired Skin Integrity" (NANDA).
translations.É uma classificação abrangente de: It is a comprehensive classification of
translations., ou seja, de todas as\nações que um enf: , i.e., all actions a nurse performs to achieve expected patient outcomes. Each intervention has a definition and a list of activities the nurse can perform.
translations.Padroniza as ações de enfermagem,\nfacil: It standardizes nursing actions, facilitating care planning, communication, and evaluation of intervention effectiveness.
translations.Para o diagnóstico \"Padrão Respiratório: For the diagnosis "Ineffective Breathing Pattern" (NANDA), the nurse may plan the intervention "Airway Management" (NIC).
translations.As atividades relacionadas a esta interv: Activities related to this intervention may include: monitoring respiratory rate and rhythm, positioning the patient to optimize ventilation, providing oxygen therapy, etc.
translations.Para o \"Risco de Integridade da Pele Pr: For "Risk for Impaired Skin Integrity", the intervention may be "Skin Care: Topical Treatment" (NIC), with activities such as: inspecting the skin, applying barrier cream, performing repositioning.
translations., que são os estados,\ncomportamentos ou: , which are the measurable states, behaviors, or perceptions of an individual, family, or community that are influenced by nursing interventions. Each outcome has a definition, indicators, and a measurement scale.
translations.Permite ao enfermeiro avaliar a\neficáci: It allows the nurse to evaluate the effectiveness of implemented interventions and the patient's progression toward care goals. It is essential to demonstrate the impact of nursing care.
translations.Para o diagnóstico \"Padrão Respiratório: For the diagnosis "Ineffective Breathing Pattern" and the intervention "Airway Management," the expected outcome may be "Respiratory Status: Ventilation" (NOC).
translations.Os indicadores incluiriam: frequência re: Indicators would include: respiratory rate (from 1- severely compromised to 5- not compromised), depth of respiration, oxygen saturation.
translations.Para o \"Risco de Integridade da Pele Pr: For "Risk for Impaired Skin Integrity," the outcome may be "Tissue Integrity: Skin and Mucous Membranes" (NOC), with indicators such as: skin hydration, skin color, absence of lesions.
translations.A Sistematização da Assistência de Enfer: The Nursing Care Systematization (SAE) is a scientific method that organizes nursing care into steps. NANDA, NIC, and NOC fit perfectly into these steps, providing a common language and a clear roadmap:
translations.O enfermeiro coleta informações\nsobre o: The nurse collects information about the patient.
translations.Com base nos dados, o\nenfermeiro formul: Based on the data, the nurse formulates a NANDA diagnosis. E.g., "Acute Pain."
translations.Para cada diagnóstico NANDA, o\nenfermei: For each NANDA diagnosis, the nurse establishes expected outcomes (NOC) and plans interventions (NIC). For "Acute Pain" (NANDA): Expected outcome (NOC): "Pain Control," with indicators such as "Reported pain" and "Facial expressions of pain" on a scale of 1 to 5 (severe to none). Intervention (NIC): "Pain Management," with activities such as: "administer analgesics as prescribed," "perform massage," "teach relaxation techniques."
translations.O enfermeiro executa as\nintervenções NI: The nurse executes the planned NIC interventions.
translations.O enfermeiro avalia se os resultados\nNO: The nurse evaluates whether the NOC outcomes were achieved, verifying patient improvement through the indicators.
translations.Utilizar NANDA, NIC e NOC na SAE proporc: Using NANDA, NIC, and NOC in SAE provides:
translations.Uma linguagem universal que todos\nos en: A universal language that all nurses understand.
translations.Torna o cuidado de enfermagem mais\nvisí: Makes nursing care more visible and measurable.
translations.Melhora a qualidade e a segurança do\npa: Improves patient quality and safety, as care is systematically planned and evaluated.
translations.Facilita a pesquisa em enfermagem,\nperm: Facilitates nursing research, allowing analysis of the effectiveness of different interventions.
translations.Reforça a autonomia profissional do\nenf: Reinforces the professional autonomy of the nurse.
translations.Em resumo, NANDA, NIC e NOC não são apen: In summary, NANDA, NIC, and NOC are not just "lists" or "catalogs," but dynamic tools that empower the nurse to provide more qualified, individualized, and patient-outcome-focused care, being indispensable in the practice of Nursing Care Systematization.
Herdman, T. H., & Kamitsuru, S. (Eds.). (2018). NANDA International Nursing Diagnoses: Definitions and Classification, 2018-2020. Thieme.
translations.Bulechek, G. M., Butcher, H. K., Dochter: Bulechek, G. M., Butcher, H. K., Dochterman, J. M., & Wagner, C. M. (Eds.). (2018). Nursing Interventions Classification (NIC). Elsevier.
translations.Moorhead, S., Johnson, M., Maas, M. L.,: Moorhead, S., Johnson, M., Maas, M. L., & Swanson, E. (Eds.). (2018). Nursing Outcomes Classification (NOC). Elsevier.
translations.Domine a SAE com este guia definitivo so: Master SAE with this definitive guide on NANDA, NIC, and NOC. Understand the taxonomies, their practical applications, and how they transform nursing care.

translations.National Early Warning Score (NEWS) É um: National Early Warning Score (NEWS) is a tool to detect patients at risk of clinical deterioration before they become critically ill.
translations.Identificar problemas nos padroes fisiol: Identify problems in physiological patterns and act before major complications occur in the patient.
translations.Selecione a pontuação correspondente à c: Select the score corresponding to the patient's condition for each variable:
translations.O sucesso do atendimento ao paciente crí: The success of care for critically ill patients depends on correct diagnosis. However, whatever the diagnosis, if identified early, implemented measures will be more effective, resulting in a better prognosis. Therefore, early identification of critically ill patients is essential.
translations.O não reconhecimento precoce destas comp: Failure to recognize these complications early leads to worsening of the disease, and in this situation, even adopting a set of complex and costly measures, in many cases, the response becomes slow and does not always result in success.
translations.É possível identificar precocemente este: It is possible to identify these patients early. Patients present “clues,” fully perceptible, hours before the condition becomes extremely severe.
translations.Necessitamos aprender a sistematizar o r: We need to learn to systematize recognition to have (and not lose) the chance to act exemplarily. A tool used for this purpose is “NEWS” (National Early Warning Score).
translations.Royal College of Physicians. *National E: Royal College of Physicians. *National Early Warning Score (NEWS) 2: Standardising the assessment of acute illness and identifying patients at risk of clinical deterioration*. London: RCP; 2017. Available at:
translations.Calcule o Protocolo NEWS (National Early: Calculate the NEWS Protocol (National Early Warning Score) for early detection of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients, promoting safety and activation of the Rapid Response Team.
translations.Calculadora interativa do Protocolo NEWS: Interactive calculator for the NEWS Protocol (National Early Warning Score) for early detection of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients, promoting safety and activation of the Rapid Response Team.
translations.Calcule o NEWS2 (National Early Warning: Calculate the NEWS2 (National Early Warning Score 2) for early detection of clinical deterioration in hospitalized patients. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Detectar precocemente sinais de deterior: Early detection of signs of acute clinical deterioration in adult hospitalized patients, standardizing clinical response according to risk level.
translations.Indicada para monitorização seriada de p: Indicated for serial monitoring of adult patients admitted to wards, emergency departments, and other non-intensive settings.
translations.Pacientes adultos (18 anos ou mais), exc: Adult patients (18 years or older), except pregnant women. Should not be the sole tool used in patients with chronic hypercapnic respiratory failure without SpO2 scale adjustment.
translations.SpO2 em ar ambiente ou oxigenoterapia, e: SpO2 on room air or oxygen therapy, standard scale (without chronic hypercapnia).
translations.Paciente em ar ambiente ou recebendo qua: Patient on room air or receiving any form of supplemental oxygen therapy.
translations.Paciente respirando ar ambiente, sem sup: Patient breathing room air, without oxygen supplementation.
translations.Paciente em uso de qualquer forma de oxi: Patient using any form of supplemental oxygen therapy.
translations.Escala AVPU (Alerta, Voz, Dor, Não respo: AVPU scale (Alert, Voice, Pain, Unresponsive) or new-onset confusion.
translations.Confusão de início recente, ou responde: New-onset confusion, or responds only to voice, to pain, or unresponsive (CVPU).
translations.Baixo risco de deterioração clínica. Not: Low risk of clinical deterioration. Note: if any single parameter scores 3, risk should be reclassified as low-medium, requiring urgent review by the responsible nurse even with a low total score.
translations.• Monitorização de rotina conforme proto:
• Routine monitoring per protocol (minimum every 12h)
• Reassess if any single parameter scores 3
translations.Risco médio de deterioração clínica. Req: Medium risk of clinical deterioration. Requires urgent response from the care team.
translations.• Comunicação urgente à equipe médica re:
• Urgent communication to the responsible medical team
• Increase monitoring frequency (minimum every 1h)
• Consider need for continuous monitoring
translations.Alto risco de deterioração clínica aguda: High risk of acute clinical deterioration. Requires urgent medical evaluation, usually by the intensive care team or rapid response team.
translations.• Acionar avaliação médica de emergência:
• Activate emergency medical evaluation/rapid response team immediately
• Continuous monitoring of vital signs
• Consider transfer to a higher complexity unit (ICU/step-down unit)
translations.Frequência cardíaca e pressão arterial d: Heart rate and blood pressure within expected limits
translations.Mensurar e registrar todos os 7 parâmetr: Measure and record all 7 NEWS2 parameters
translations.Calcular e documentar o escore a cada av: Calculate and document the score at each assessment
translations.Comunicar escores elevados e parâmetros: Communicate elevated scores and critical single parameters immediately to the medical team
translations.Aumentar frequência de monitorização pro: Increase monitoring frequency proportionally to risk
translations.O NEWS2 foi desenvolvido pelo Royal Coll: NEWS2 was developed by the Royal College of Physicians of the United Kingdom in 2017, as an update of the original NEWS, standardizing the assessment of acute clinical deterioration through the scoring of 7 physiological parameters: respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, use of supplemental oxygen, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, level of consciousness, and temperature.
translations.Amplamente adotado pelo NHS (Reino Unido: Widely adopted by the NHS (United Kingdom) as the national standard for detecting clinical deterioration, and progressively incorporated into patient safety protocols in other countries, being considered the successor to MEWS.
translations.Estudos de validação em larga escala dem: Large-scale validation studies demonstrate good predictive ability for outcomes such as ICU admission, cardiorespiratory arrest, and 24-hour mortality, superior to the original NEWS and MEWS.
translations.Requer ajuste da escala de SpO2 (Escala: Requires adjustment of the SpO2 scale (Scale 2) in patients with known chronic hypercapnic respiratory failure (e.g., severe COPD), which is not modeled in this simplified calculator — in such cases, interpretation should be complemented by specialized clinical assessment.
translations.Um único parâmetro pontuando 3 já exige: A single parameter scoring 3 already requires urgent review by a nurse, even if the total score is low.
translations.Pacientes com DPOC grave e retenção crôn: Patients with severe COPD and chronic CO2 retention require the SpO2 Scale 2 (not included in this simplified version) — consult institutional protocol.
translations.Registre todos os 7 parâmetros para não: Record all 7 parameters to avoid underestimating the score.
translations.Aumente a frequência de reavaliação prop: Increase the frequency of reassessment proportionally to the obtained score, according to local protocol.
translations.Quantos parâmetros fisiológicos compõem: How many physiological parameters compose NEWS2?
translations.O NEWS2 avalia 7 parâmetros: frequência: NEWS2 assesses 7 parameters: respiratory rate, SpO2, use of supplemental O2, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, level of consciousness, and temperature.
translations.O que deve acontecer se um único parâmet: What should happen if a single NEWS2 parameter scores 3, even with a low total score?
translations.Nada, o escore total é o que importa: Nothing, the total score is what matters
translations.Revisão urgente por enfermeiro responsáv: Urgent review by the responsible nurse
translations.Apenas anotar no prontuário: Just note in the medical record
translations.Uma pontuação isolada de 3 em qualquer p: An isolated score of 3 in any parameter requires urgent review, regardless of the total score, as it may indicate acute deterioration in a single system.
translations.Qual escala de SpO2 deve ser usada em pa: Which SpO2 scale should be used in patients with severe COPD and chronic CO2 retention?
translations.Pacientes com insuficiência respiratória: Patients with chronic hypercapnic respiratory failure should use the NEWS2 SpO2 Scale 2, with different saturation targets.
translations.O NEWS2 substitui o julgamento clínico d: Does NEWS2 replace the clinical judgment of the team?
translations.Não. O NEWS2 é uma ferramenta de triagem: No. NEWS2 is a screening and communication standardization tool for severity, but it does not replace individualized clinical assessment nor the institutional rapid response protocol.
translations.Esta calculadora contempla a Escala 2 de: Does this calculator include the SpO2 Scale 2 for patients with COPD?
translations.Não. Esta versão utiliza a Escala 1 padr: No. This version uses the standard SpO2 Scale 1. Patients with known chronic hypercapnic respiratory failure should be assessed with the specific Scale 2, according to institutional protocol.
translations.<p>O NEWS2 soma pontos de 0 a 3 (ou 0 a:
NEWS2 assigns points from 0 to 3 (or 0 to 2 for supplemental oxygen) to 7 physiological parameters — respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, use of supplemental oxygen, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, level of consciousness, and temperature — generating a total score that indicates the risk of acute clinical deterioration.

Quick guide: 0-4 = Low risk | 5-6 = Medium risk | ≥7 = High risk, urgent response. Attention: an isolated score of 3 in any parameter also requires urgent review.

translations.Cálculo rápido — National Early Warning: Quick Calculation — National Early Warning Score 2
translations.National Early Warning Score 2: cálculo,: National Early Warning Score 2: calculation, rationale, and evidence
translations.Detectar precocemente sinais de deterior: Early detection of signs of acute clinical deterioration in hospitalized adult patients, standardizing clinical response according to risk level. Indicated for serial monitoring of adult patients admitted to wards, emergency departments, and other non-intensive settings.
translations.ROYAL COLLEGE OF PHYSICIANS. National Ea: ROYAL COLLEGE OF PHYSICIANS. National Early Warning Score (NEWS) 2: Standardising the assessment of acute-illness severity in the NHS. London: RCP, 2017.
translations.SMITH, G. B. et al. The National Early W: SMITH, G. B. et al. The National Early Warning Score 2 (NEWS2). Clinical Medicine, v. 19, n. 3, p. 260, 2019.
translations.O NEWS2 soma pontos de 0 a 3 (ou 0 a 2,: NEWS2 assigns points from 0 to 3 (or 0 to 2 for supplemental oxygen) to 7 physiological parameters — respiratory rate, oxygen saturation, supplemental oxygen use, systolic blood pressure, heart rate, level of consciousness, and temperature — generating a total score that indicates the risk of acute clinical deterioration.
translations.0-4 = Baixo risco | 5-6 = Risco médio |: 0-4 = Low risk | 5-6 = Medium risk | ≥7 = High risk, urgent response. Note: an isolated score of 3 in any parameter also requires urgent review.
translations.NIHSS - National Institutes of Health St: NIHSS - National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale
translations.Calcule a NIHSS (National Institutes of: Calculate the NIHSS (National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale) to objectively quantify the severity of neurological deficit in stroke. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.National Institutes of Health Stroke Sca: National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale
translations.Quantificar objetivamente a gravidade do: To objectively quantify the severity of neurological deficit caused by a stroke, through the assessment of 11 neurological items (15 scored sub-items).
translations.Indicada na avaliação inicial e seriada: Indicated in the initial and serial assessment of patients with suspected acute stroke, to quantify severity, guide therapeutic decisions (e.g., thrombolysis), and monitor clinical evolution.
translations.Pacientes adultos com suspeita ou diagnó: Adult patients with suspected or confirmed diagnosis of acute ischemic or hemorrhagic stroke.
translations.Responsividade geral do paciente aos est: General responsiveness of the patient to stimuli.
translations.1 - Não alerta, mas desperta com estímul: 1 - Not alert, but arousable with minimal stimulation
translations.2 - Não alerta, requer estímulo repetido: 2 - Not alert, requires repeated/vigorous stimulation to attend
translations.3 - Responde apenas com reflexos ou tota: 3 - Responds only with reflexes or totally unresponsive
translations.Perguntar a idade do paciente e o mês at: Ask the patient's age and the current month.
translations.Solicitar que o paciente abra e feche os: Ask the patient to open and close their eyes, and then close and open the non-paretic hand.
translations.Avaliar apenas os movimentos oculares ho: Assess only voluntary or reflexive horizontal eye movements.
translations.1 - Paralisia parcial do olhar (desvio a: 1 - Partial gaze palsy (abnormal deviation in one or both eyes)
translations.2 - Desvio forçado ou paresia total do o: 2 - Forced deviation or total gaze paresis not overcome by oculocephalic maneuver
translations.Solicitar que o paciente mostre os dente: Ask the patient to show teeth, close eyes tightly, and raise eyebrows.
translations.1 - Paralisia leve (apagamento do sulco: 1 - Minor paralysis (flattened nasolabial fold, asymmetry on smiling)
translations.2 - Paralisia parcial (paralisia total o: 2 - Partial paralysis (total or near-total paralysis of lower face)
translations.3 - Paralisia completa de face superior: 3 - Complete paralysis of upper and lower face (unilateral or bilateral)
translations.Braço estendido a 90° (sentado) ou 45° (: Arm extended at 90° (sitting) or 45° (lying) for 10 seconds.
translations.1 - Queda antes de 10s, mas não toca a s: 1 - Drift before 10s, but does not hit the surface
translations.2 - Algum esforço contra a gravidade, ma: 2 - Some effort against gravity, but falls to surface
translations.3 - Sem esforço contra a gravidade, o me: 3 - No effort against gravity, limb falls immediately
translations.Perna elevada a 30° (posição supina) por: Leg raised to 30° (supine position) for 5 seconds.
translations.1 - Queda antes de 5s, mas não toca a su: 1 - Drift before 5s, but does not hit the surface
translations.Teste de picada de agulha nas 4 extremid: Pinprick test on all four extremities, comparing both sides.
translations.Avaliação da compreensão e expressão a p: Assessment of comprehension and expression using a picture, sentences, and object naming.
translations.3 - Mudo, afasia global, sem fala ou com: 3 - Mute, global aphasia, no useful speech or comprehension
translations.Avaliação da articulação da fala ao ler: Assessment of speech articulation when reading or repeating words from a list.
translations.1 - Disartria leve a moderada (compreens: 1 - Mild to moderate dysarthria (understandable with difficulty)
translations.Estimulação simultânea dupla (visual, tá: Simultaneous double stimulation (visual, tactile) to detect extinction/neglect.
translations.1 - Inatenção ou extinção em uma modalid: 1 - Inattention or extinction in one sensory modality
translations.2 - Hemi-inatenção grave ou extinção em: 2 - Severe hemi-inattention or extinction in more than one modality
translations.Pontuação 0, ausência de déficit neuroló: Score 0, absence of measurable neurological deficit by the scale.
translations.• Manter vigilância clínica, pois um NIH:
• Maintain clinical vigilance, as a zero NIHSS does not exclude stroke (subtle deficits may not be captured by the scale)
• Follow institutional stroke investigation protocol when clinical suspicion exists
translations.Pontuação de 1 a 4 pontos, compatível co: Score of 1 to 4 points, consistent with mild stroke severity.
translations.• Seguir protocolo institucional de AVC:
• Follow institutional acute stroke protocol
• Assess eligibility for reperfusion therapies according to therapeutic window
• Perform serial reassessments to detect neurological worsening
translations.Pontuação de 5 a 15 pontos, compatível c: Score of 5 to 15 points, consistent with moderate stroke severity.
translations.• Priorizar avaliação para terapias de r:
• Prioritize evaluation for reperfusion therapies (thrombolysis/thrombectomy) according to eligibility and therapeutic window
• Serial neurological monitoring
• Care in a specialized stroke unit
translations.Pontuação de 16 a 20 pontos, compatível: Score of 16 to 20 points, consistent with moderate to severe stroke severity.
translations.• Cuidados intensivos e monitorização ne:
• Intensive care and rigorous neurological monitoring
• Assess risk of complications (cerebral edema, hemorrhagic transformation)
• Discuss prognosis and care plan with multidisciplinary team and family
translations.Pontuação de 21 a 42 pontos, compatível: Score of 21 to 42 points, consistent with severe stroke, associated with higher probability of death or major disability.
translations.• Cuidados intensivos com monitorização:
• Intensive care with continuous neurological monitoring
• Assess need for ventilatory support and protected airway
• Early multidisciplinary discussion about prognosis and care goals with family
translations.Redução da circulação sanguínea cerebral: Decreased cerebral blood circulation, capable of compromising health, identified by neurological deficits measured on the NIHSS.
translations.Limitação no movimento físico independen: Impaired independent physical mobility, related to motor deficits identified in items 5 and 6 of the scale.
translations.Capacidade diminuída de receber, process: Decreased ability to receive, process, transmit, and/or use a system of symbols, related to aphasia and/or dysarthria identified in items 9 and 10.
translations.Risco de entrada de secreções gastrintes: Risk of entry of gastrointestinal secretions, oropharyngeal secretions, solids, or liquids into the tracheobronchial passages, related to deficits in level of consciousness and/or dysphagia associated with stroke.
translations.NIHSS avaliado na admissão e reavaliado: NIHSS assessed on admission and reassessed serially
translations.Ausência de piora do escore NIHSS ao lon: Absence of worsening of NIHSS score over time
translations.Terapia de reperfusão iniciada dentro da: Reperfusion therapy initiated within the therapeutic window when indicated
translations.Aplicar a NIHSS de forma padronizada na: Apply the NIHSS in a standardized manner on admission and at regular intervals according to institutional protocol
translations.Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médica: Immediately report any increase in score (neurological worsening) to the medical team
translations.Verificar elegibilidade e janela terapêu: Check eligibility and therapeutic window for thrombolysis/thrombectomy
translations.Monitorar sinais vitais, glicemia e satu: Monitor vital signs, blood glucose, and oxygen saturation
translations.Avaliar deglutição antes de iniciar diet: Assess swallowing before initiating oral diet, given the risk of dysphagia
translations.Registrar a pontuação NIHSS e a hora da: Record the NIHSS score and time of assessment in the medical record
translations.A NIHSS avalia 11 itens neurológicos, al: The NIHSS assesses 11 neurological items, some divided into sub-items (totaling 15 summed scores): level of consciousness, questions and commands (LOC), conjugate gaze, visual fields, facial palsy, motor strength of the 4 limbs, limb ataxia, sensory, language, dysarthria, and extinction/neglect. The total score ranges from 0 to 42 points.
translations.Desenvolvida por Patrick Lyden e colabor: Developed by Patrick Lyden and colleagues for the NINDS rt-PA Stroke Trial study, it was published in 1989 (Brott et al.) and became the gold-standard scale for quantifying stroke severity in clinical trials and clinical practice.
translations.Amplamente validada internacionalmente,: Widely validated internationally, with good inter-rater reliability, especially when raters are certified. It is a strong predictor of functional outcome and brain lesion volume.
translations.Atribui maior peso a déficits de linguag: It assigns greater weight to language deficits (left hemisphere) than to equivalent deficits of the right hemisphere, potentially underestimating the severity of non-dominant hemisphere strokes. A score of 0 does not rule out stroke, especially in posterior fossa/cerebellar lesions. Training and certification are recommended for reliable application.
translations.A NIHSS deve ser aplicada por examinador: The NIHSS should be administered by a trained and ideally certified examiner, strictly following the standardized instructions for each item.
translations.Os itens 5 (braço) e 6 (perna) são avali: Items 5 (arm) and 6 (leg) are assessed separately for each side, each pair summing up to 8 points (4+4).
translations.Um escore NIHSS de 0 não exclui AVC — le: An NIHSS score of 0 does not rule out stroke — posterior fossa/cerebellar lesions may present with subtle deficits not fully captured by the scale.
translations.A NIHSS é essencial para decisões terapê: The NIHSS is essential for therapeutic decisions in the acute phase (e.g., eligibility for thrombolysis/thrombectomy) and should be serially reassessed to detect early neurological worsening.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima possível na NIHS: What is the maximum possible score on the NIHSS?
translations.A NIHSS soma 15 pontuações (11 itens, al: The NIHSS sums 15 scores (11 items, some divided into sub-items) totaling a maximum score of 42 points.
translations.Um escore NIHSS igual a 0 exclui a possi: Does an NIHSS score of 0 rule out the possibility of stroke?
translations.Não, especialmente em lesões de fossa po: No, especially in posterior fossa/cerebellar lesions
translations.Sim, mas apenas em idosos: Yes, but only in the elderly
translations.Um NIHSS de 0 não exclui AVC — déficits: An NIHSS of 0 does not rule out stroke — subtle deficits, especially of the posterior fossa and cerebellum, may not be fully captured by the scale.
translations.Os itens motores de braço e perna (5 e 6: Are the motor items for arm and leg (5 and 6) assessed as a single score or separately for each side?
translations.Um único escore para ambos os lados: A single score for both sides
translations.Separadamente para cada lado (esquerdo e: Separately for each side (left and right)
translations.Não fazem parte da NIHSS: They are not part of the NIHSS
translations.Os itens 5 (motor braço) e 6 (motor pern: Items 5 (motor arm) and 6 (motor leg) are assessed separately for each side (5a/5b and 6a/6b), each scoring from 0 to 4.
translations.A NIHSS pode ser usada isoladamente para: Can the NIHSS be used alone to decide on thrombolysis?
translations.Não. Embora seja um componente important: No. Although it is an important component of the assessment, the American Heart Association/American Stroke Association guidelines recommend that the NIHSS should not be used as the sole criterion for eligibility or exclusion from reperfusion therapies, and should be combined with complete clinical and imaging evaluation.
translations.Qual a diferença entre a NIHSS e a NIHSS: What is the difference between the NIHSS and the modified NIHSS (mNIHSS)?
translations.A mNIHSS é uma versão reduzida e validad: The mNIHSS is a shortened and validated version of the NIHSS that removes items 1a (level of consciousness), 4 (facial palsy), and 7 (limb ataxia), being faster to administer and, according to some studies, equally or more reliable.
translations.Como funciona a NIHSS (National Institut: How the NIHSS (National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale) works
translations.<p>A NIHSS soma a pontuação de 15 sub-it:
The NIHSS sums the scores of 15 neurological sub-items (level of consciousness, gaze, visual fields, facial palsy, motor strength of the four limbs, ataxia, sensory, language, dysarthria, and extinction/neglect), ranging from 0 to 42 points.

Quick guide: 0 = No symptoms | 1-4 = Mild | 5-15 = Moderate | 16-20 = Moderate to severe | 21-42 = Severe.
translations.NIHSS - National Institutes of Health St: NIHSS - National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale | Nursing Calculators
translations.Cálculo rápido — National Institutes of: Quick calculation — National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale
translations.National Institutes of Health Stroke Sca: National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale: calculation, rationale, and evidence
