translations.2 — 2 - Não alerta, requer estímulo repe: 2 — 2 - Not alert, requires repeated/vigorous stimulation for attention
translations.3 — 3 - Responde apenas com reflexos ou: 3 — 3 - Responds only with reflex motor or totally unresponsive
translations.1 — 1 - Paralisia parcial do olhar (desv: 1 — 1 - Partial gaze palsy (abnormal deviation in one or both eyes)
translations.2 — 2 - Desvio forçado ou paresia total: 2 — 2 - Forced deviation or total gaze paresis not overcome by oculocephalic maneuver
translations.1 — 1 - Paralisia leve (apagamento do su: 1 — 1 - Minor paralysis (flattened nasolabial fold, asymmetry on smiling)
translations.2 — 2 - Paralisia parcial (paralisia tot: 2 — 2 - Partial paralysis (total or near-total paralysis of lower face)
translations.3 — 3 - Paralisia completa de face super: 3 — 3 - Complete paralysis of upper and lower face (unilateral or bilateral)
translations.1 — 1 - Queda antes de 10s, mas não toca: 1 — 1 - Drift before 10s, but does not hit the surface
translations.2 — 2 - Algum esforço contra a gravidade: 2 — 2 - Some effort against gravity, but drifts down to surface
translations.3 — 3 - Sem esforço contra a gravidade,: 3 — 3 - No effort against gravity, limb falls immediately
translations.1 — 1 - Queda antes de 5s, mas não toca: 1 — 1 - Drift before 5s, but does not hit the surface
translations.3 — 3 - Mudo, afasia global, sem fala ou: 3 — 3 - Mute, global aphasia, no useful speech or comprehension
translations.1 — 1 - Disartria leve a moderada (compr: 1 — 1 - Mild to moderate dysarthria (understandable with difficulty)
translations.1 — 1 - Inatenção ou extinção em uma mod: 1 — 1 - Inattention or extinction in one sensory modality
translations.2 — 2 - Hemi-inatenção grave ou extinção: 2 — 2 - Severe hemi-inattention or extinction in more than one modality
translations.Quantificar objetivamente a gravidade do: To objectively quantify the severity of neurological deficit caused by a stroke, through the assessment of 11 neurological items (15 scored sub-items). Indicated in the initial and serial evaluation of patients with suspected acute stroke, to quantify severity, guide therapeutic decisions (e.g., thrombolysis), and monitor clinical evolution.
translations.NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF NEUROLOGICAL DISOR: NATIONAL INSTITUTE OF NEUROLOGICAL DISORDERS AND STROKE (NINDS). NIH Stroke Scale. Bethesda: NINDS, 2024.
translations.A NIHSS soma a pontuação de 15 sub-itens: The NIHSS sums the scores of 15 neurological sub-items (level of consciousness, gaze, visual fields, facial palsy, motor strength of the 4 limbs, ataxia, sensation, language, dysarthria, and extinction/neglect), ranging from 0 to 42 points.
translations.0 = Sem sintomas | 1-4 = Leve | 5-15 = M: 0 = No symptoms | 1-4 = Mild | 5-15 = Moderate | 16-20 = Moderate to severe | 21-42 = Severe.
translations.Calcule a Escala de Dor Neonatal (NIPS): Calculate the Neonatal Infant Pain Scale (NIPS) to assess pain in newborns through behavioral and physiological indicators. Includes interpretation, nursing care, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor em recém-na: Assess pain intensity in newborns through behavioral indicators (facial expression, cry, arm and leg movement, state of consciousness) and physiological indicators (breathing pattern).
translations.Indicada na avaliação da dor em recém-na: Indicated for pain assessment in term and preterm newborns, especially during painful procedures and in the postoperative period.
translations.Recém-nascidos a termo e pré-termo, do n: Term and preterm newborns, from birth to approximately 1 year of age.
translations.Observação da expressão facial do recém-: Observation of the newborn's facial expression.
translations.Choro vigoroso e agudo, contínuo (ou sil: Vigorous and high-pitched continuous crying (or silent, with open mouth, if intubated)
translations.Comparação do padrão respiratório com o: Comparison of breathing pattern with the newborn's baseline.
translations.Diferente do basal (irregular, mais rápi: Different from baseline (irregular, faster than usual, with gasping or apnea)
Position and tone of the arms.
translations.Fletidos/estendidos, com tensão e extens: Flexed/extended, with tension and rapid extension/flexion
Position and tone of the legs.
translations.Fletidas/estendidas, com tensão e extens: Flexed/extended, with tension and rapid extension/flexion
translations.Nível de alerta e consciência do recém-n: Level of alertness and consciousness of the newborn.
translations.Dormindo ou acordado, calmo e tranquilo: Sleeping or awake, calm and quiet
translations.Pontuação de 0 a 2 pontos, compatível co: Score of 0 to 2 points, consistent with absence of pain or minimal pain.
translations.• Manter conduta atual\n• Reavaliar conf:
• Maintain current management
• Reassess according to institutional protocol, especially during and after procedures
translations.Pontuação entre 3 e 4 pontos sugere dor: Score between 3 and 4 points suggests moderate pain intensity.
translations.• Considerar medidas não farmacológicas:
• Consider non-pharmacological comfort measures (non-nutritive sucking, facilitated containment, holding)
• Communicate to the team and consider analgesia as prescribed
• Reassess after intervention
translations.Pontuação de 5 a 7 pontos sugere dor int: Score of 5 to 7 points suggests severe pain, requiring immediate clinical intervention.
translations.Experiência sensorial e emocional desagr: Unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential tissue damage, of sudden onset, identified by behavioral and physiological indicators in the newborn.
translations.Escore NIPS avaliado de forma sistemátic: NIPS score assessed systematically before, during, and after painful procedures
translations.Redução do escore NIPS após intervenção: Reduction in NIPS score after intervention
translations.Aplicar a NIPS antes, durante e após pro: Apply NIPS before, during, and after potentially painful procedures
translations.Utilizar medidas não farmacológicas de c: Use non-pharmacological comfort measures (non-nutritive sucking, oral glucose, facilitated containment, holding/kangaroo care)
translations.Administrar analgesia conforme prescriçã: Administer analgesia as prescribed for high scores
translations.Envolver os pais no manejo da dor e no c: Involve parents in pain management and newborn comfort
translations.Registrar a pontuação NIPS no prontuário: Record NIPS score in the medical record
translations.A NIPS avalia 6 indicadores — expressão: NIPS assesses 6 indicators — facial expression, cry, breathing pattern, arms, legs, and state of consciousness — most scored 0 to 1, except cry (0 to 2), totaling a score of 0 to 7 points.
translations.Desenvolvida no Children's Hospital of E: Developed at the Children's Hospital of Eastern Ontario, it is one of the most widely used behavioral pain scales in neonatal units due to its simplicity and speed of application.
translations.Validada e traduzida para diversos idiom: Validated and translated into several languages, including Brazilian Portuguese, with good applicability in term and preterm newborns, both for acute procedural pain and in the postoperative period.
translations.Pode ser influenciada por fatores como f: It may be influenced by factors such as hunger, sleep, and extreme prematurity, which can alter the behavioral expressiveness of pain. In newborns under neuromuscular blockade or deep sedation, interpretation should be cautious.
translations.A NIPS combina indicadores comportamenta: The NIPS combines behavioral indicators (facial expression, cry, arms, legs, state of consciousness) and one physiological indicator (breathing pattern).
translations.O choro é o único item pontuado de 0 a 2: Cry is the only item scored from 0 to 2; the others are scored from 0 to 1.
translations.Avalie a dor antes, durante e após proce: Assess pain before, during, and after painful procedures to monitor the effectiveness of interventions.
translations.Combine sempre medidas não farmacológica: Always combine non-pharmacological measures (non-nutritive sucking, oral glucose, holding) with pharmacological analgesia when indicated.
translations.Quantos indicadores compõem a Escala NIP: How many indicators make up the NIPS Scale?
translations.A NIPS avalia 6 indicadores: expressão f: The NIPS assesses 6 indicators: facial expression, cry, breathing pattern, arms, legs, and state of consciousness.
translations.Qual o único item da NIPS pontuado de 0: Which is the only NIPS item scored from 0 to 2, and not from 0 to 1?
translations.O item 'Choro' é o único pontuado de 0 a: The 'Cry' item is the only one scored from 0 to 2 points; the other items are scored from 0 to 1.
translations.Qual pontuação total é geralmente consid: What total score is generally considered indicative of pain requiring intervention?
translations.Pontuações acima de 3 geralmente indicam: Scores above 3 generally indicate that the newborn is in pain and likely requires comfort measures or analgesia.
translations.A NIPS pode ser usada em bebês maiores,: Can the NIPS be used in older infants, beyond the neonatal period?
translations.A escala foi desenvolvida e validada pri: The scale was developed and validated primarily for newborns, generally applicable up to about 1 year of age. For infants and older children, other scales such as FLACC are usually more appropriate.
translations.Fatores como fome ou sono podem influenc: Can factors like hunger or sleep influence the NIPS score?
translations.Sim. Assim como em outras escalas compor: Yes. As with other behavioral scales, hunger, sleep, and extreme prematurity can alter the behavioral expressiveness of the newborn, so it is important to consider the complete clinical context when interpreting the score.
translations.Como funciona a Escala de Dor Neonatal (: How the Neonatal Pain Scale (NIPS) Works
translations.<p>A NIPS soma a pontuação de 6 indicado:
The NIPS sums the score of 6 indicators — facial expression, cry, breathing pattern, arms, legs, and state of consciousness — totaling 0 to 7 points (cry scores 0 to 2, the others 0 to 1).

Quick guide: 0-2 = No pain/minimal | 3-4 = Moderate pain | 5-7 = Severe pain.

Indicated for pain assessment in term and preterm newborns, especially during painful procedures and in the postoperative period.

translations.A NIPS soma a pontuação de 6 indicadores: The NIPS sums the scores of 6 indicators — facial expression, cry, breathing pattern, arms, legs, and state of consciousness — totaling 0 to 7 points (cry scores 0 to 2, the others 0 to 1).
translations.0-2 = Sem dor/mínima | 3-4 = Dor moderad: 0-2 = No pain/minimal | 3-4 = Moderate pain | 5-7 = Severe pain.
translations.Normas Regulamentadoras (NR's) - Seguran: Regulatory Standards (NRs) - Occupational Safety and Health
Regulatory Standards (NRs) - Occupational Safety and Health - Nursing Calculators
translations.As Normas Regulamentadoras (NRs) são reg: Regulatory Standards (NRs) are rules from the Ministry of Labor that define obligations, rights, and duties of employers and workers to ensure safety, health, and adequate working conditions. They apply to different sectors and types of activity.
translations.NR-1 — Disposições Gerais e Gerenciament: NR-1 — General Provisions and Occupational Risk Management (GRO)
translations.NR-4 — SESMT (Serviços Especializados em: NR-4 — SESMT (Specialized Services in Safety and Occupational Medicine)
translations.NR-7 — PCMSO (Programa de Controle Médic: NR-7 — PCMSO (Occupational Health Medical Control Program)
translations.NR-9 — Avaliação e Controle das Exposiçõ: NR-9 — Assessment and Control of Occupational Exposures (physical, chemical, and biological agents)
translations.NR-10 — Segurança em Instalações e Servi: NR-10 — Safety in Electrical Installations and Services
translations.NR-11 — Transporte, Movimentação, Armaze: NR-11 — Transport, Movement, Storage, and Handling of Materials
translations.NR-12 — Segurança no Trabalho em Máquina: NR-12 — Safety in Machinery and Equipment
translations.NR-13 — Caldeiras, Vasos de Pressão, Tub: NR-13 — Boilers, Pressure Vessels, Piping, and Metallic Tanks
translations.NR-18 — Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho na: NR-18 — Safety and Health in the Construction Industry
translations.NR-22 — Segurança e Saúde Ocupacional na: NR-22 — Occupational Safety and Health in Mining
translations.NR-24 — Condições Sanitárias e de Confor: NR-24 — Sanitary and Comfort Conditions in Workplaces
translations.NR-29 — Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho Po: NR-29 — Safety and Health in Port Work
translations.NR-30 — Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho Aq: NR-30 — Safety and Health in Waterway Work
translations.NR-31 — Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho Ru: NR-31 — Safety and Health in Rural Work
translations.NR-32 — Segurança e Saúde no Trabalho em: NR-32 — Safety and Health in Healthcare Services
translations.NR-33 — Segurança e Saúde em Espaços Con: NR-33 — Safety and Health in Confined Spaces
translations.NR-34 — Indústria da Construção, Reparaç: NR-34 — Construction, Repair, and Shipbreaking Industry
translations.NR-36 — Abate e Processamento de Carnes: NR-36 — Slaughter and Processing of Meat and Derivatives
translations.NR-37 — Segurança e Saúde em Plataformas: NR-37 — Safety and Health on Oil Platforms
translations.NR-38 — Limpeza Urbana e Manejo de Resíd: NR-38 — Urban Cleaning and Solid Waste Management
translations.1977 e as primeiras NRs foram publicadas: 1977 and the first NRs were published on June 8, 1978
translations.38, sendo que a NR-2 (Inspeção Prévia) e: 38, with NR-2 (Prior Inspection) and NR-27 (Professional Registration of Occupational Safety Technician) being revoked.
translations.A elaboração e a revisão das normas regu: The elaboration and revision of regulatory standards are carried out using the tripartite parity system, recommended by the International Labour Organization (ILO), through groups and committees composed of representatives from government, employers, and workers.
translations.A NR-1 é a norma “base” das NRs: ela def: NR-1 is the "base" standard of the NRs: it defines general provisions, scope of application, terms and definitions common to other standards, and mainly establishes Occupational Risk Management (GRO). A central point is item 1.5, which defines minimum requirements for the Risk Management Program (PGR). In the same context, NR-1 reinforces the mandatory Accident Analysis (AAT) and Emergency Response Plan (PRE), forming the practical set of GRO (PGR + AAT + PRE).
translations.A NR-3 trata das medidas urgentes de emb: NR-3 deals with urgent embargo and interdiction measures applied when there is a serious and imminent risk to the worker. It uses two tables to classify the 'excess risk': one for individual exposure/low potential for victims and another for exposure with the possibility of affecting multiple victims simultaneously. The excess risk can be classified as E (Extreme), S (Substantial), M (Moderate), P (Small), or N (None). The regulation also defines criteria that guide the Labor Tax Auditor (AFT), who must apply embargo/interdiction in the smallest unit where the risk was identified.
translations.A NR-4 define regras e critérios para di: NR-4 defines rules and criteria for sizing the SESMT, which is the technical structure responsible for supporting the company in occupational safety and health. Sizing depends on the establishment's risk grade and the number of workers, and can directly impact the need for professionals in the area. The regulation highlights the main SESMT categories: Safety Technician, Safety Engineer, Occupational Physician, Occupational Health Nurse, and Occupational Nursing Assistant, as well as the duties and responsibilities of these professionals.
translations.A NR-5 regulamenta a CIPA, comissão form: NR-5 regulates the CIPA, a committee formed by workers that acts in the prevention of work-related accidents and diseases, strengthening the safety culture within the company. It defines rules for sizing, electoral process, composition, duties, and operation. The text also mentions Law No. 14,457/2022, which introduced measures for the prevention and combat of sexual harassment and other forms of violence within the scope of CIPA, expanding its role in worker protection.
translations.A NR-6 estabelece que as empresas devem: NR-6 establishes that companies must provide, free of charge, PPE appropriate to the risk, in perfect condition and functioning. PPE must be used when general or collective measures are not sufficient to eliminate the risk, while collective measures are being implemented, or in emergency situations. In other words, NR-6 organizes the employer's responsibility for supplying, instructing, and ensuring the correct use of PPE, guaranteeing individual protection when the risk cannot be fully controlled by other measures.
translations.A NR-7 define diretrizes para o PCMSO, q: NR-7 defines guidelines for the PCMSO, which focuses on preventing and early identifying health damage caused by work. Among the main guidelines are: tracking work-related injuries, detecting excessive exposures to harmful agents, and supporting the definition of employee fitness for specific functions. The regulation applies to organizations and also to public bodies with workers governed by the CLT. In practice, NR-7 organizes the 'line of care' for occupational medicine: monitoring, screening, and preventive actions.
translations.A NR-8 estabelece requisitos técnicos mí: NR-8 establishes minimum technical requirements for safety and comfort in buildings used as work environments. It requires companies to adapt their physical structures (facilities, architectural conditions, and elements affecting safety) according to the minimum parameters of the regulation. This NR helps avoid structural risks and inadequate conditions, directly contributing to a safer and more functional work environment.
translations.A NR-9 passou por atualização: antes era: NR-9 has been updated: previously associated with PPRA, it now focuses on the assessment and control of occupational exposures to physical, chemical, and biological agents. It connects to the PGR of NR-1, as agents must be evaluated when identified in risk management. In practice, NR-9 technically supports the identification, assessment, and control of these agents and directs preventive measures, reinforcing the transition from the old PPRA to an integrated logic with PGR and management.
translations.A NR-10 define requisitos mínimos para g: NR-10 establishes minimum requirements to ensure safety and health in activities involving electricity, protecting workers who interact directly or indirectly with electrical installations. The standard guides control measures and preventive systems to reduce the risk of electric shock, arc flash, burns, and other related events. It is essential in environments with electrical maintenance, building infrastructure, industry, and any activity with electrical exposure.
translations.A NR-11 reúne orientações e exigências d: NR-11 gathers safety guidelines and requirements for operations involving elevators, cranes, industrial conveyors, and transport machinery. It applies to companies that move and store loads, organizing obligations and precautions to prevent accidents such as load falls, crushing, collisions, and operational failures. It is a practical standard for logistics, warehouses, hospitals (internal movement), and industry.
translations.A NR-12 estabelece requisitos mínimos pa: NR-12 establishes minimum requirements to prevent work-related accidents and illnesses involving machinery and equipment, from design and manufacturing to installation, operation, maintenance, and commercialization. It is crucial to reduce risks such as exposed moving parts, protection failures, unintended activation, and lack of safety devices. It also opens space for OSH action in operator training and technical adjustments, as it requires protection and safe management of machine use.
translations.A NR-13 define regras para gestão da int: NR-13 defines rules for managing the structural integrity and safety of boilers, pressure vessels, piping, and metallic tanks, covering installation, inspection, operation, and maintenance. The focus is to reduce risks of catastrophic failures, explosions, and leaks, protecting workers and property. It is highly technical and requires strict control of inspections and operational conditions.
translations.A NR-14 trata de segurança na operação d: NR-14 deals with safety in the operation of furnaces, considering construction, lining, heat, and installation. Its objective is to ensure that the equipment is operated safely, preventing accidents and risks from high temperatures and dangerous operational conditions. The standard applies to industrial activities and processes that use furnaces, reinforcing preventive measures aimed at thermal risk and equipment safety.
translations.A NR-15 define condições de insalubridad: NR-15 defines unhealthy conditions when the worker is exposed to agents above the tolerance limits (by intensity, concentration, nature, or time). The objective is to alert and guide about situations that can cause health damage and require control, preventive measures, and, when applicable, legal classification (such as additional pay). It is an essential standard for assessing exposures and establishing limits and technical criteria.
translations.A NR-16 aborda atividades perigosas e de: NR-16 addresses hazardous activities and defines safety measures for work with accentuated risk (for example, some activities with flammable materials, explosives, and other dangerous conditions). It also emphasizes that the characterization or decharacterization of hazardousness is the employer's responsibility, based on a technical report prepared by an Occupational Physician or Safety Engineer. This NR is linked to prevention and also to legal/labor effects when the activity is classified as hazardous.
translations.A NR-17 define diretrizes para adaptar o: NR-17 establishes guidelines to adapt work to the psychophysiological characteristics of workers, promoting comfort, safety, health, and efficiency. It involves parameters for seated work, lifting and transporting materials, furniture, equipment, and environmental conditions of the workstation. In practice, it helps reduce musculoskeletal pain, fatigue, and decreased productivity, being widely applied in offices, administrative areas, healthcare, and industry.
translations.A NR-18 é uma das mais relevantes para c: NR-18 is one of the most relevant for civil construction, as it establishes administrative, planning, and organization guidelines for implementing control measures and preventive systems in the processes, conditions, and work environment of construction. It organizes obligations and practices to reduce accidents on construction sites, activities at height, excavations, material handling, and other typical construction risks.
translations.A NR-19 define requisitos e medidas de p: NR-19 defines requirements and prevention measures for safety and health in all stages involving explosives: manufacturing, handling, storage, and transport. It also defines explosive as a material that undergoes rapid decomposition when initiated, with intense release of heat and pressure. This NR is critical for specific industrial sectors and requires high risk control due to the potential for serious accidents.
translations.A NR-20 estabelece requisitos mínimos pa: NR-20 establishes minimum requirements for safety and health management in activities with flammable and combustible materials, including extraction, production, storage, transfer, handling, and manipulation. It addresses concepts such as flash point, fire point, and ignition point, important for classifying and controlling risk. The standard is essential for preventing fires, explosions, and leaks and requires robust preventive measures.
translations.A NR-21 trata do trabalho realizado a cé: NR-21 deals with work performed in the open air and establishes protection requirements, such as shelter against weather, as well as standards for work in swampy/flooded areas to avoid risks of diseases and endemics. This NR is important for rural activities, outdoor works, and services on public roads, as it considers exposure to climate and natural unhealthy environments.
translations.A NR-22 é voltada para mineração subterr: NR-22 is aimed at underground and open-pit mining, artisanal mining, ore processing, and mineral research. It defines technical and organizational care so that the planning and execution of mineral activity occur with a permanent focus on safety and health. It addresses characteristic risks such as collapses, dust, explosives, heavy machinery, and extreme environmental conditions.
translations.A NR-23 define medidas de prevenção cont: NR-23 defines fire prevention measures in work environments, which must be adopted according to state legislation and applicable technical standards. Even though it is a short standard, it gathers essential requirements: safety guidelines that all workers must know and mandatory prevention and response mechanisms. It serves as a basis for organizing escape routes, signage, and emergency preparedness.
translations.A NR-24 define padrões mínimos de higien: NR-24 defines minimum hygiene and comfort standards, such as bathrooms, washbasins, and sizing according to the shift with the largest number of workers. The standard aims to ensure dignified and adequate conditions for workers, avoiding sanitary risks, discomfort, and health problems resulting from insufficient or inadequate structure.
translations.A NR-25 estabelece requisitos de seguran: NR-25 establishes safety and health requirements for the management of industrial waste (solid, liquid, and gaseous) that is not similar to domestic waste. It includes examples such as ashes, sludge, oils, dust, dregs, leached substances, and waste generated by pollution control equipment, effluents, and atmospheric emissions. In practice, it guides how to handle waste to reduce chemical/biological risks and impacts on health and the environment.
translations.A NR-26 define regras para sinalização d: NR-26 defines rules for safety signage on hazardous items, including the use of colors, classification, preventive labeling, and a safety data sheet. The objective is to ensure clear communication of risks, reducing accidents due to lack of knowledge, handling errors, or lack of information about hazardous substances and areas.
translations.A NR-28 estabelece os procedimentos de f: NR-28 establishes inspection procedures and applicable penalties when occupational safety and health standards are violated. It functions as a "disciplinary" standard, defining how inspection activities occur and what legal consequences may arise, reinforcing the importance of effective compliance with NRs.
translations.A NR-29 estabelece medidas de prevenção: NR-29 establishes prevention measures and guidelines for managing occupational risks in port work. It aims to protect against accidents and diseases, facilitate first aid, and ensure better safety and health conditions for port workers, both in onboard and onshore operations. It also applies to workers in organized ports and private-use port and retroport facilities.
translations.A NR-30 disciplina requisitos para prote: NR-30 regulates requirements for the protection of safety and health in waterway work and the prevention of injuries and illnesses. It applies to work on commercial vessels of national and foreign flags (when applicable by international conventions), including vessels used for service provision. It is essential for organizing procedures, working conditions, and prevention of typical risks in the waterway environment.
translations.A NR-31 se aplica às atividades de agric: NR-31 applies to activities in agriculture, livestock, forestry, forest exploitation, and aquaculture, considering different forms of employment relationships and the location of activities. It also applies to industrial exploitation within rural establishments. This NR covers risks such as rural machinery, pesticides, heat, physical exertion, and environmental conditions, structuring preventive measures in rural settings.
translations.A NR-32 define diretrizes para proteger: NR-32 defines guidelines to protect workers in health services and also those who work in health promotion and assistance in general. It considers health services any building intended for public care and actions of promotion, recovery, assistance, research, and teaching at any level of complexity. In practice, it is essential for controlling biological, chemical, sharps, health waste risks, and routines that expose workers to harm.
translations.A NR-33 define requisitos para caracteri: NR-33 defines requirements for characterizing confined spaces, risk management, and prevention measures to protect workers who interact directly or indirectly in these environments. A confined space is one not designed for continuous human occupancy, has limited entry/exit, and may have a hazardous atmosphere. NR-33 is critical because these environments can involve risks of asphyxiation, poisoning, explosion, and death, requiring strict controls.
translations.A NR-34 estabelece requisitos mínimos e: NR-34 establishes minimum requirements and protection measures for safety, health, and the work environment in the naval industry (construction, repair, and dismantling). It applies to both facilities and vessels/structures (ships, boats, launches, fixed/floating platforms). It addresses typical risks such as welding, confined spaces, work at height, material handling, and exposure to chemical agents.
translations.A NR-35 define requisitos e medidas de p: NR-35 defines requirements and prevention measures for work at height, including planning, organization, and execution, ensuring safety and health of those involved. It applies to activities with a height difference above 2 meters where there is a risk of falling. In practice, it requires strict process control, as falls are one of the leading causes of serious workplace accidents.
translations.A NR-36 estabelece requisitos mínimos pa: NR-36 establishes minimum requirements for assessment, control, and monitoring of risks in the slaughter and meat processing industry and derivatives, ensuring safety, health, and quality of work life. It targets a sector with high ergonomic risk, repetitiveness, cold, cuts, and intense pace, requiring specific preventive measures without replacing compliance with other NRs.
translations.A NR-37 estabelece requisitos de seguran: NR-37 establishes safety, health, and living conditions requirements for work on board oil platforms in Brazilian Jurisdictional Waters. It applies to national and foreign platforms and authorized Maintenance and Safety Units. It is essential because the offshore environment involves high risks (fire, explosion, confinement, evacuation, weather conditions, and isolation).
translations.A NR-38 define requisitos e medidas de p: NR-38 defines requirements and prevention measures to ensure safety and health conditions in urban cleaning and solid waste management activities. It targets a sector with frequent exposure to biological risks, sharps, traffic, machinery, physical exertion, and environmental conditions, organizing measures to reduce accidents and illnesses.

translations.Calcule a Escala de Norton para avaliar: Calculate the Norton Scale to assess the risk of developing pressure injury (pressure ulcer). Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar o risco de desenvolvimento de le: Assess the risk of developing pressure injury based on 5 domains: physical condition, mental condition, activity, mobility, and incontinence.
translations.Indicada na avaliação de risco de lesão: Indicated for pressure injury risk assessment in hospitalized patients, especially elderly and bedridden.
translations.Pacientes hospitalizados, especialmente: Hospitalized patients, especially elderly, bedridden, or with reduced mobility.
General physical state of the patient.
translations.Estado de consciência e orientação do pa: Patient's level of consciousness and orientation.
translations.Capacidade de mudar e controlar a posiçã: Ability to change and control body position.
translations.Pontuação de 5 a 9 pontos indica risco m: Score of 5 to 9 points indicates very high risk of developing pressure injury.
translations.• Implementar protocolo intensivo de pre:
• Implement intensive pressure injury prevention protocol (frequent repositioning, special surfaces)
• Assess skin every shift
• Involve multidisciplinary team (nutrition, physiotherapy) in care plan
translations.Pontuação de 10 a 14 pontos indica alto: Score of 10 to 14 points indicates high risk of developing pressure injury.
translations.• Implementar protocolo de prevenção de:
• Implement pressure injury prevention protocol
• Perform regular repositioning per protocol
• Assess need for special support surfaces
translations.Pontuação de 15 a 18 pontos indica risco: Score of 15 to 18 points indicates moderate risk of developing pressure injury.
translations.• Manter vigilância e reavaliação periód:
• Maintain vigilance and periodic skin reassessment
• Educate on proper positioning
• Reassess score periodically, especially after changes in clinical status
translations.Pontuação de 19 a 20 pontos indica baixo: Score of 19 to 20 points indicates low risk of developing pressure injury.
translations.Risco de dano ao tecido mucoso, córneo,: Risk of damage to mucous, corneal, subcutaneous, muscle, cartilage, bone, or vascular tissue related to risk factors identified by the Norton Scale.
translations.Risco de alteração na epiderme e/ou derm: Risk of alteration in epidermis and/or dermis related to immobility, incontinence, and compromised physical condition.
translations.Escore de Norton avaliado e reavaliado p: Norton score assessed and reassessed periodically
translations.Aplicar a Escala de Norton na admissão e: Apply the Norton Scale on admission and reassess periodically
translations.Utilizar superfícies de suporte especiai: Use special support surfaces as indicated
translations.Orientar equipe e cuidadores sobre medid: Educate staff and caregivers on prevention measures
translations.A Escala de Norton avalia 5 domínios — c: The Norton Scale assesses 5 domains — physical condition, mental condition, activity, mobility, and incontinence — each scored from 1 to 4, totaling a score from 5 to 20 points, with lower scores indicating higher risk of pressure injury.
translations.Desenvolvida por Doreen Norton em 1962,: Developed by Doreen Norton in 1962, it is one of the first and simplest pressure injury risk assessment tools, widely used as a basis for later scales such as the Braden Scale.
translations.Amplamente utilizada na prática clínica: Widely used in clinical practice for its simplicity and speed of application, although more recent scales (such as the Braden Scale) are considered more detailed and have better predictive power in some populations.
translations.É uma escala mais simples que outras fer: It is a simpler scale than other more recent tools, potentially having lower sensitivity in specific populations. It does not directly assess nutritional factors and friction/shear as detailed as the Braden Scale.
translations.Na Escala de Norton, ao contrário de out: In the Norton Scale, unlike other risk scales, LOWER scores indicate HIGHER risk of pressure injury.
translations.A escala soma 5 domínios, cada um pontua: The scale sums 5 domains, each scored from 1 to 4, totaling 5 to 20 points.
translations.É uma das escalas mais simples e rápidas: It is one of the simplest and fastest scales to apply, historically serving as the basis for later scales such as the Braden.
translations.Reavalie o escore periodicamente, especi: Reassess the score periodically, especially after changes in the patient's clinical, cognitive, or mobility status.
translations.Na Escala de Norton, o que indica uma po: In the Norton Scale, what does a lower score indicate?
translations.Diferente de escalas como a Braden, na E: Unlike scales such as the Braden, in the Norton Scale lower scores indicate HIGHER risk of pressure injury.
translations.Quantos domínios compõem a Escala de Nor: How many domains make up the Norton Scale?
translations.A Escala de Norton avalia 5 domínios: co: The Norton Scale assesses 5 domains: physical condition, mental condition, activity, mobility, and incontinence.
translations.Qual a pontuação máxima possível na Esca: What is the maximum possible score on the Norton Scale?
translations.A pontuação máxima é 20 pontos (5 domíni: The maximum score is 20 points (5 domains × 4 points each), indicating the lowest risk.
translations.A Escala de Norton é igual à Escala de B: Is the Norton Scale the same as the Braden Scale?
translations.Não. São escalas diferentes de avaliação: No. They are different pressure injury risk assessment scales. The Norton is simpler, with 5 domains, while the Braden assesses 6 domains with greater detail, including friction/shear and sensory perception, and is generally considered more comprehensive.
translations.Por que pontuações mais baixas indicam m: Why do lower scores indicate higher risk on the Norton Scale?
translations.Cada domínio é pontuado de 1 (pior condi: Each domain is scored from 1 (worst condition) to 4 (best condition), so the sum of more compromised conditions results in a lower total score, reflecting higher risk of pressure injury.
translations.<p>A Escala de Norton soma a pontuação (:
The Norton Scale sums the score (1 to 4) of 5 domains — physical condition, mental condition, activity, mobility, and incontinence — totaling 5 to 20 points. Lower scores indicate higher risk.

Quick guide: 5-9 = Very high risk | 10-14 = High risk | 15-18 = Medium risk | 19-20 = Low risk.

translations.A NR-1 atualizada passou a incluir ofici:
The updated NR-1 has officially included psychosocial risks in Occupational Risk Management (GRO). The standard now requires companies to adopt measures to prevent problems such as stress, moral harassment, excessive pressure, and work overload.

The change strengthens mental health protection at work and expands the role of Occupational Health Nursing in preventing occupational diseases and promoting Occupational Safety and Health (OSH).
translations.A NR-1 — Disposições Gerais e Gerenciame: NR-1 — General Provisions and Occupational Risk Management — is the mother standard of all NRs. It establishes the risk management system that companies must adopt to ensure worker safety and health. The most recent update brought clear requirements regarding:
translations.Avaliação e controle de riscos psicossoc: Assessment and control of psychosocial risks (stress, harassment, burnout)
translations.Programas de acolhimento e apoio psicoló: Psychological support and counseling programs for workers
translations.Gestão da jornada de trabalho e descanso: Management of work hours and adequate rest
translations.Participação efetiva dos trabalhadores n: Effective worker participation in OSH decisions
translations.Integração entre saúde física e saúde me: Integration of physical and mental health in the work environment
translations.Programa da Nações Unidas sobre Saúde Me: United Nations Program on Mental Health
translations.A Organização Mundial da Saúde (OMS) est: The World Health Organization (WHO) estimates that depression and anxiety cost the global economy about US$ 1 trillion per year in lost productivity. In Brazil, absenteeism due to mental disorders increased by 28% between 2019 and 2024. The updated NR-1 responds to this reality by requiring companies to:
translations.A NR-1 passou a trabalhar de forma integ: NR-1 now works in an integrated manner with NR-17 (Ergonomics); NR-17 organizes working conditions into five areas: Work organization, Lifting and transporting materials, Furniture, Machinery and tools, Comfort in the work environment.
translations.Os fatores psicossociais estão ligados p: Psychosocial factors are mainly linked to work organization.
translations.Esses fatores podem causar: ansiedade, e: These factors can cause: anxiety, stress, depression, etc.
translations.Enfermeiro do Trabalho na prevenção de r: Occupational Health Nurse in psychosocial risk prevention
translations.O processo de avaliação da saúde mental: The worker mental health assessment process must be continuous.
translations.A NR-1 determina que a empresa mantenha: NR-1 determines that the company maintain continuous improvement in occupational health and safety using the PDCA model:
translations.Planejar (Plan): Identificar os riscos p: Plan: Identify psychosocial risks and define preventive measures
translations.Fazer (Do): Implementar as ações na empr: Do: Implement actions in the company.
translations.Checar (Check): Verificar se as medidas: Check: Verify if the measures actually worked.
translations.Agir (Act): Corrigir falhas e melhorar c: Act: Correct failures and continuously improve the process.
translations.O acolhimento não substitui o tratamento: Reception does not replace psychiatric or psychotherapeutic treatment, but serves as a bridge for continuous care. The nurse must record the reception in the occupational medical record and monitor progress.
translations.Acolhimento como estratégia de prevenção: Reception as a primary prevention strategy
translations.A NR-1 atualizada torna obrigatório o ac: The updated NR-1 makes psychological reception mandatory for workers in situations of emotional vulnerability. This includes:
translations.Retorno ao trabalho após afastamento por: Return to work after leave due to mental disorder
translations.Trabalhadores vítimas de assédio moral o: Workers victims of moral or sexual harassment
translations.Profissionais expostos a eventos traumát: Professionals exposed to traumatic events at work
translations.A NR-1 também passou a exigir que os ris: NR-1 also now requires that psychosocial risks be assessed within the ergonomic analysis and instruments and methods used to evaluate the worker's mental health, such as the use of surveys to assess the worker's mental health status:
translations.Avalia demanda psicológica, controle e a: Assesses psychological demand, control, and social support at work.
translations.Avaliação abrangente de fatores psicosso: Comprehensive assessment of psychosocial factors at work.
translations.Instrumento padrão-ouro para avaliação d: Gold standard instrument for burnout assessment.
translations.Estrutura do PGR integrado à saúde menta: PGR structure integrated with mental health
translations.O PGR é o documento central da NR-1. Com: The PGR is the central document of NR-1. With the update, it must explicitly include:
translations.Mapa de riscos psicossociais por setor e: Psychosocial risk map by sector and function
translations.Plano de ação para mitigação de riscos i: Action plan to mitigate identified risks
translations.Os riscos psicossociais estão mapeados p: Are psychosocial risks mapped by category?
translations.Existe plano de ação com prazos definido: Is there an action plan with defined deadlines?
translations.Há indicadores quantitativos de saúde me: Are there quantitative mental health indicators?
translations.O PCMSO contempla rastreamento de transt: Does the PCMSO include screening for mental disorders?
translations.Existe canal de denúncia de assédio func: Is there a channel for reporting workplace harassment?
translations.Os gestores foram capacitados para acolh: Have managers been trained in reception?
translations.A NR-1 não atua isoladamente. Sua aplica: NR-1 does not act in isolation. Its application integrates with other standards and legislation:
translations.NR-35 — Trabalho em Altura (estresse e a: NR-35 — Work at Height (stress and anxiety)
translations.A avaliação dos riscos psicossociais não: Psychosocial risk assessment is not a mental health medical exam; it is not intended to diagnose workers. The goal is to prevent illness by improving working conditions. Medical exams remain the responsibility of the PCMSO and NR-7.
translations.O objetivo não é avaliar a saúde mental: The objective is not to assess the worker's mental health... The focus is to improve working conditions and prevent illness.

translations.Calcule o NRS-2002 (Nutritional Risk Scr: Calculate the NRS-2002 (Nutritional Risk Screening) for nutritional risk screening in hospitalized patients. Includes interpretation, nursing process, and evidence.
translations.Identificar pacientes hospitalizados em: Identify hospitalized patients at nutritional risk by combining the degree of nutritional status impairment with the severity of the underlying disease, to guide the need for early nutritional intervention.
translations.Indicada na admissão hospitalar de todos: Indicated at hospital admission for all adult patients, as part of the initial nursing/nutrition assessment.
translations.Avalie perda de peso recente, IMC e inge: Assess recent weight loss, BMI, and food intake over the last week.
translations.Sem perda de peso significativa, IMC e i: No significant weight loss, adequate BMI and intake.
translations.Perda de peso >5% em 3 meses, ou ingesta: Weight loss >5% in 3 months, or intake between 50-75% of requirement in the last week.
translations.Perda de peso >5% em 2 meses, ou IMC 18,: Weight loss >5% in 2 months, or BMI 18.5-20.5 with impaired general condition, or intake between 25-50% of requirement.
translations.Perda de peso >5% em 1 mês (>15% em 3 me: Weight loss >5% in 1 month (>15% in 3 months), or BMI <18.5 with impaired general condition, or intake between 0-25% of requirement.
translations.Gravidade da Doença (Aumento das Necessi: Severity of Disease (Increase in Metabolic Needs)
translations.Avalie a condição clínica de base e seu: Assess the underlying clinical condition and its impact on nutritional needs.
translations.Doença crônica estável, sem aumento sign: Stable chronic disease, no significant increase in metabolic needs.
translations.Fratura de quadril, pacientes crônicos c: Hip fracture, chronic patients with acute complications (cirrhosis, COPD, hemodialysis, diabetes, cancer).
translations.Cirurgia abdominal de grande porte, AVC,: Major abdominal surgery, stroke, severe pneumonia, hematologic malignancy.
translations.Traumatismo cranioencefálico, transplant: Traumatic brain injury, bone marrow transplantation, critically ill patient in intensive care (APACHE II >10).
translations.Adicione 1 ponto se o paciente tiver 70: Add 1 point if the patient is 70 years or older.
translations.Ausência de risco nutricional significat: Absence of significant nutritional risk at the time of assessment.
translations.• Reavaliar semanalmente durante a inter:
• Reassess weekly during hospitalization
• Reapply NRS-2002 if clinical status changes
translations.Presença de risco nutricional, indicando: Presence of nutritional risk, indicating the need for a nutritional care plan.
translations.• Encaminhar para avaliação nutricional:
• Refer for detailed nutritional assessment
• Develop individualized nutritional therapy plan
• Periodically reassess response to nutritional intervention
translations.Ingestão de nutrientes insuficiente para: Insufficient nutrient intake to meet metabolic needs.
translations.Risco de ingestão de nutrientes insufici: Risk of insufficient nutrient intake to meet metabolic needs.
translations.Funcionamento anormal do mecanismo de de: Abnormal functioning of the swallowing mechanism associated with a deficit in oral, pharyngeal, or esophageal structure or function, when applicable.
translations.Ingestão alimentar adequada às necessida: Adequate food intake to meet needs
translations.Aplicar o NRS-2002 na admissão e semanal: Apply NRS-2002 on admission and weekly during hospitalization
translations.Encaminhar para avaliação nutricional es: Refer for specialized nutritional assessment when indicated
translations.Monitorar peso, ingesta alimentar e sina: Monitor weight, food intake, and signs of malnutrition
translations.Colaborar com a equipe de nutrição na el: Collaborate with the nutrition team in developing the therapeutic plan
translations.O NRS-2002 foi desenvolvido pela Europea: The NRS-2002 was developed by the European Society for Clinical Nutrition and Metabolism (ESPEN) as a nutritional risk screening tool for hospitalized patients, combining the degree of nutritional impairment with the severity of the underlying disease and an additional adjustment for advanced age.
translations.Amplamente recomendado por diretrizes in: Widely recommended by international nutritional therapy guidelines as an initial screening tool for all hospitalized patients, allowing early identification of those who would benefit from nutritional intervention.
translations.Validado com base em mais de 100 estudos: Validated based on more than 100 randomized clinical trials, being one of the most recommended nutritional screening tools in international scientific literature.
translations.É uma ferramenta de triagem inicial, não: It is an initial screening tool, not replacing the complete nutritional assessment performed by a dietitian, which should be triggered whenever nutritional risk is identified.
translations.Aplique o NRS-2002 na admissão de todo p: Apply NRS-2002 on admission of every hospitalized patient, regardless of the reason for hospitalization.
translations.Reavalie semanalmente, ou antes se houve: Reassess weekly, or sooner if there is a significant change in clinical status.
translations.Um escore igual ou maior que 3 já indica: A score of 3 or higher already indicates the need to develop a nutritional care plan.
translations.O ajuste de idade (+1 ponto para 70 anos: The age adjustment (+1 point for 70 years or older) reflects the higher nutritional risk of this population.
translations.A partir de qual escore o NRS-2002 indic: From which score does NRS-2002 indicate nutritional risk present?
translations.Escores de 3 pontos ou mais indicam risc: Scores of 3 points or more indicate nutritional risk present, prompting the development of a nutritional care plan.
translations.Quais componentes são somados no NRS-200: Which components are summed in NRS-2002?
translations.Comprometimento nutricional, gravidade d: Nutritional impairment, disease severity, and age adjustment
translations.O NRS-2002 soma o grau de comprometiment: NRS-2002 sums the degree of nutritional status impairment, disease severity (increased metabolic needs), and an additional point for age 70 years or older.
translations.Qual organização desenvolveu e recomenda: Which organization developed and recommends NRS-2002?
translations.O NRS-2002 foi desenvolvido pela Europea: NRS-2002 was developed by the European Society for Clinical Nutrition and Metabolism (ESPEN) and is widely recommended in international nutritional therapy guidelines.
translations.O NRS-2002 substitui a avaliação nutrici: Does NRS-2002 replace complete nutritional assessment?
translations.Não. É uma ferramenta de triagem inicial: No. It is an initial screening tool. Patients identified with nutritional risk (score ≥3) should be referred for detailed nutritional assessment by a specialized professional.
translations.Com que frequência o NRS-2002 deve ser r: How often should NRS-2002 be reapplied?
translations.Recomenda-se reavaliação semanal durante: Weekly reassessment is recommended throughout hospitalization, or sooner if there is a significant change in clinical status or dietary intake.
translations.<p>O NRS-2002 soma o grau de comprometim:
NRS-2002 sums the degree of nutritional status impairment (0-3 points), the severity of underlying disease (0-3 points), and an additional point for patients aged 70 years or older, totaling 0 to 7 points.

Quick guide: 0-2 = No nutritional risk | ≥3 = Nutritional risk present, develop nutritional care plan.

Assess occupational risks in nursing with a risk matrix, action plans, and a library of regulatory standards (NR-01, NR-32, NR-35).

translations.Objetivo do Site | Calculadoras de Enfer: Site Objective | Nursing Calculators - Nursing Calculators
translations.Oferecer a profissionais e estudantes de: To offer nursing professionals and students a practical tool for calculating medications and doses, based on medical prescriptions, simulations, or course questions. The user enters the requested data and the calculator automatically performs the necessary mathematical formulas.
translations.Disponibilizamos também a aplicação das: We also provide the application of the main care scales used in nursing and healthcare, which require calculation through the sum of scores to identify risks or assist in the development of a care plan by the nurse. Examples include: Braden Scale, Morse Scale, and Fugulin Scale. Additionally, the platform offers monitoring scales that support medical interventions, such as the Aldrete and Kroulik Scale, widely used by the nursing team and essential for guiding patient discharge in the PACU.
translations.Essas escalas, na maioria das vezes, são: These scales are mostly applied by the nursing team and serve as a guide for defining conduct by the entire multidisciplinary team — including nursing technicians, nurses, physicians, and physiotherapists. In some, the nurse's role is more active; in others, the instrument serves only as a monitoring basis to support medical decision-making. An example is the Aldrete Scale: although applied and monitored by nursing in the PACU, the final decision on patient discharge or continued monitoring rests exclusively with the anesthesiologist.
translations.Os cálculos matemáticos disponibilizados: The mathematical calculations provided by the calculators on this site are consultative and educational in nature, based on recognized bibliographic references, which should be consulted for content validation. The review of medication, insulin, and drip rate calculations does not replace the manual application of traditional methods — such as using paper, pencil, and standardized mathematical rules. Under no circumstances should the calculators be considered the sole means of arriving at the final result. They serve as comparative and educational support but do not replace the critical reasoning and technical responsibility of the professional. No automated calculation replaces the analysis and judgment of the nursing professional — and never will.
translations.Em caso de dúvidas sobre a formulação ou: If you have questions about the formulation or results of the calculations, it is recommended to consult your nursing instructor or supervising nurse, who are qualified to provide clarification, answer questions, and guide the correct procedure for performing calculations and obtaining results.
translations.Recursos e indicadores para apoiar líder: Resources and indicators to support leaders and healthcare institutions in making strategic and efficient decisions.
translations.Conteúdos atualizados, baseados em evidê: Updated, evidence-based content developed by experts to boost your clinical career.
translations.Adotamos práticas voltadas à eficiência: We adopt practices focused on digital efficiency, including hosting with a focus on energy efficiency, use of WebP images, modular structure, continuous performance optimization, and a lightweight cookie script. We regularly monitor the site with tools such as Website Carbon, EcoGrader, Google Lighthouse, Chrome DevTools, GTmetrix, and Pingdom.
translations.Mesmo em desenvolvimento, os resultados: Even while under development, initial results indicate reduced resource consumption, continuous performance improvement, and a more efficient browsing experience. Our commitment is to constantly evolve, implementing annual digital efficiency goals and publishing periodic reports with auditable metrics.
translations.Conheça nosso objetivo: oferecer a profi: Learn about our objective: to offer nursing professionals and students practical global tools, promoting impact management, education, and sustainability.
translations.objetivo, calculadoras de enfermagem, fe: objective, nursing calculators, practical tools, healthcare management, nursing education, digital sustainability, patient safety
translations.Oferecemos ferramentas práticas globais,: We offer practical global tools, promoting impact management, evidence-based education, and sustainability.
translations.Escala OFRAS - Risco de Queda em Pacient: OFRAS Scale - Fall Risk in Obstetric Patients
translations.Calcule a Escala OFRAS (Obstetric Fall R: Calculate the OFRAS (Obstetric Fall Risk Assessment System) scale to stratify fall risk in pregnant and postpartum women. Includes interpretation, SAE, and evidence.
translations.Estratificar o risco de queda em pacient: To stratify fall risk in obstetric patients (pregnant and postpartum women) hospitalized, considering 6 categories of risk factors: history, cardiac system, hemorrhage, anesthesia, motor activity, and medication use.
translations.Indicada para avaliação do risco de qued: Indicated for fall risk assessment on admission of obstetric patients and daily reassessment until hospital discharge.
translations.Gestantes e puérperas internadas em unid: Pregnant and postpartum women admitted to obstetrics and maternity units.
translations.Selecione o fator de maior risco present: Select the highest risk factor present related to the patient's history.
translations.Uso irregular de óculos ou para leitura: Irregular use of glasses or for reading
translations.História de queda anterior (em qualquer: History of previous fall (during any hospitalization or pregnancy)
translations.Esteve acamada nos últimos 2 meses de gr: Has been bedridden in the last 2 months of pregnancy
translations.Selecione o fator de maior risco present: Select the highest risk factor present related to the cardiac system.
translations.Mal-estar ao ortostatismo (deitado para: Malaise upon orthostatism (lying to sitting or sitting to standing)
translations.Sensação de fraqueza, visão borrada ou v: Feeling of weakness, blurred vision, or vertigo
translations.Selecione o fator de maior risco present: Select the highest risk factor present related to hemorrhage.
translations.Hemorragia pós-parto (> 1,5 L) ou hemotr: Postpartum hemorrhage (> 1.5 L) or blood transfusion during the procedure
translations.Selecione o fator de maior risco present: Select the highest risk factor present related to anesthesia.
translations.Selecione a condição de atividade motora: Select the patient's motor activity condition.
translations.Levanta as pernas, mas não consegue dese: Lifts legs but cannot lift hips off the bed with leg and back support (bridge)
translations.Incapaz de levantar as pernas estando de: Unable to lift legs while lying down
translations.Selecione a condição de uso de medicamen: Select the condition of medication use with potential fall risk.
translations.Sem uso de medicamentos com risco de que: No use of medications with fall risk.
translations.Uma classe terapêutica (antipsicótico, a: One therapeutic class (antipsychotic, anticonvulsant, anxiolytic, opioid, sedative, diuretic, or antiarrhythmic)
translations.Baixo risco de queda para a paciente obs: Low fall risk for the obstetric patient.
translations.• Manter orientações gerais de segurança:
• Maintain general safety and fall prevention guidelines
• Reassess daily until discharge
translations.Risco médio de queda, exigindo maior vig: Moderate fall risk, requiring increased team vigilance.
translations.• Identificar a paciente com pulseira de:
• Identify the patient with a fall risk bracelet (yellow band)
• Educate patient and companion about fall risks
• Reinforce supervision during ambulation and transfers
• Reassess daily until discharge
translations.Alto risco de queda, exigindo intervençõ: High fall risk, requiring enhanced safety interventions.
translations.• Identificar a paciente com pulseira de:
• Identify the patient with a fall risk bracelet (yellow band)
• Direct assistance during all ambulation and transfers
• Assess need for assistance with hygiene and personal care
• Review medications with fall risk potential with the medical team
• Reassess daily until discharge
translations.Suscetibilidade aumentada a quedas que p: Increased susceptibility to falls that may cause physical harm to the pregnant or postpartum woman and compromise health.
translations.Limitação no movimento físico independen: Limitation in independent and voluntary physical movement of the body, related to factors such as recent anesthesia, hemorrhage, or use of sedative medications.
translations.Paciente identificada com pulseira de ri: Patient identified with risk bracelet when indicated
translations.Ausência de episódios de queda durante a: Absence of fall episodes during hospitalization
translations.Paciente e acompanhante orientados sobre: Patient and companion educated about fall risks
translations.Aplicar a escala OFRAS na admissão e rea: Apply the OFRAS scale on admission and reassess daily
translations.Identificar a paciente com pulseira de r: Identify the patient with a fall risk bracelet when score ≥ 3
translations.Orientar paciente e acompanhante quanto: Educate patient and companion about fall risks in the hospital environment
translations.Auxiliar na deambulação e transferências: Assist with ambulation and transfers in moderate/high risk patients
translations.Monitorar efeitos de medicamentos com po: Monitor effects of medications with potential to cause or increase fall risk
translations.A OFRAS avalia 6 categorias de risco (hi: The OFRAS evaluates 6 risk categories (history, cardiac system, hemorrhage, anesthesia, motor activity, and medication use), each with risk factors with specific non-uniform scores. The total score classifies risk as low (0-2), moderate (3-4), or high (≥5).
translations.Desenvolvida por Peggy Wallace e colabor: Developed by Peggy Wallace and colleagues in the USA (JOGNN, 2015 - "Catch a Falling Star": The Development of the Obstetric Falls Risk Assessment System to Improve Patient Safety), it was translated and adapted for use in Brazilian maternity hospitals, including the institutional protocol of the Maternity School of UFRJ.
translations.Estudos comparativos mostraram que a OFR: Comparative studies showed that OFRAS is more sensitive and specific for identifying fall risk in obstetric patients than the Morse Scale (originally developed for general/elderly population), reducing obstetric fall rates after its implementation.
translations.Cada categoria considera apenas o fator: Each category considers only the highest scoring factor present, not summing multiple factors within the same category. Correct application requires team training on the specific criteria of each category.
translations.A OFRAS avalia 6 categorias: história pr: The OFRAS evaluates 6 categories: history, cardiac system, hemorrhage, anesthesia, motor activity, and medication use.
translations.Em cada categoria, considera-se apenas o: In each category, only the highest scoring factor present is considered, not the sum of all factors in that category.
translations.Pontuação ≥ 3 indica necessidade de iden: Score ≥ 3 indicates need for identification with a fall risk bracelet (yellow band).
translations.A OFRAS demonstrou maior sensibilidade q: OFRAS demonstrated higher sensitivity than the Morse Scale for identifying fall risk in obstetric patients.
translations.Gestante sem fatores de risco identifica: Pregnant woman with no identified risk factors
translations.Puérpera com peridural há menos de 3h e: Postpartum woman with epidural less than 3 hours ago and use of antihypertensive
translations.Gestante com pré-eclâmpsia e história de: Pregnant woman with preeclampsia and history of previous fall
translations.Quantas categorias compõem a escala OFRA: How many categories make up the OFRAS scale?
translations.A partir de qual pontuação a paciente de: From what score should the patient be identified with a fall risk bracelet?
translations.Pontuação de 3 a 4 já classifica risco m: Score 3 to 4 already classifies moderate risk, requiring identification with a fall risk bracelet (yellow band); high risk is ≥ 5.
translations.A OFRAS foi desenvolvida especificamente: For which population was OFRAS specifically developed?
translations.A OFRAS (Obstetric Fall Risk Assessment: The OFRAS (Obstetric Fall Risk Assessment System) was specifically developed to stratify fall risk in obstetric patients, proving more sensitive than general scales like Morse in this population.
translations.A OFRAS substitui a Escala de Morse em u: Does OFRAS replace the Morse Scale in obstetric units?
translations.Sim, recomenda-se o uso da OFRAS em vez: Yes, the use of OFRAS is recommended instead of the Morse Scale in obstetric units, as studies show higher sensitivity and specificity of OFRAS for this specific population.
translations.Com que frequência a OFRAS deve ser reap: How often should OFRAS be reapplied?
translations.Deve ser aplicada na admissão da pacient: Should be applied at patient admission and reassessed daily until hospital discharge, or at any time when there is a relevant change in clinical status.
translations.<p>A OFRAS avalia 6 categorias de risco:
The OFRAS evaluates 6 fall risk categories in obstetric patients, considering in each category the factor with the highest score present.

Interpretation: 0-2 = low risk | 3-4 = moderate risk | ≥ 5 = high risk.

translations.PAINAD - Escala de Avaliação de Dor na D: PAINAD - Pain Assessment in Advanced Dementia Scale
translations.Calcule a Escala PAINAD (Pain Assessment: Calculate the PAINAD (Pain Assessment in Advanced Dementia) scale to assess pain in patients with advanced dementia unable to communicate verbally. Includes interpretation, nursing care plan, and evidence.
translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor em paciente: Assess pain intensity in patients with advanced dementia through behavioral observation of 5 domains: breathing, negative vocalization, facial expression, body language, and consolability.
translations.Indicada para pacientes com demência ava: Indicated for patients with advanced dementia or other severe cognitive impairments, unable to report pain verbally.
translations.Idosos com demência avançada ou comprome: Elderly with advanced dementia or severe cognitive impairment, without reliable verbal communication ability.
translations.Observação do padrão respiratório do pac: Observation of the patient's breathing pattern, regardless of vocalizations.
translations.Respiração sem esforço, tranquila e rítm: Normal breathing, effortless, quiet, and rhythmic.
translations.Respiração ofegante ocasional / hiperven: Occasional labored breathing / short period of hyperventilation
translations.Períodos episódicos de respiração difíci: Episodic periods of difficult breathing or short periods of hyperventilation (rapid, deep breaths for a short time).
translations.Respiração ruidosa e difícil / hipervent: Noisy labored breathing / prolonged hyperventilation / Cheyne-Stokes respiration
translations.Respiração ruidosa e laboriosa (sons neg: Noisy and laborious breathing (negative sounds on inspiration/expiration), prolonged hyperventilation, or Cheyne-Stokes respiration (crescendo-decrescendo rhythm with apneic periods).
Sounds and speech emitted by the patient.
translations.Fala ou vocalização com qualidade neutra: Speech or vocalization with neutral or pleasant quality.
translations.Gemido ou lamento ocasional / fala em ba: Occasional moan or groan / low-volume speech with negative connotation
translations.Sons melancólicos ou murmurados ocasiona: Occasional melancholic or murmured sounds, or low-volume speech with complaining, sarcastic, or harsh tone.
translations.Chamados repetidos e angustiados / gemid: Repeated troubled calling out / loud moaning or groaning / crying
translations.Repetição de frases ou palavras em tom d: Repetition of phrases or words in an anxious or distressed tone, loud moaning or groaning, or crying (with or without sobbing).
translations.Cantos da boca voltados para cima, ou ex: Corners of mouth turned up, or neutral, relaxed, and tension-free expression.
translations.Aparência infeliz, pesarosa (pode haver: Unhappy, sorrowful appearance (may have tears), or fearful/apprehensive look with wide-open eyes.
translations.Cantos da boca voltados para baixo com a: Corners of mouth turned down with increased wrinkles on forehead, or distorted, anguished expression, possibly with eyes squeezed shut.
translations.Aparência tensa ou apreensiva (mandíbula: Tense or apprehensive appearance (jaw may be clenched), or restless activity such as pacing or fidgeting in chair.
translations.Rígida / punhos cerrados / joelhos flexi: Rigid / fists clenched / knees pulled up / aggressive
translations.Enrijecimento do corpo, punhos cerrados,: Body stiffening, fists clenched, knees pulled toward chest, pushing/pulling or striking out (hitting, kicking).
translations.Distraído(a) ou tranquilizado(a) pela vo: Distracted or reassured by voice or touch
translations.O comportamento se interrompe quando o p: Behavior stops when patient is approached, touched, or given attention, without signs of persistent distress.
translations.Impossível consolar, distrair ou tranqui: Unable to console, distract, or reassure
translations.Nenhuma medida de conforto verbal ou fís: No verbal or physical comfort measure can alleviate the observed behavior.
translations.Pontuação 0, compatível com ausência de: Score 0, consistent with absence of observable pain.
translations.• Manter conduta atual\n• Reavaliar peri:
• Maintain current approach
• Reassess periodically and after any change in clinical status
translations.Pontuação de 1 a 3 pontos, sugestiva de: Score 1 to 3 points, suggestive of mild pain intensity.
translations.• Considerar medidas não farmacológicas:
• Consider non-pharmacological comfort measures
• Reassess at short intervals
• Investigate possible causes of pain or discomfort
translations.Pontuação de 4 a 6 pontos, sugestiva de: Score of 4 to 6 points, suggestive of moderate intensity pain.
translations.• Comunicar à equipe médica\n• Considera:
• Communicate to the medical team
• Consider analgesia per prescription and institutional protocol
• Reassess after intervention
translations.Pontuação de 7 a 10 pontos, sugestiva de: Score of 7 to 10 points, suggestive of severe/intense pain.
translations.• Comunicar imediatamente à equipe médic:
• Immediately communicate to the medical team
• Prioritize pharmacological analgesic intervention per prescription
• Reassess at short interval after intervention
translations.Experiência sensorial e emocional desagr: Unpleasant sensory and emotional experience associated with actual or potential tissue damage, identified by observational behavioral indicators in a patient unable to verbally report pain.
translations.Capacidade diminuída, retardada ou ausen: Decreased, delayed, or absent ability to receive, process, transmit, and/or use a system of symbols, related to advanced dementia.
translations.Escore PAINAD avaliado de forma sistemát: PAINAD score assessed systematically and regularly
translations.Redução do escore PAINAD após intervençã: Reduction in PAINAD score after intervention
translations.Aplicar a PAINAD regularmente e após qua: Apply PAINAD regularly and after any sign of behavioral change
translations.Investigar possíveis causas de dor ou de: Investigate possible causes of pain or discomfort (urinary retention, constipation, positioning)
translations.Utilizar medidas não farmacológicas de c: Use non-pharmacological comfort measures (repositioning, quiet environment, presence)
translations.Registrar a pontuação PAINAD no prontuár: Record PAINAD score in the medical record and monitor response to intervention
translations.A PAINAD avalia 5 domínios comportamenta: PAINAD assesses 5 behavioral domains — breathing, negative vocalization, facial expression, body language, and consolability — each scored 0 to 2, totaling a score from 0 (no pain) to 10 (severe pain).
translations.Desenvolvida por Warden, Hurley e Volice: Developed by Warden, Hurley, and Volicer (2003), it was specifically created for pain assessment in patients with advanced dementia, who often lose the ability to verbally report pain.
translations.Validada em unidades de cuidados de long: Validated in long-term care and hospital units for patients with advanced dementia, with good interrater reliability and correlation with other measures of discomfort.
translations.Não substitui a avaliação de causas pote: Does not replace assessment of potential causes of pain (urinary retention, constipation, improper positioning). Observed behaviors may also reflect agitation from other origins (e.g., delirium), requiring complementary clinical evaluation.
translations.A PAINAD foi desenvolvida especificament: PAINAD was developed specifically for patients with advanced dementia, unable to verbally report pain.
translations.Observe o paciente por alguns minutos, i: Observe the patient for a few minutes, ideally during an activity (e.g., mobilization, bathing), before scoring each domain.
translations.Antes de atribuir dor a uma pontuação el: Before attributing pain to a high score, investigate potential causes such as urinary retention, constipation, or improper positioning.
translations.Reavalie o escore após qualquer interven: Reassess the score after any analgesic intervention or comfort measure to monitor response to treatment.
translations.Para qual população a Escala PAINAD foi: For which population was the PAINAD Scale developed?
translations.A PAINAD foi desenvolvida especificament: PAINAD was developed specifically for pain assessment in patients with advanced dementia, unable to communicate pain verbally.
translations.Quantos domínios compõem a Escala PAINAD: How many domains make up the PAINAD Scale and what is the maximum score?
translations.A PAINAD avalia 5 domínios (respiração,: PAINAD assesses 5 domains (breathing, negative vocalization, facial expression, body language, consolability), each from 0 to 2, totaling a maximum of 10 points.
translations.Antes de atribuir uma pontuação alta de: Before attributing a high pain score by PAINAD, what should be investigated?
translations.Apenas o histórico de dor prévia: Only the history of previous pain
translations.Causas potenciais como retenção urinária: Potential causes such as urinary retention, constipation, or positioning
translations.Não é necessário investigar nada além do: No further investigation beyond behavior is needed
translations.Comportamentos sugestivos de dor podem t: Behaviors suggestive of pain may have other causes; it is important to investigate factors such as urinary retention, constipation, and improper positioning before concluding the presence of pain.
translations.A PAINAD substitui a avaliação clínica d: Does PAINAD replace clinical pain assessment?
translations.Não. A PAINAD é uma ferramenta observaci: No. PAINAD is an observational tool that complements clinical judgment. Before concluding that a behavior indicates pain, other possible causes such as urinary retention, constipation, improper positioning, or delirium should be investigated.
translations.A PAINAD pode ser usada em pacientes que: Can PAINAD be used in patients who can still communicate verbally?
translations.A PAINAD é indicada principalmente para: PAINAD is primarily indicated for patients with advanced dementia and inability to reliably communicate verbally. For patients able to self-report pain, self-report scales (such as the Visual Analog Scale or Numeric Rating Scale) are preferred.
translations.<p>A PAINAD soma a pontuação (0 a 2) de:
PAINAD sums the score (0 to 2) of 5 behavioral domains — breathing, negative vocalization, facial expression, body language, and consolability — totaling 0 to 10 points.

Quick guide: 0 = No pain | 1-3 = Mild pain | 4-6 = Moderate pain | 7-10 = Severe pain.

translations.Avaliar a intensidade da dor em paciente: Assess pain intensity in patients with advanced dementia through behavioral observation of 5 domains: breathing, negative vocalization, facial expression, body language, and consolability. Indicated for patients with advanced dementia or other severe cognitive impairments unable to self-report pain.
